Peter, it’s Ritchie Torres.

I’ll get to the point: **I don’t spend my days doing ‘call-time’ — i.e. calling up mega-donors,_begging_ for huge checks.**

I spend days working for my constituents in the Bronx and for all Americans — _as I was elected to do_ — and I rely on small donations from grassroots Democrats like you.

Tonight’s mid-month goal is to get 150 donations. **It’s not about how much we raise, Peter — _it’s about how strong our people-powered movement is._**

[We still need 36 more people to step up by midnight. Will you chip in $3, or whatever you can afford, to help fuel this grassroots coalition in our fight to protect my seat and take back the House? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111545706/557594142/-721819307?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250715_EMDF_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2ViZmZkYy1kNzYxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xkZ_9tKujwvXDgBxW0_uIQmxqWgl6kXIF8wklP7qVaw=) | **[36 DONATIONS NEEDED: RUSH $3 TO RE-ELECT RITCHIE TORRES »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111545708/557594145/-721819307?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250715_EMDF_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2ViZmZkYy1kNzYxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xkZ_9tKujwvXDgBxW0_uIQmxqWgl6kXIF8wklP7qVaw=)**

With everything from Social Security to affordable housing (and more!) on the line, I’m really hoping I can count on you today, Peter.

[Here’s one more chance to donate before tonight’s mid-month deadline. »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111545710/557594147/-721819307?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250715_EMDF_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2ViZmZkYy1kNzYxLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xkZ_9tKujwvXDgBxW0_uIQmxqWgl6kXIF8wklP7qVaw=)

I can’t thank you enough,
Ritchie
| | Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
www.torres.nyc

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

| | Team: **Another 500,000 Georgians are at risk of having their voter registration “purged” this summer.** **What happens?** Partisan election officials conduct mass registered voter removals, as required by recent Georgia voter suppression laws -- laws that include limits on mail-in ballots, the criminalization of giving out water or food to voters waiting in line, and so much more. **T****hese purges disenfranchise legitimate eligible voters who haven’t moved or had other changes to their voter registration status**. Multiple stories written by the _Atlanta Journal-Constitution_ in recent years have highlighted wrongfully purged voters and show the evidence clearly. This comes after _groups based outside of Georgia_ brought mass challenges against almost 400,000 Georgia voters in recent election cycles. And that doesn't include the 92,000 additional challenges brought in Georgia by amateur "_voter fraud hunters_ " who believe the lies peddled by partisan activists trying to shake our faith in our elections and guarantee their party wins elections. [**Voter suppression is real, Team, both in Georgia and across the country. Help us push back on these cynical purges and voter challenges with $25 or whatever you can today to protect the right to vote nationwide >>**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111545899/557595577/1723810624?am=25.00&contactdata=MMLLG/lLzF5MQVg1DlHFrjNXk5o0Wm0lTWYEaVvkDvaRl2d/p5Dck15B2OiO651B+BGM+5tUYdO+yOCHtvih+Yhchftipfxw3FDaHbOMYSw=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY2ODE3OTIwLWQ4NjEtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lZr_KGYlCHLIatws4fDp6OklQYadapEQ8wkih8Sw1A8=&emci=ec068a4f-8761-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=66817920-d861-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=33603084)

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.

Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. [**Your support is crucial to our efforts. clean_body: Fox5 Atlanta: Georgia set to purge nearly half-million inactive voters this summer| | | These purges could disenfranchise people with unreliable mail delivery, those who have lost their homes, and other legitimate registered voters. Voters of color, those in underserved communities, and residents of rural areas are most at risk. And you can bet that every other suppressive state wants to follow Georgia's lead. | | | | | Team: Another 500,000 Georgians are at risk of having their voter registration “purged” this summer. What happens? Partisan election officials conduct mass registered voter removals, as required by recent Georgia voter suppression laws -- laws that include limits on mail-in ballots, the criminalization of giving out water or food to voters waiting in line, and so much more. These purges disenfranchise legitimate eligible voters who haven’t moved or had other changes to their voter registration status. Multiple stories written by the Atlanta Journal-Constitution in recent years have highlighted wrongfully purged voters and show the evidence clearly. This comes after groups based outside of Georgia brought mass challenges against almost 400,000 Georgia voters in recent election cycles. And that doesn't include the 92,000 additional challenges brought in Georgia by amateur "voter fraud hunters " who believe the lies peddled by partisan activists trying to shake our faith in our elections and guarantee their party wins elections. If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). ### Never Go To War With Your Pants Down
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/eb9f6b8d-67de-49b4-be2f-36e59f14cead?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
`Independent Media For.26/day!`
_**We 're only 30 paid subscriptions from 1000! Ler's reach it tonight! Gain more influence on Substack, send our messaging out further, get our crucial work amplified even more!**_
_**So I 'll list a few benefits we've created for those who upgrade to a paid subscription:**_
_Substack Live AMA each week w/ me & David Shuster, video posted for paid subscribers_
**Extra content:** insider political stories in semi-regular columns/videos, pics from trips like my recent Italy sojourn, _many more_ kitty pic/videos, personal shout-outs during livestreams
_Ability to comment on all content and send us DMs (we are getting this set up)_
_Support our Soundcheck Fund --create an ecosystem of independent media to save democracy_
[Be The One That Puts Us Over 1000!](https://substack.com/redirect/d08e2ced-449f-4f41-8e5e-7ba00d5ca05b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
It's finally happening! The MAGA cult, [long held together by rage,](https://substack.com/redirect/09970497-5ce2-4926-9b4d-9a5584472f45?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) racism and a man who looks like the Stay Puft Marshmallow Man dipped himself in a nice, fecal-shade-of bronzer, is cracking. Why?
Because their dear leader--the man who claimed he alone could fix it--is suddenly a little _shy_ when it comes to...fixing it. In this case, releasing the Epstein files.
The same ones that the Alex Jones, member of the Republican inner brain trust, swore would unveil a satanic cabal of liberal baby-eaters on a pedo-island in the Caribbean.
But now that Trump's in power again...what files!? Man, he's got those things locked up tighter than a Mar-a-Lago crapper during classified-document bingo. And the MAGA base? They've noticed. Ruh roh.
There's an old saying here..It goes something like "never robo-lie and share conspiracy with cultists, feeding dolts a steady diet of 'the other guys are pedos, [we protect children](https://substack.com/redirect/4c3c0c69-c2f7-42e4-ba97-b45624351627?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and we got the Epstein files to prove it' for years..only to then say you don't have the files. Or they'renot important. Or Democrats just made them up.
Maybe--and I'm just spitballing here--it's not so clever to base your whole movement around an issue [when you appear in the files so many times you should get paid royalties for every download](https://substack.com/redirect/34e4ab44-742e-4168-a442-17e3f28e4323?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). From what David Shuster previously wrote for us:
> Just look at the Epstein grand jury materials released in Florida last year.
> Donald Trump is all over the Epstein call logs. Trump is also in Epstein flight manifests. There are also countless pictures of Trump with a virtual army of young women. And there is video - broadcast years ago by NBC News - of Trump and Epstein partying and then whispering to each other and pointing at the young women dancing in front of them.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/474ce67e-0bd9-4836-b835-d93d870b5157?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Suddenly red hats are spinning [like QAnon dreidels](https://substack.com/redirect/c5a449fa-3567-4069-ab17-c398e6e4663b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Some think Trump's being blackmailed. Others think he's "strategically timing" the release of the files (spoiler: he isn't. You used the word "strategic" as if that's a thing he can do). And the rest?
They're starting to wonder if maybe--just _maybe_ --the guy who partied with Epstein, called him "terrific" and admired how he "liked girls young" could also be a sicko. You know, just a normal dude who called his young daughter "a piece of ass" and snuck into beauty-pageant-changing rooms to peak, _Porky 's_ style, on naked teen girls...
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8a2c217c-3dc0-4775-9fe4-1606743ba701?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Could it be that _he is what he always obviously was_ to those of us without a buildup of excess spinal fluid? Perhaps, had they been beyond Lauren Boebert's multiple-failed-GED reading level, they could've perused this repulsive court filing (Shuster also wrote about this for us):
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/059e5151-710b-44c3-a733-17f2d348c3e6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
> If anybody wants even more courthouse material or legal files, google Donald Trump and Katie Johnson. According to a Johnson lawsuit, she was 13 years old and an aspiring model in 1994 when she attended a series of parties at Jeffrey Epstein's Manhattan home. She claimed that Epstein raped her and that she was also tied to a bed and raped by Donald Trump.
> According to the Johnson lawsuit, quote: "During the course of this savage sexual attack, plaintiff Johnson loudly pleaded with Donald Trump to 'please wear a condom.' Defendant Trump responded by violently striking Plaintiff Johnson in the face with his open hand and screaming that he 'would do whatever he wanted' as he refused to wear protection.
> After achieving sexual orgasm, the Defendant Donald J. Trump put his suit back on and when the Plaintiff, Katie Johnson, in tears asked Defendant Donald Trump what would happen if he had impregnated her, Defendant Trump grabbed his wallet and threw some money at her and screamed that she should use the money 'to get a fucking abortion.'"
So MAGA factions are now openly feuding, which is fun while you watch those who screamed "lock her up" suddenly have to ask, "Wait... why won't _he_ open it up?" Then you remember what it's about, and it's difficult to find these patriarchal perverts who project their psychoses onto perceived "enemies" as anything other than[ yet another sickness in our culture](https://substack.com/redirect/de98a0e5-b032-4387-9db5-a1d9ac3d6cbd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and a [failure of our corporate media. Again](https://substack.com/redirect/72f0b762-65bc-4ca8-a5c7-3974ee4417be?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
The kicker? Vladimir Putin entering this blender of conspiracy, hypocrisy, and body odor. Trump's former handler-turned-frenemy is very un-thrilled with his American asset --Trump ignored the boss on bombing Iran, he's now waffling on Ukraine..the public tension has been obvious in the back & forths for at least 2 mos now.
In fact,[ we were some of the first to tell you about this, which, again, is why independent media is so important, so crucial to fund](https://substack.com/redirect/d08e2ced-449f-4f41-8e5e-7ba00d5ca05b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
[](https://substack.com/redirect/6635798d-831d-4309-9947-d6c9a9769e20?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
It wouldn't be the first time Vlad used his troll farms and Telegram flunkies to stoke the flames among Trump's true believers. **Putin 's goal was never just electing a puppet--it was burning the American house down**.
So now, as Trump stumblebums around with his brain dripping out of his ears, Putin may have finally had enough. Especially with others like Musk, Vance and congressional Republicans to choose from in The Vladivostok Dating Game.
In the end it's pretty simple. Live by defining who you are--from Q to trans hatred to abortion--around "protecting children." Die (politically) by defining who you are around "protecting children."

And there is video - broadcast years ago by NBC News - of Trump and Epstein partying and then whispering to each other and pointing at the young women dancing in front of them. | | ---|---|--- Suddenly red hats are spinning . Some think Trump's being blackmailed. Others think he's "strategically timing" the release of the files (spoiler: he isn't. You used the word "strategic" as if that's a thing he can do). And the rest? They're starting to wonder if maybe--just maybe --the guy who partied with Epstein, called him "terrific" and admired how he "liked girls young" could also be a sicko. You know, just a normal dude who called his young daughter "a piece of ass" and snuck into beauty-pageant-changing rooms to peak, Porky 's style, on naked teen girls... | | ---|---|--- Could it be that he is what he always obviously was to those of us without a buildup of excess spinal fluid? Perhaps, had they been beyond Lauren Boebert's multiple-failed-GED reading level, they could've perused this repulsive court filing (Shuster also wrote about this for us): | | ---|---|--- If anybody wants even more courthouse material or legal files, google Donald Trump and Katie Johnson. According to a Johnson lawsuit, she was 13 years old and an aspiring model in 1994 when she attended a series of parties at Jeffrey Epstein's Manhattan home. She claimed that Epstein raped her and that she was also tied to a bed and raped by Donald Trump. According to the Johnson lawsuit, quote: "During the course of this savage sexual attack, plaintiff Johnson loudly pleaded with Donald Trump to 'please wear a condom.' Defendant Trump responded by violently striking Plaintiff Johnson in the face with his open hand and screaming that he 'would do whatever he wanted' as he refused to wear protection. After achieving sexual orgasm, the Defendant Donald J. Trump put his suit back on and when the Plaintiff, Katie Johnson, in tears asked Defendant Donald Trump what would happen if he had impregnated her, Defendant Trump grabbed his wallet and threw some money at her and screamed that she should use the money 'to get a fucking abortion.'" So MAGA factions are now openly feuding, which is fun while you watch those who screamed "lock her up" suddenly have to ask, "Wait... why won't he open it up?" Then you remember what it's about, and it's difficult to find these patriarchal perverts who project their psychoses onto perceived "enemies" as anything other than and a . The kicker? Vladimir Putin entering this blender of conspiracy, hypocrisy, and body odor. Trump's former handler-turned-frenemy is very un-thrilled with his American asset --Trump ignored the boss on bombing Iran, he's now waffling on Ukraine..the public tension has been obvious in the back & forths for at least 2 mos now. In fact,. It wouldn't be the first time Vlad used his troll farms and Telegram flunkies to stoke the flames among Trump's true believers. Putin 's goal was never just electing a puppet--it was burning the American house down. So now, as Trump stumblebums around with his brain dripping out of his ears, Putin may have finally had enough. Especially with others like Musk, Vance and congressional Republicans to choose from in The Vladivostok Dating Game. In the end it's pretty simple. Live by defining who you are--from Q to trans hatred to abortion--around "protecting children." Die (politically) by defining who you are around "protecting children." `Full Blue Amp Subscription For Just .26/Day!` Get the truth corporate media ignores from a Biden ad man & Emmy-winning MSNBC anchor We 're only 30 paid subscriptions from 1000! Be the one who puts us OVER THE TOP! Support our new Soundcheck Fund to help fund & promote independent media! Amplify Good! Support Indy Media! Save Democracy! You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Cliff Schecter PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 ? ?

#
In just a moment, we are going to ask you to make a contribution directly to VoteVets. But first, you deserve to know how we will use your donation and why this request is so important.
Here's the truth:
As you read this, Donald Trump and the Republican Party are pulling up the couch cushions looking for any programs they can slash in order to pay for tax cuts for billionaires.
Sadly, that includes programs many Veterans rely on. We're talking about Veterans health care, housing and more.
He’s passed his terrible budget gutting Medicaid, he’s cutting 30,000 staff at the VA, and now he has free reign to dismantle the Department of Education and programs. It’s devastating, and we've got to defend our people right now.
We also have critical elections coming up fast, and we need to re-take the House or Senate to serve as a check against Trump in the next two years.
In each of those instances, it is the voices of Veterans and military families that will play key roles.
VoteVets is one of the top outside spending organizations every cycle, but what you may not know is that almost all of the donations we receive come from people chipping-in in response to emails like this — so we are asking:

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Tomorrow marks a major milestone for our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
This deadline is a chance to show our strength — by growing our team, investing in outreach, and putting our message in front of voters across Virginia.

| Peter,

Tomorrow marks a major milestone for our campaign: the first deadline of the new fundraising quarter.

It's no coincidence that the same far-right billionaires who funded Trump are all in for my opponent. They know we have the momentum, and they know our victory would prove that Trump's influence is waning.

This deadline is a chance to show our strength — by growing our team, investing in outreach, and putting our message in front of voters across Virginia.

The more we raise, the stronger the case we can make that we're on track to win.

name: Leaders We Deserve
subject: Help us recruit the next progressive changemaker
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
It only takes a minute to share your ideas with us.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250715-1&t=1&akid=2388%2E587540%2EkE6hON)
Peter,
Young people are already leading movements, organizing their communities, and pushing for bold, progressive change. Now, it’s time to make sure they have the support they need to take the next step by running for office.
At **Leaders We Deserve** , we believe the future of our democracy depends on empowering young progressive candidates who know their communities and are ready to fight for them. And we’re not just talking about identifying the best candidates. We work alongside them to build winning campaigns from the ground up.
**Right now, we’re building our next slate of candidates and we need your help.**
Have you ever thought about running for office, Peter? Or do you know someone in your community who should? Whether it’s a school board seat, a state legislature, or Congress, we want to hear about the young leaders who are ready to shake up the status quo.
**👉[ Take a minute to fill out our quick candidate recruitment survey.](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/survey/em_ms_lwd_20250715_1?source=em20250715-2388&akid=2388%2E587540%2EkE6hON)**
**[Take the Survey »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/survey/em_ms_lwd_20250715_1?source=em20250715-2388&akid=2388%2E587540%2EkE6hON)**
We’re focused on finding and electing young progressives who reflect their communities and bring fresh ideas to the table. But it takes all of us to help surface the leaders who might not always raise their hands first.
So if you’ve ever dreamed of running yourself, or if you know someone whose voice we need in government, we hope you’ll share their name with us.
**Let’s build a future we believe in, together.**
In solidarity,
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250715-1&t=2&refcode2=2388_587540_kE6hON&akid=2388%2E587540%2EkE6hON)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=2388%2E587540%2EkE6hON)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2388%2E587540%2EkE6hON)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

name: Josh Harder
subject: Donald Trump and Jeffrey Epstein
body:
Lies on lies on lies.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111547700/557623859/-1860252395?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmE1NjcwYWQtZGU2MS1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=PctBwHswXbFjtaBrsQze5rOJW_CADZ8L0ZC9JBXQ7Ig=) | Peter, Today, I voted to release the Epstein files. And 212 Republicans voted to block it. I’ll be the first to say that the Epstein case doesn’t make the top 10 most pressing issues in our country. We’ve got a lot of fires right now. That being said, I do think it’s incredibly telling that a year ago Donald Trump, Pam Bondi and the entire Republican Party were railing about government conspiracies and cover-ups. And now that they’re in charge... not a peep. Here’s why: Trump and Attorney General Pam Bondi got caught lying. They promised to release the Epstein files, and now - for some unexplained reason - they’re backing down. [_**All I’m asking is that Trump do as he promised and release the files. Or admit he was lying. Will you add your name to my petition today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111547701/557623860/1921071629?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmE1NjcwYWQtZGU2MS1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=PctBwHswXbFjtaBrsQze5rOJW_CADZ8L0ZC9JBXQ7Ig=&emci=d60e69e7-ce61-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=ba5670ad-de61-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=6455652) [ADD YOUR NAME »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111547702/557623861/1921071629?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmE1NjcwYWQtZGU2MS1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=PctBwHswXbFjtaBrsQze5rOJW_CADZ8L0ZC9JBXQ7Ig=&emci=d60e69e7-ce61-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=ba5670ad-de61-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=6455652) Look, Peter: I understand why Trump’s base is upset. They believe their government is lying to them, and now their own leaders are part of the problem. While I wish they had this same energy when it comes to Trump slashing healthcare or handing out tax breaks to billionaires, I’ll admit: it’s a good thing Trump is being held accountable - at least for something. I’ll keep you updated as we learn more, – Josh
---

clean_body: Lies on lies on lies. | = | Peter, Today, I voted to release the Epstein files. And 212 Republicans voted to block it. I’ll be the first to say that the Epstein case doesn’t make the top 10 most pressing issues in our country. We’ve got a lot of fires right now. That being said, I do think it’s incredibly telling that a year ago Donald Trump, Pam Bondi and the entire Republican Party were railing about government conspiracies and cover-ups. And now that they’re in charge... not a peep. Here’s why: Trump and Attorney General Pam Bondi got caught lying. They promised to release the Epstein files, and now - for some unexplained reason - they’re backing down. Look, Peter: I understand why Trump’s base is upset. They believe their government is lying to them, and now their own leaders are part of the problem. While I wish they had this same energy when it comes to Trump slashing healthcare or handing out tax breaks to billionaires, I’ll admit: it’s a good thing Trump is being held accountable - at least for something. I’ll keep you updated as we learn more, – Josh *

name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: We’re halfway through July. Will you step up?
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250715-1429-foote&t=1001&akid=1429%2E342411%2EsfyGin ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

We’re halfway through July, and we just combed through our records. Here’s
where you stand:

Supporter Record for
Peter
Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com
July Donor?: No — not
yet!
2025 Total:
$0
Suggested donation: $3
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250715-movement.KzAOLt&refcode=em20250715-1429&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1429%2E342411%2EsfyGin ]Contribute $3

*This data reflects donations made online with this email address. If
you've made a previous contribution via check or with a different email
address, it may not be reflected above. Thank you for supporting our
Squad.

The Squad Victory Fund was built on a simple but powerful idea: We can
build a democracy that works for all of us through a people-powered
movement.

Alexandria, Ayanna, Ilhan, and Rashida are leading the charge in Congress
— pushing for Medicare for All, climate justice, racial equity, and a
democracy rooted in fairness and justice.

They don’t take a dime from corporate PACs. That means our movement relies
on grassroots supporters like you.

Every donation powers the organizing, outreach, and infrastructure it
takes to support the Squad’s efforts and grow our ranks with more
unapologetically progressive leaders nationwide.

And right now — with MAGA extremists trying to strip away our rights,
silence our voices, and undo everything we’ve fought for — we have to meet
the moment with strength.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250715-movement.KzAOLt&refcode=em20250715-1429&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=1429%2E342411%2EsfyGin ]Will you chip in your
first $3 today to protect our progress,
elect more progressive leaders, and build people power in every corner of
the country?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250715-movement.KzAOLt&refcode=em20250715-1429&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1429%2E342411%2EsfyGin ]Contribute ››

Thank you for standing with us,

The Squad Victory Fund

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1429%2E342411%2EsfyGin

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

Thank you again for being part of this movement! — it means more than you know.
I’m asking for just a few more seconds of YOUR time to help me build smarter and stronger.This quick form lets you share your ZIP code, birth year, and how (if at all) you might want to get involved — from volunteering to simply staying in the loop by text. It helps us focus our efforts and reach the right people, the right way.
**Fair is fair — I was born in 1978.**
Your info helps me see where support is coming from and where I need to grow.And just to be clear: **your information is safe with me.** I’ll never sell it, share it, or misuse it — ever.
Big updates are coming soon!
In Service to you,

**Justin Story**

name: Colin Allred
subject: Why I need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92189?t=6&akid=20638%2E878179%2ES7NJcd) Hi friend, it’s Colin Allred. I just launched my campaign for U.S. Senate here in Texas, I’d love to take just a moment to explain to you why I’m running again:

**I’m running for Senate to fight for working families, not tax cuts for billionaires.** I’ve heard and seen so much frustration about what’s going on in Washington right now. I know Texans are struggling, but Congress is more focused on cutting taxes for the wealthy than lowering prices for everyday families. That needs to change.

**I’m running for Senate to give every kid in Texas and across America the opportunities that were given to me.** I was raised by a single mom who often worked two jobs to make ends meet, and I’ve gone on to play in the NFL, graduate law school, work for President Obama, and make it to Congress.

**And I’m running for Senate because we have a real shot to win in Texas** – in fact, the first two polls in this race show me already in the lead!

But if we're going to win, we need to build on the historic grassroots movement we created last year. And that means I need you on this team from the very start – early momentum can make or break our campaign.

[That’s why my team and I set a critical goal of reaching 50,000 Founding Donors in the first days of my campaign and why I’m personally asking for your help. Can you rush $10 or more right now to be split between me and the Voter Protection Project? Together we can fight to bring real leadership back to Texas.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92190?t=7&akid=20638%2E878179%2ES7NJcd) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Colin Allred and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92191?t=8&akid=20638%2E878179%2ES7NJcd)

Grateful to have you in this fight with me,

– Colin Allred

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20638%2E878179%2ES7NJcd). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20638%2E878179%2ES7NJcd).**

subject: Zoe Lofgren always puts the American people first.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lofgren for Congress
body:
Now more than ever, we need to have Zoe’s back as she continues standing up to Trump and fighting for everyday Americans.| |

Donald Trump’s second presidency has been nothing short of chaotic and downright disgraceful to the American people.

My friend, Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren, is continuing to fight back for our democracy and the Constitution – _something Donald Trump knows nothing about.

_That’s why Trump-loyalists like Roger Stone have been making false attacks on Zoe’s character, name, and record to try to tarnish her reputation.

So now more than ever, we need to have Zoe’s back as she continues standing up to Trump and fighting for everyday Americans, while Trump only puts the interest of himself and his friends first.

name: Updates For Great Americans
subject: The history of capitalism and socialism
body:
Over the last century, free-market capitalism and socialism have provided the dominant interpretations, and conflicting visions, of political and economic freedom.

| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zpeb1tf44f090ompmer9piblot8nf5gpmk6sq1do_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cdhm0o36clh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,Over the last century, free-market capitalism and socialism have provided the dominant interpretations, and conflicting visions, of political and economic freedom. In the past few years, we’ve seen a growing trend among young Americans in favor of socialism and against capitalism.
---
| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zijsn7oks274s36irb9ufns5snekqef2aqiesqq8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cdhm0o36clh2bs)
---
| | **But do they truly understand the history and outcomes of socialism and capitalism?** This is _precisely_ why we put together this brand new eBook, **[_The History Of Socialism And Capitalism_](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zpbm9fq2qob0qsp277kf67dfq55c7j3dba42fpa8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cdhm0o36clh2bs)**[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z99o15tifigkcnmul6k3ri4h3el415n4t8ha3dso_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cdhm0o36clh2bs), from Hoover Institution senior fellows Niall Ferguson and Victor Davis Hanson. This eBook consists of two papers—one from each scholar—written in conjunction with _The Human Prosperity Project on Socialism and Free-Market Capitalism_. This project provides objective and scholarly analyses of free-market capitalism, socialism, and hybrid systems and provides evidence on the effectiveness of the various systems on outcomes that affect prosperity and well-being. I think you will find this new eBook particularly important and timely, given the recent interest in policies that are radical from a US historical perspective, some of which are advocated by political leaders. **[Simply click here to request your free copy of _The History Of Socialism And Capitalism_.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zv7qpo2k5drigtphrimlna0b2h1beg7nfpu77978_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cdhm0o36clh2bs)** Thanks,Greg Greg Stamps | Online DevelopmentHoover Institution | Stanford University

Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

What just happened today in a New York courtroom should send a chill down the spine of every America-First patriot.

_**We CANNOT let this stand.**_ _****_

name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: Tell Democratic leaders to "toughen up" against Trump
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Obama is right -- Democrats need to "toughen up" against Trump](https://default.salsalabs.org/T15f14dc7-1319-4063-8e33-f5a9fea4a897/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb83d1d90-2463-4573-9f31-8fddb52a120f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | President Obama had some "tough" love for Democrats at an event last Friday -- [it's time to 'toughen up" and fight back harder against Donald Trump](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7a60a6bb-9944-4047-bc6c-4711569eeeb1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9): _" I think it's going to require a little bit less navel-gazing and a little less whining and being in fetal positions," Obama said, "and it's going to require Democrats to just toughen up."_ _The Democrat said he is not "surprised by what Trump's done" nor by the lack of "guardrails within the Republican Party."_ _" What I have been surprised by is the degree to which I've seen people who, when I was president ... stood for all kinds of stuff, who seem like they're kind of cowed and intimidated and shrinking away from just asserting what they believe, or at least what they said they believe," Obama said, citing some law firms and universities that have seemingly bowed to Trump's pressure in recent months. ([source](https://default.salsalabs.org/T69bcef33-67b3-4224-83e1-2075e01ea42b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9))_ We couldn't agree more, and **we hope President Obama and other leaders will continue to speak out more** , and that ALL Democrats and others who care about our freedoms will "toughen up" and fight back hard to defend democracy. [**Add your name: Obama is right -- Democrats need to "toughen up" and fight back harder against Trump**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T650968ea-d370-4c9d-87d5-e5124f7fd0d7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

---

name: Troy Downing
subject: My life changed forever after 9/11.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
This is a message for Peter from Congressman Troy Downing.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)**Like millions of Americans, my life changed forever after 9/11.**
I left a quiet life with my wife and kids to put everything on the line for our country.
Before my first deployment to Afghanistan, my 10-year-old daughter looked me in the eye and asked if I was going to be killed.
**By the grace of God, I came home.**
But my service didn’t end there.
When COVID-19 hit, I converted my whiskey distillery into a hand sanitizer facility, distributing it for free to Montana families, hospitals, and first responders.
As a small business owner, I was fed up with government red tape. So, I ran for State Auditor, not because I wanted to be a politician but because I was sick of seeing our freedoms disappear.
I fought fraud, took down criminals, and protected Montana’s natural resources.
Now, I’m taking that same fight to Washington.
If you still believe in the America I’m fighting for, I’m asking for your help. It doesn’t matter to me how much you donate, $5, $10, $15... all I want is to build an alliance of Patriots who won’t back down from this fight.
[Can I count on your endorsement today?](https://trk.emails.troydowning._7qrI1QitsMws8_gpQNopw)[ENDORSE TROY DOWNING
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._hXoxsNfhDZubH5nVg)Our country is counting on Patriots like you, Peter.
Thank you for your support,
Troy DowningCombat Veteran in Congress| |

[U.S. inflation rose to 2.7% in June](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0MFuhCAYBOCnwRsGfwTrgUOTxtv20jQ9GpQf_bcoBtjd-PbN9tAX6HmSyXzzdRkvlgLty7vd0BQfxx0fOWApmMbrbUfafbCF4j4FzPmMt7SiHUGA4qLjjR6dpXCObeWMRwSUFZqmU6C1kFJUq0EH0KtGTnrWre3R9o123YSoQMweVEXm2Sa6RjdCKOhrh9aj8t51tlc9eNYKdFRiqq-R9rKiD2e8Y6rnuFXBrKUcmclXBgODwU7zU1Av8RkzGD4_GAx_Cp7wiKlwmxLdkZd02w7u0XFH2S4JkRebyHueKH9nBkMuMZ1MDuSYfGtAdlL1L7JKxh0PCoGy7lgrls1S-N1T_nXi3cBPAAAA___j9oeW), up from 2.4% in May, marking the second consecutive monthly increase, according to the Consumer Price Index report released Tuesday.

# Wednesday, July 16, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1945, the [first atomic bomb was detonated](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DHOozAQQOHTmA5kDIa4cJEGbZNUWW2JJngmTGTsyDZB3H61e4X_Au9J35_bfAP2HF532NAWinPAI3ssBdP83gNyIA-FY3h6zPmMe1oRZiWVruVYt8PsgP0595WzhKiwq9C2o1bDILtOVqtFo6CTdBkMalgIeg2jMe4CDqjXmiq2_2pybIdWSq1M4xAINZEbwWijSPQSHZeYmnfkUFYkf8YvpmaJW-XtWsoni-4q1CTUdBxHAxSOpQFqNvZCTddn3Ev9Ows1_eJcYjqFmh6JA5ezvu-LR0j1A3MRaqqSdZ-Dvec8jKKXrw3Y_x-VH-l8rfobAAD__6VierI) by the U.S. in the Trinity test near Alamogordo, New Mexico, ushering in the nuclear age. [In a remote corner of the Southwest](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOwyAQRL_G7ogwGJALimvc5dorLeJd4s1hiGCdKH9_Sn7hqtFopHnS-zkv50CJ8vU77Og5liXjsyVkxrrcjoyUYwpMJV8StvYqR90wLEoqI6QTg10gUHotYw8-IirUPfrBGWWt1Fr2m5dBm2mNiFpfwjhYdCtIZwdlMEqQtif_fpNusIOURk0nwBDRxAguTGZSsRslAnGpp1uhzBvG9CoPrKe17H3yG_O9dfqrU3On5nIwlFLbe-zUvIcsWnhgE09KILZSGzbR-Fh_BWWxH_AO3lDsBJBQlPhpgA0rd2ruq4f7k1KiZl03yuseKH3I_C9dD6_-AgAA__8u4oFu), a man found two wild horses trapped neck-deep in hardened mud. With no cell signal and no one around, he dug them out by hand—likely saving their lives, as we report below. Have you ever found yourself the only one who could help—ready or not? Reply to this email to let us know. Invest in today's sponsor, [M2i Minerals Metals Initiatives,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLuu4yAQQL8Gd7YwGLALipWu0t1tt0Q4DPZEPCzAifL3K0er_YHbnjOaGZ0_3-bbYsC0_bYRdPPZJHjVAK1BMY8zASYfbMOc1gC1vvNZdrCGUSZ6qvpRGmcxvM3UOe0BGPAO9KgEk5JyTrtdi9WNTFKQbnIzg3kWSsiZK6B24mxeO9TXNqpGOVIq2DI4sB6E907ZRSzMk4mCw5bL8MiY2g4-vPMTynDPsQt6b-2ohP8i7EbYDdMTahsiw2ELebXhwvx2tmhqPssdCP-CaDEQJi8YweEZCf86LLr-sKUlKHXH45-_23hY3NJn4r8cZ9pzwc0nwZVjWkYhqZqnrmh3vDAErFKRiW7Xrc-n7Ud5n5r9DQAA__-I-Y5p) which is working to strengthen the U.S. metals and materials supply chain.

## June Inflation Rises
[U.S. inflation rose to 2.7% in June](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0MFuhCAYBOCnwRsGfwTrgUOTxtv20jQ9GpQf_bcoBtjd-PbN9tAX6HmSyXzzdRkvlgLty7vd0BQfxx0fOWApmMbrbUfafbCF4j4FzPmMt7SiHUGA4qLjjR6dpXCObeWMRwSUFZqmU6C1kFJUq0EH0KtGTnrWre3R9o123YSoQMweVEXm2Sa6RjdCKOhrh9aj8t51tlc9eNYKdFRiqq-R9rKiD2e8Y6rnuFXBrKUcmclXBgODwU7zU1Av8RkzGD4_GAx_Cp7wiKlwmxLdkZd02w7u0XFH2S4JkRebyHueKH9nBkMuMZ1MDuSYfGtAdlL1L7JKxh0PCoGy7lgrls1S-N1T_nXi3cBPAAAA___j9oeW), up from 2.4% in May, marking the second consecutive monthly increase, according to the Consumer Price Index report released Tuesday. Economists cited early signs of tariff-driven price hikes, particularly in imported goods, as President Trump’s trade measures begin to ripple through the economy. The data prompted a [modest market response](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOszAQBOCnMR3IGGz_FC7-hi7XXokWvA5OFjvCmyDe_sS9wnUjjfSNNN-36QaRYrp_wYaOQ54SHoWQGffp8U4YUyDgmNNMWMqZ3_uKMCmpdC1t3ZrJQ6Rz6ivvAqLCrkLXWq2MkV0nq9XpZTZtMEEPBgcw3TJr_c_20hoIQzf7KrpLk7Y1rZRaDY1HCKhD8BYGPaggeok-ct6bR46JVwx05g_uzZK3itzK_Cqi-y_UKNR4HEezpHm5SqHGixZqlFaosb1S4bw86w32J3LN2cNZU_xg_X55YGxW3qjanX8dkSgWY0Uv7xtE-h3jPz30ceonAAD__zSsekM), with the Dow falling over 400 points and the S&P 500 slipping 0.4%. Tech stocks held firm, as the Nasdaq closed at a record high following a 4% gain in Nvidia, boosted by news it can resume chip sales to China.
## Deadly Floods Slam Northeast Cities
At least two people died in Plainfield, New Jersey, after [flash flooding swept their car into Cedar Brook](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGOwyAQRU-DOyI8BhMXFNu4y7ZbWpMwxEQELMCxfPsVe4XtRnqap___z225oQ8-Pr_xTaa6tEQ6SqBaKS-vPZKPLmD1Kd4DlXKmPa-ECwhQXGjej4tFH85FdtY4IqChI9NrBeMohkF0qxkGrSWAwumqJOL9KkkIO8rHlXqrJtd502xC92MvhILpYgkdKeesxklN4JgUZH1N-fJKPtaVXDjTh_Llkd5dMGutW2HDF4OZwRzPLZXaEIO5iRnMQjOY-3bthbd-DfH44pmKtxRr4ZbQcnSVMn9g5uWgrfJ94z5yF7Cs3IWUbHvssrHb4UPwZdRMiucbffiLUv-138fAbwAAAP__PDSDyA) during a record-setting storm that inundated parts of New Jersey, New York, Pennsylvania, and Virginia Monday night. New York City logged 2.64 inches of rain in Central Park—its wettest July 14 on record—as subway stations and highways flooded, disrupting commutes and rail lines. See a [video from an NYC subway station here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGO8yAQBOCnwV2s9QLmp6D4G3e59kqEwxJvRCCySSy__cn3CteNNNInzXxf_TVw5nL_Ck9yLVVfaN8ytUarf7wLcUk5NK5lzrRtR32vCwWPgPoC5jKMPgbOh1dddIkISXbkBqNxHEFK6BanrdFhJsQ5KVD_LOkUjYpglQzRGNmxOzUwwzgAaLR9pJBIpxRNsNpiEgoocqtr_6hc2kIpH_VDa3-rzy67pbXXJuR_gZPAad_3fp5vZydwOscInD4cqZ7hBlmhtnf5iLVbXXztnDNvoxEK7s_A-ddsfzri4_AnAAD___AEccg). [States of emergency were declared](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDHOozAQRk8D3SBjDISCYpt02XZLNMTj4OxgR_YkXm6_Ilf4uyd90ie99-e23NCzD4_fuNMsLi6BSmYSobQ834F8cIziY1iZcj7iO22Ei1a6BzVCOywWPR-Lqe3siDR1Nc3t2OthUF2n6m1ux9ZczHo3Cq0yg14vqzbTqiZ7X203DrWfzzc1tkOrVK-nxhI66p2zI079pF1lFFkvMTXP6INs5PiIH0rNPe41z5vIK1fdr0pfK30tpTQHbjGea6Wvp06lr44xb-A4RuvDA3yAQAWelDIdXzxi-gtM-KEMKCdlAQ2W0EJ-rwUPyPINkcF5ZrJQvGxQUCgBZthjIkjoA9C_F92FLLRG9W3fXaZmk53rNNtX8cw-D2Nl1GNHz18H-VH4z6z_BwAA___y75tw) across the region, with rainfall topping 6 inches in some areas and more storms expected through Thursday. Emergency crews responded to dozens of water rescues across Pennsylvania and New Jersey.
## Garbage Strike Hits Coast to Coast
The Teamsters [strike against Republic Services, the nation's second-largest waste disposal](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOozAURb_GdCBjwIbCxTZ02XZL9DDP4WWNHdkvQczXjzK_MP3VPTrn3225AQWK979woGWflohnCciMeXm8IlL0AZhSXAOWcqVX3hEWJdVQS1O3etmAwrX01WY9osKuQtuaQWktu05Wu12Vc6NZp25snfMwaj1q2Xdo-hVW48eK7OdNmla3Ug5qajYEj4P3m4FpmJQXvcSNOOXmkSjyjj5c6Y25cemogt2Zn0V0f4SahZrP82xOKIycNrgOuMMXRfxMhZo_bkLNjHAUxlxqLA4CMNYZn681kKsL5jc5LHXhTP9RqLnKdnueFAIVbUQv7wdQ-GHzr4K9rfoOAAD__-kzg3g) company, has spread far beyond Boston, with roughly 2,000 workers now either on strike or refusing to cross picket lines, disrupting trash collection across the mid-Atlantic, Midwest, and West Coast, including L.A., the Bay Area, Seattle suburbs, and Ohio landfills. Trash is piling up in affected regions--dumpsters are overflowing, rodents are becoming an issue, and some municipalities have even called the strike [a public health emergency](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0b2OnTAQBeCnMZ2vjPlbCoobRUiJtGlSpESDPQZvjI08wyLePuJKeYKtv9FI55w_79M7-ODj8gs2HNilKeJJAZkxTx9HRB9dAPYpzgGJrnTkFWHSSjdSdbJsJws-XFNd2MEhaqwKHMqu0W2rqkoV61C-dc6ZurJv2sxN29re1J3S81yayplaF364v6mubEulGt0_LILDxjnbQd_02olaofWc8uMj-cgrunClT8wPk7YiDCvzTqJ6Cj0KPZ7n-dgo3ib0iFEeJPS4H3PwRhI45EtCtBI3zAtG4_H2FSHw-oL_NwEz37QBEZj1IGQmyRlolcTZ_0VpUmQfDyQJJBfIMywodx-Q5LELPUKWz2f5Y-z3n6Iak_FWVN-_3WXjSb8x70Ue7H76EDy1najVsoEPr1j8pS0-B_0vAAD__04forc). The union demands that the Republic match wages and benefits offered by competitors, especially Capitol Waste Services. The company offers a raise (about 43% over five years) but [won't budge on matching rival pay scales](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LHSoyAUBeCnwU4HrwKxoNjGLttu6SBc4s0iZIDo5O3_Ma_w92fOme_8uy93Q4Hi46_ZUVeflohnCVgr5uX5jkjRB1MpxTVgKZ_0zhuaBTiIlqu2l4szFD7L2DjtEQGHBnWvBEjJh4E3m-aWD9bfVj6qEcWKAqyQVpqbk8q5YWhIX21c9bLnXMDUOTQehfdOmUlM4NnI0VFNuXsminVDHz7pwNzZtDdBb7W-Chv-MJgZzOd5dqcpFR0deCUYzBeJwVzR7KViLm3G13sNZNuC-SCLpY1fowltqZn-I4P5MtwmBnOTtXudFAIVqdjIH7uh8N2uvzrs0PATAAD__w_GgZg). The third mandated [meeting with a federal mediator](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGStCAUBODTYKaFDxENCP7EbP50QwvlMb5ZlCnAobz9lnuFzTrqr7q_HvPDkKfj-d_sqLML84ElecwZ4_w6D6TDeZMpHIvHlK5wxg3NDBxkzVXd9rM15K-5q6x2iICiQt0qCX3PheDVpltljFil7Tl2blycWtQoHXAxDIMbVlGRvtu4avuWcwljY9E4lM5ZZUY5gmMdR0s5xOYV6MgbOn-FD8ZmDXvl9ZbzOzHxj8HEYCqlNGU5YxPik8F0r2Ew3QKDiSsGU3uniO9z8bTWCeOHVkx1RrOnjDHVKUf6xtqbkk7KVdT2Xch7Sr1iHX_uhvwvnf_010fDTwAAAP__cV6AGw) was scheduled for Tuesday, but negotiations remain tense and trash delays persist.

Invest in today's sponsor, which is working to strengthen the U.S. metals and materials supply chain. | June Inflation Rises , up from 2.4% in May, marking the second consecutive monthly increase, according to the Consumer Price Index report released Tuesday. Economists cited early signs of tariff-driven price hikes, particularly in imported goods, as President Trump’s trade measures begin to ripple through the economy. The data prompted a , with the Dow falling over 400 points and the S&P 500 slipping 0.4%. Tech stocks held firm, as the Nasdaq closed at a record high following a 4% gain in Nvidia, boosted by news it can resume chip sales to China. Deadly Floods Slam Northeast Cities At least two people died in Plainfield, New Jersey, after during a record-setting storm that inundated parts of New Jersey, New York, Pennsylvania, and Virginia Monday night. New York City logged 2.64 inches of rain in Central Park—its wettest July 14 on record—as subway stations and highways flooded, disrupting commutes and rail lines. See a . across the region, with rainfall topping 6 inches in some areas and more storms expected through Thursday. Emergency crews responded to dozens of water rescues across Pennsylvania and New Jersey. Garbage Strike Hits Coast to Coast The Teamsters company, has spread far beyond Boston, with roughly 2,000 workers now either on strike or refusing to cross picket lines, disrupting trash collection across the mid-Atlantic, Midwest, and West Coast, including L.A., the Bay Area, Seattle suburbs, and Ohio landfills. Trash is piling up in affected regions--dumpsters are overflowing, rodents are becoming an issue, and some municipalities have even called the strike . The union demands that the Republic match wages and benefits offered by competitors, especially Capitol Waste Services. The company offers a raise (about 43% over five years) but . The third mandated was scheduled for Tuesday, but negotiations remain tense and trash delays persist. President Donald Trump said Tuesday he wants Texas lawmakers to redraw the state’s congressional districts so that [five Republicans are added](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LuO6yAQxvGnsTsswFzsguI06XLaLS0I43i0-CKYhOTtV3G39fajv-b3fV2nq8eE2_2_X8HRa96nDWpJQAR5ovxYj-NRFigZIhbKeCPc7vMkudSMWybMFD2m96Ta6AKPo2jBCaulMb0xtl1cHCwEb6OHwQeudC8gqsELraUZQphbdJ8Yt8IIwQUX3Whs0L1Sg_Kz0Co0ikNE2nNHCxC8fJnTe39C7m772ia3EB2l6f818tLIS621-xAqwPfnoJGXuG8-RXZq2Blgy_4owDIcGQps5AmfUNgvJFsxEuS1MMmlYZKPYy_6Nrt4VEwJi7GN4vfVYzofob_N93TyJwAA___b7YdQ) to its congressional delegation, which currently consists of 25 Republicans and 12 Democrats. A Democrat-leaning Houston district has been without representation since the death of U.S. Rep. Sylvester Turner in March.

## Long Search for Flood Victims Ahead
During a Monday news conference in Leander, Gov. Greg Abbott said that [97 people are missing](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGypCwQhZ8Gs56iGYQxMPgTs_unG1oojcNeFAva8fr2W-4rbPxVne-c8-tr_HIxxW35363U80_I40ZnTcRMZeRyrPt-1DfVQj5WLnHmuC1hVFK1IC2gGb2L6Rp14_tJ-g4b6tG2ypinMbZ596adrXcOJ28NvnynlUHZaXyRwfCSvon9HSYtGkSJEh-dsVP71PqlXcBWT0JL8pFzefCbmH5cDenKHyqPOa9N6t_MexXP_4QahBrO83x8V8c3FGq41wg1pDy7JNRwq4QapBVqQH3zY52oQA6wxlrjtsBOeU8EPp8bhJJXQIPAGToLcYNvKgXmfGx8gQtMBX4f6QINIeXsKyz5A26aMjNUd93qpvR-P2NKsRortFxWF9Pf6vxvh3969ScAAP__nWeUjA) in Kerr County from the deadly July 4 flash floods, down from the 161 reported last week. He added that [25 states](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2uozAQhZ8GOiP_YW4KF9vQZdstkcEDWDIeyx5I8varJI9w6_nm0znn3326uxBD2v66Ayw9V5wSPGoEIigTlfPI-aw71AI-VCphoZC2dZJc9owPTJjJuxBfk269nbm_iRasGHppjDJmaHerxKzk7LnQixtA_azqprnnSoNevZauDfYt44MwQnDBRXczw9wrrX-0W0Wv50Zz8IGwdLQDwdPVNb7wgtIteLTR7kS5NupPI8dGjhte3QfqNrwaOb7rNHLMWOl7hZKwMDfPSMQIz1LZGhE98-5wG7Bc8AoeKjuzdwQME_v4WIGaMVVghKzCBQW-jyFtLCS2QKLi4hdui_X5EWIM1QyN5tvhQvzkpd-tfFn5PwAA__9M05aL) have provided resources and personnel to give aid and search for victims. Local officials have said it could take up to six months to locate all the victims. "_We’ve heard accounts of trailer after trailer after trailer being swept into the river with families in them. Can’t find the trailers_ ," Kerr County Judge Rob Kelly [said Monday](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDvOpDAQhE8DGaP2A3sIHGwy2b_phsim29CSecg287j9irnCH5ZKVar6_v2MP54Tb_Nfv5Kr77iPG71KolopjzWf63GcZaGSCbnUzFPlbY6jBNl3YDthRvScPqNu0QXAQbTkhO2lMcoY2y6uJw1aAAD6gIFQEoUpeotSokGlWnZXGVhhhAAB4jYYG3ql9V37KHodGg2EXPd8qwtVevsS02d_Ur5N-9omt9R6lEb9aeSjkQ9_XAcu6xK58pSokY9vrotp35G3uZtPjz6dB3WZn5S7Qj5PS2d6ZckI8GDvA3mCXtwHHAKqgCqSbLPD48UpcTG20TCvntN3Rv0dvKeT_wMAAP__q4eESg). An AI-powered handheld sonar device developed by startup AquaEye is being used to [help search teams](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkb2SnTAMhZ8GOt2xjYFLQZGGbtOmZPwjXzTri4ktYHn7DJu8QTodaXTmk86vj_nDUKT19dO8ceSvkOYVzxKRGfPMeX9v214WLBk9Fc7kmNZXmJVQLYgeZDd7Q_Gade1HK_wgaxxl36qua7qur5dRSD0EqaxVSjZPr4PSQ4PKusZa20hb03ibiV52Ugop5GPoets2Wj-1CbLVttICPXHKD16Q8cuUEK90YH649K7juDBvpWp-VGqq1HSe5-MT19Le00pNJjO5iJWa7sMqNRU2fMtvJ_jX_CtCTMlXavrEnMGlfeUL7vqgGBFeu_Em7htCpgPzvQoeD3IIjG5ZU0yvCwqa7BbI6G7ECxaMG2TjTYaDClmKxBeY37vB68ZQfQN9eCphtQF8CgTtBwnWaQMhtLrVrRKhH-o8-u2kGKl0faXF620ofn-A_y-3Y1R_AgAA__-iIK-J). "_It will scan the area of a football field in a minute and pinpoint the location of a victim_ ," said founder and CEO Carlyn Loncaric. Meanwhile, a statement from the family of Camp Mystic co-owner Dick Eastland, who died trying to rescue campers, revealed that the decision to evacuate the camp was [delayed for at least 45 minutes](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu4yAQRb8GdxMBxvBSuNjG3dt2S4vAEI-EwYJx8vL3K-8vbDeaIx3de_98r9-eMpXnb7_jzD-prgXfPSMztpXbuR_H2TfsDSN1bhSYyjOtWuoJpANl1-gpf1YzxPkh410NOCs3aWtHa92wzS7GFKPDcUoPZZI32k5fAZWWysl7HAeaL5l0yiollVS3u3WPaTTmy_ikJvMQRmIkru3GGzL--J7yp76w3ULdhzxvzEcX4y-hF6GX8jlq5wsJvVxmoRfphF7UdZ0drn5CL8HvB-yfzhQgVKjvgg3w5cPpGSNcGFsHM8FO5WTs4BNjg4YB6UXlCZkSAm8NPWO5Hin7vkHKtcYOPmNjoZehzfF4U87UrRNGPndP-V9y_r-9X7P-GwAA___MoZa0) after a flood warning alert was received.
## Trump Weighs in on Texas Redistricting
President Donald Trump said Tuesday he wants Texas lawmakers to redraw the state’s congressional districts so that [five Republicans are added](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LuO6yAQxvGnsTsswFzsguI06XLaLS0I43i0-CKYhOTtV3G39fajv-b3fV2nq8eE2_2_X8HRa96nDWpJQAR5ovxYj-NRFigZIhbKeCPc7vMkudSMWybMFD2m96Ta6AKPo2jBCaulMb0xtl1cHCwEb6OHwQeudC8gqsELraUZQphbdJ8Yt8IIwQUX3Whs0L1Sg_Kz0Co0ikNE2nNHCxC8fJnTe39C7m772ia3EB2l6f818tLIS621-xAqwPfnoJGXuG8-RXZq2Blgy_4owDIcGQps5AmfUNgvJFsxEuS1MMmlYZKPYy_6Nrt4VEwJi7GN4vfVYzofob_N93TyJwAA___b7YdQ) to its congressional delegation, which currently consists of 25 Republicans and 12 Democrats. A Democrat-leaning Houston district has been without representation since the death of U.S. Rep. Sylvester Turner in March. The move could increase the GOP’s odds of [retaining control of the U.S. House](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu4yAQRb8Gd1iAMSQFxTbusu2WFobBHi02CEic_P2T8wuvm2J0zz3332N-WIx4rH_tDqa9Q5oPOGuE1qDMrTz3nJ91g1rAY20FXcNjDbNgYqRMU65mbzF-Ztl5szB_5x0Yrkeh1KCU7jbjNTgFSxjZTfL7IJfgvNKg_DLowSndobnCmOaKc8YZ7-9KL-Mg5U3awEe5EMnAY0ulbxs0eNsa4ie9oPQu7V00W2u5kuEPERMR03mefU4RG7p0PRAxXUZETBeGiIlpIiZ-XV89GvAFtIJtNKP7_8y0gC_2pF8SdelYC9SK6bCR7jZTxuQoB8a7Ynw-MUasShPJ1t1i_FZqvxvyZcRPAAAA___sc4eT) in next year's midterm elections. Currently, Republicans hold a 220-213 advantage in the House. Gov. Greg Abbott has added redistricting to the special session agenda after the Department of Justice [identified](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO3CAQhp8Gd6xmAINdUKRxd2lTWhjGu6OwtgXs-u7tI1-a9Knm14z0ab7_18f8ETjzdv8ZnuTb57rPG501U2tU5lZez-N41QfVQolrKxwbb_d1VqB6CU6inVPg_DWbLvkF0ogdeXS9slZb67qHHzQ44yLYAW3SanBJOxi1G3FxCbDv2F8wcGgRAQFvo3VLr40ZTFixN4swQInbXm7tQY0-Q13z1_6mcov7s8v-0dpRhf4h1CTUdJ7n7ff7RddRqCmUxjGTUNPlJdR07Jkbxyt-s2Sh47VkjmG78j-WMu7bvVCtvG8hy3pQ5Gv-3Qg1KTvKERREHbVcIfTS2IByUANIVAQ9rj0ltF3x6Tg5Z67WCQP3Z-D8_Xz7v8rfXv0JAAD__w9ulIc) four "coalition districts" it deemed "unconstitutional racial gerrymanders." A new map would likely add Republican-leaning voters to these districts, though some analysts believe that could turn safe Republican seats into competitive districts. "Just a very simple redrawing. We pick up five seats," [Trump said](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLvO4yAUhJ8Gd1iAucQFxTbusu2W1ok52Ej4IjiJk7dfOd1f_90Uo2_0zb_7eIeU0zb_hRU9veM-bnjWjERYRirP9TiedcFaMKRKJU2UtjmOSijDhePSjgFS_oy6Cf4hQi8b9NIZZW1nrWsWr25TbzoIIkoDLmgDGN0NOjcZmEQvmuQvmHDSSimkkG1v3cN0Wt80RGn0g2mBIdFeWlqQ8A015s_-wtJO-9pkvxAdlXV_mBqYGs7zbOP-1pfGVWBquCJTw9eGn7BR5TG9kFcE4jOkjdNS9ue88C-d_3Btig_HmXJO1TqmxbxCyt9l-t1fL6_-BwAA___GeoKC). The Texas Democratic Party has criticized the effort, saying "only losers change the rules in the middle of the game."
## Austin Releasing Grass-Eating Carp
The city of Austin is [releasing 350 sterile grass carp](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGupDAQBNDTmMwjbIwNAcEmZH_TDVFjt6H1PQbZPfDn9qvZK2xWUkklvfrztXwBJcrbb3jixD_xWDLeNSEzloXL63mer7pjLRiociHPlLe46Fb3snVS2SUApfdimjCtbRhVg5Nyvba2s9Y1--TR46B7h27stAeD46jMEIbV2hDXTjU0fcZap6xSrWrVY7Ru7TtjBgNR9WYVpsVAfJQH78j4AzWm93Fhefjj2aRpZz6r6H4JPQs93_f9-L5e-CmFnqEw-YRCzx-X0HM6PCSh58pYKKHcCtQqPZRTJvhGCa_KlOX-DoVSArmV4-ZdUr6g0oUyH1lm4E88E2QWetZ2lKCs6yAoGWw00sAwyDG6UZquc97quA6omzKF86aUqFonTLs9gdI_BP_f9dek_wYAAP__rQ6YxQ) into Lake Austin to control the growth of hydrilla, an invasive aquatic plant covering 74 acres—about 5% of the lake—particularly in coves and backwaters. Hydrilla is a fast-growing plant native to Asia that was [introduced to North America](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGO4yAUheGnwV0swBiSgmKlXWubbLmjqdDFXNtI2EZwYydvP8q8wvSfzpH-j7u7Q0xxm__Bipae0-42PGtCIiyOymPN-VEXrAVDrFTiSHGbJye57C_cXIR2AWJ6OdUE63m4iQatML3UutPaNIv1nfHjFcSIV9HfUCCMCkELBV72HrCJ9j3GjdBCcMFFe9PG951SVwWT6JVnimOItJeWFiR8Qp3Saz-wtOO-NskuRLmy7heTA5PDeZ7tN4rbATUeWNu9zEwOOcFGLgCBh4pMDgEJYmrzklk31Nfq98S6338____pmmJDPmNKsWrDFJ_Xt3zf0c8iHVZ-BQAA__-VKH3i) in the 1950s via the aquarium trade. It can [obstruct waterways](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGupDAQRE9jMo9sA_YQONiE7G-6IWpwA61vDLJ7YOb2K3aP8OMqleq9P1_DF1CktPyGDT2_531IeJWIzJgHzq_tOF5lxZIxUOFME1Na5sEo00rlpLZDAIqfoamCH1XodIVeu9ZYW1vrqtVPzgQAeNa6q4MKrTaTnax9OnRda-uxIn-PKaet1kor_eisG9u6aZ4NzLptRtEoDMR7fvCKjG8oc_zsJ-bHtG9V9CvzUUT9S5hemP66rsf3G9IdCtPfNML0cZ8gCtPDqzAlYfrCmCminKmsknc5oswYEQoGSUlG-Eb5vywZ8oI3tqR0QqET5REhsVzyfvEqTF9lH46LYqRinWjUsgHFf-_4Z05Pb_4GAAD__wP6jkk), cause flooding, and hinder navigation for boaters and swimmers. The plant was first spotted in Lake Austin in 1999, and it covered [nearly a third of the lake](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDvSnDAQhE8Dmbb0QvoJFDghW6cOqQENMLZAlDTs4_autX0Dx_11d9X34z7egRId63fYMfBryeOBz5qQGcvI5drP86ob1oKRKheamY51GbXUnZBeKDdGoPQebRvDJGOvWgzKd9o545xvt2Dk1-Rs58CZJXZKmzhZ52GKBrve9n1L4TMmvXJKSSXVrXd-6oy1XxYW1dmpsRIjcS433pDxBXVJ7_zAcpvz3qawMZ-1Md8aPTR6gKsyHT_zVQ5IH6LRQ-VcCGujB-etVEpqI_5ygg4uOV4zVrEWqFXMUE7BWcz5kySxvWOhlEDUsyBEQYdI8Av_9dsS4vmklKg631i57kB_Xlv-P5uPoH8HAAD__3HDi-Y) by 2012. Since 2003, sterile carp have been introduced multiple times, including 56,700 fish in 2021, leading to the destruction of nearly all the lake’s vegetation.

New episodes drop daily—watch on YouTube or listen on Spotify and Apple Podcasts, all in under 15 minutes. | | Long Search for Flood Victims Ahead During a Monday news conference in Leander, Gov. Greg Abbott said that in Kerr County from the deadly July 4 flash floods, down from the 161 reported last week. He added that have provided resources and personnel to give aid and search for victims. Local officials have said it could take up to six months to locate all the victims. "We’ve heard accounts of trailer after trailer after trailer being swept into the river with families in them. Can’t find the trailers ," Kerr County Judge Rob Kelly . An AI-powered handheld sonar device developed by startup AquaEye is being used to . "It will scan the area of a football field in a minute and pinpoint the location of a victim ," said founder and CEO Carlyn Loncaric. Meanwhile, a statement from the family of Camp Mystic co-owner Dick Eastland, who died trying to rescue campers, revealed that the decision to evacuate the camp was after a flood warning alert was received. Trump Weighs in on Texas Redistricting President Donald Trump said Tuesday he wants Texas lawmakers to redraw the state’s congressional districts so that to its congressional delegation, which currently consists of 25 Republicans and 12 Democrats. A Democrat-leaning Houston district has been without representation since the death of U.S. Rep. Sylvester Turner in March. The move could increase the GOP’s odds of in next year's midterm elections. Currently, Republicans hold a 220-213 advantage in the House. Gov. Greg Abbott has added redistricting to the special session agenda after the Department of Justice four "coalition districts" it deemed "unconstitutional racial gerrymanders." A new map would likely add Republican-leaning voters to these districts, though some analysts believe that could turn safe Republican seats into competitive districts. "Just a very simple redrawing. We pick up five seats," . The Texas Democratic Party has criticized the effort, saying "only losers change the rules in the middle of the game." Austin Releasing Grass-Eating Carp The city of Austin is into Lake Austin to control the growth of hydrilla, an invasive aquatic plant covering 74 acres—about 5% of the lake—particularly in coves and backwaters. Hydrilla is a fast-growing plant native to Asia that was in the 1950s via the aquarium trade. It can , cause flooding, and hinder navigation for boaters and swimmers. The plant was first spotted in Lake Austin in 1999, and it covered by 2012. Since 2003, sterile carp have been introduced multiple times, including 56,700 fish in 2021, leading to the destruction of nearly all the lake’s vegetation. | Flying together with our sponsor Designed to curb appetite, regulate blood sugar, and promote sustainable fat loss, MedVi’s doctor-prescribed treatment is a science-backed way to take control of your health. | ➤ Dallas: Democratic State Sen. body:
#
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/dee22b34-2609-45b0-bebf-8edf1d3c535e?source_code=MAWCO66836&utm_term=lrm-active]

radical Left.

GEN Z IS BREAKING FREE FROM THE LEFT!

early. They come fired up. They come ready to stand for faith,
freedom, and America.

Waving flags... Chanting _“USA!”_... Cheering LOUD AND PROUD for
God and country!

And it’s NOT just happening at campuses in “Red” states like
Florida, or Tennessee, or Idaho...

IT’S HAPPENING IN “BLUE” STATES, TOO! ILLINOIS. WASHINGTON. EVEN
CALIFORNIA!

#
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/dee22b34-2609-45b0-bebf-8edf1d3c535e?source_code=MAWCO66836&utm_term=lrm-active]

PATRIOT, THIS IS A FULL-BLOWN CULTURAL REVOLUTION. IT’S HAPPENING
NOW. AND IT’S EVERYWHERE.

THIS is exactly what I dreamed about when I founded Turning Point USA.
This is THE MOMENT I hoped for when I wrote my latest book — _RIGHT
WING REVOLUTION._

AND FRIEND, I WANT TO SEND YOU A FREE HARDCOVER COPY!

ALL I ASK IN RETURN IS THAT YOU CHIP IN A GIFT OF ANY AMOUNT TO HELP
TURNING POINT USA REACH EVEN MORE YOUNG PEOPLE AND FUEL OUR
UNSTOPPABLE MOVEMENT.
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/dee22b34-2609-45b0-bebf-8edf1d3c535e?source_code=MAWCO66836&utm_term=lrm-active]

MAKE MY GIFT & CLAIM MY FREE BOOK
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/dee22b34-2609-45b0-bebf-8edf1d3c535e?source_code=MAWCO66836&utm_term=lrm-active]

This isn’t a think tank policy read... It’s a BATTLE PLAN for the
fight we’re in right now...

A roadmap for how we WIN... And DEFEAT the radical Left _once and for
all_ in the culture war.

#
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/dee22b34-2609-45b0-bebf-8edf1d3c535e?source_code=MAWCO66836&utm_term=lrm-active]

THIS IS TRULY THE MOMENT THE LEFT HAS FEARED!

For YEARS, they worked to control the minds of our youth. They built
an empire of indoctrination—on campuses, in the media, and in pop
culture.

And they almost got away with it. But they made one mistake...

They assumed young people would never question what they were told.

Then we showed up.

WE WALKED ONTO THEIR CAMPUSES, INTO THEIR CLASSROOMS, INTO THEIR
SO-CALLED “SAFE SPACES” AND WE STARTED TO ASK QUESTIONS, HAVE
ACTUAL CONVERSATIONS, AND HOLD ONE-ON-ONE DEBATES...

And just like that, the Left’s entire narrative is now CRUMBLING.

This is why the crowds are growing... This is why the energy is
exploding...

This is why the Left is _LOSING_.

#
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/dee22b34-2609-45b0-bebf-8edf1d3c535e?source_code=MAWCO66836&utm_term=lrm-active]

_But friend, it’s up to patriots like you and me to keep the
momentum going until we CRACK every last stronghold of the Left!_

We can’t take our foot off the gas, not even for a second.

THAT’S WHY I WANT TO GET MY BOOK IN THE HANDS OF AS MANY AMERICANS

FOR FREE.

ALL YOU HAVE TO DO IS MAKE A DONATION OF ANY AMOUNT TO TURNING POINT

[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/dee22b34-2609-45b0-bebf-8edf1d3c535e?source_code=MAWCO66836&utm_term=lrm-active]

MAKE MY GIFT & CLAIM MY FREE BOOK
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/dee22b34-2609-45b0-bebf-8edf1d3c535e?source_code=MAWCO66836&utm_term=lrm-active]

Turning Point USA’s campus events aren’t just about big crowds.
It’s about what happens AFTER these events.

Students who have never questioned the propaganda they’ve been
fed... _suddenly start to think for themselves and push back._

Students who have been silent for fear of being canceled _finally find
the courage to speak up._

Students who thought they were alone in their beliefs _realize
they’re NOT._

And just like that... _THE CULTURE BEGINS TO CHANGE._

This is the battle we are in... Not just for an election. Not just for
one issue.

For the SOUL of the next generation. And we are WINNING!

But this only continues if you and I keep fighting.

THERE ARE STILL MILLIONS OF YOUNG PEOPLE WHO HAVE NEVER HEARD THE
TRUTH... COUNTLESS CAMPUSES WE NEED TO VISIT AND PEOPLE WE NEED TO

AND WHEN YOU MAKE YOUR GIFT OF ANY AMOUNT TODAY TO CLAIM YOUR FREE

[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/dee22b34-2609-45b0-bebf-8edf1d3c535e?source_code=MAWCO66836&utm_term=lrm-active]

YES, CHARLIE! SEND ME MY FREE BOOK!
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/dee22b34-2609-45b0-bebf-8edf1d3c535e?source_code=MAWCO66836&utm_term=lrm-active]

Friend, we have the Left on the ropes. It’s a once-in-a-lifetime

The next generation is choosing America — and with your help, we

SO PLEASE, MAKE YOUR MOST GENEROUS GIFT TODAY TO TURNING POINT
USA AND I’LL SEND YOU A FREE HARDCOVER COPY OF _RIGHT WING
REVOLUTION_ AS A PERSONAL THANK YOU.
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/dee22b34-2609-45b0-bebf-8edf1d3c535e?source_code=MAWCO66836&utm_term=lrm-active]

This is our moment. Let’s seize it. Let’s WIN it. Let’s make
history — together.

For America,

Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO
Turning Point USA

[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/dee22b34-2609-45b0-bebf-8edf1d3c535e?source_code=MAWCO66836&utm_term=lrm-active]

P.S. Every stop on my latest campus tour has been bigger than the last

One thing is clear... _the American Comeback is ALIVE and WELL!_

We are reaching young people at a scale no one thought was possible.

name: The Maine Wire
subject: Senate Passes White House Plan to Cut $9 Billion in Federal Spending by a Whisker – Collins Votes Against
body:
Here's the latest breaking news at The Maine Wire

** Senate Passes White House Plan to Cut $9 Billion in Federal Spending by a Whisker – Collins Votes Against (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=995a65584a&e=f093fa355c)
------------------------------------------------------------
By Libby Palanza on Jul 16, 2025 06:51 am
The United States Senate narrowly passed President Donald Trump’s (R) plan to reverse $9.4 billion worth of federal spending, with Vice President JD Vance casting the decisive vote late Tuesday evening. In what is known as a rescission package, the Senate debated a proposal put forward by the White House to pull back billions of [...]

** Federal Judge Blocks Maine’s New Limits on Super PAC Contributions Citing First Amendment Violations (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=fa8638aaf4&e=f093fa355c)
------------------------------------------------------------
By Libby Palanza on Jul 16, 2025 06:38 am
On Tuesday, U.S. Magistrate Judge Karen Wolf permanently enjoined the State of Maine from enforcing the new limits on Super PAC contributions approved by voters last November. According to Judge Wolf, the Supreme Court’s fifteen-year-old ruling in Citizens United “forecloses limits on contribution to independent expenditure groups.” She also found that the law’s disclosure requirements [...]

name: Rachel Patterson, Evergreen
subject: How we win clean power in the states
disclaimer_text: paid for by Evergreen Action
body:
This is part one of our plan. Together, we can forge a path forward.
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3782302/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
---
| Hi Friend,

With Trump’s brutal budget bill officially signed into law, I won’t sugarcoat how much is at stake for our clean energy future.At a time of skyrocketing energy demand, this cruel bill cuts off opportunities to add new, cheap energy by repealing critical investments that have helped bring massive amounts of wind and solar onto the grid.

**_Translation_ : Monthly utility bills are going to spike for working families—a “Republican Rate Hike” that no one asked for.**

This is why it’s more important than ever for states to step into the breach and lead the way on clean energy. Unfortunately, as the GOP destroys federal clean energy investments, there’s a real risk some states will backslide on clean energy and allow more gas buildout instead.

Evergreen is ramping up our work in states like Michigan, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin—to help get more affordable clean energy online and provide decision-makers with solutions that benefit their constituents.

But there’s an important fundraising deadline coming up, **and we need your help to ensure we can deploy this work at the scale that’s needed.** |
| We have a goal to raise **$15,000** by the end of July, which is coming up fast. [**Will you chip in $10, $25, or any amount to help put us over the top?**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3782303/87SdQ4wZ) [CHIP IN NOW](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3782304/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| While federal investments in clean energy get decimated, state leaders need our help. They’re facing significant challenges with rising energy costs, wrongly blamed on clean energy and environmental policies. To secure energy affordability and prevent the build out of more expensive gas, decision-makers will need both communications support AND clean energy policy solutions—and this is what Evergreen does best.

**Together with your support, we’ll:** |
---
|
* Provide targeted state lawmakers, governors, and members of Congress with **cutting-edge messaging guidance** to help garner public support for energy solutions that are cheaper, faster, more reliable, and domestic.
* Launch **strategic accountability campaigns** that will make sure elected officials in Pennsylvania, New Jersey, and Maryland continue to push PJM Interconnection—the company that controls the electric grid for their region—to approve more clean energy and stave off price spikes.
* Defend and advocate for **strong state clean energy laws and siting reforms** , like Michigan’s existing clean energy law, Pennsylvania’s proposed Lightning Plan, and a clean energy standard for Wisconsin.

|
---
| We are ready to push forward, go on offense, and help states continue to lead on climate in the face of federal inaction. But fossil fuel companies, generators, grid operators, utilities, and their Republican allies will be fighting to take us backward—and those forces are only growing stronger.

**With your support, we’ll be ready to fight these forces as we go all in on supporting state climate action this year and beyond.**[**Will you make a contribution before our July 31 deadline? Any amount helps.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3782305/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
[DONATE TODAY](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3782306/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| With gratitude and hope, |
---
| | |
---
### Rachel Patterson
Senior Policy Director
Evergreen Action
---
---
* * *
---
| _Evergreen is building the ambitious, actionable policy roadmap for an all-out mobilization to defeat climate change—and to create millions of jobs in a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future. None of this would be possible without your support._ |
---
---
| | [ ](https://evergreenaction.com/)
---
Follow Evergreen Action on Bluesky and LinkedIn.
---
[ ](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3782307/87SdQ4wZ) | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3782308/87SdQ4wZ)
---|---
And follow our new project, **Hope This Helps.**
---
[ ](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3782309/87SdQ4wZ) | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3782310/87SdQ4wZ) | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3782311/87SdQ4wZ) | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3782312/87SdQ4wZ)

subject: July 17th, 6pm Training: Only Citizens Vote Month
body:
Register now for our training and help us ensure that only U.S. citizens vote in U.S. elections.
| | | |
---
|
---
| Patriot-

---
| **** **** Only Citizens Vote Month is coming up fast and we want you to train you to be equipped to host events and plan gatherings to bring attention to the very real threat of noncitizen voting, as well as push for Congress to pass the Safeguarding American Voter Eligibility (SAVE) Act before the 2026 mid-term elections.
In order to equip you, we are offering multiple trainings to discuss activities, how we'll support you, and answer any questions you have regarding your involvement in this grassroots initiative.
**[Our next training is tomorrow, July 17th, at 6:00 pm.](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794acab4ff5/1edb9794acaaf24e "Our next training is tomorrow, July 17th, at 6:00 pm.")****

* Tuesday, **July 22,** at 6 pm
* Thursday**, July 31,** at 2 pm
