name: Dan Osborn
subject: I’m running for Senate again
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRIS DELUZIO FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111577529/557691406/-368770254?refcode=email_071625_Osborn-split&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODI1OWQzYy00ZDYyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2HBiNUfWJyeeJb6MxHou_JONfhalf9T0s_lZrooiQX8=) Derek, **I’m Dan Osborn, the blue-collar mechanic and former union president running for U.S. Senate here in Nebraska against billionaire Republican Pete Ricketts.** I’m used to people underestimating me. It’s been happening my whole life. When Kellogg’s tried to cut our pay and benefits at the cereal plant where I worked, we walked out. The company never expected we’d strike for 11 weeks through the bitter cold. But we did. And we won a fair contract and saved 500 good-paying union jobs. After I was fired for leading the strike, I decided to run for Senate against Republican Deb Fischer. None of the pundits and so-called experts thought I had any chance. But we got 47% of the vote. Ours was one of the closest Senate races in the entire country last year. And now, I’m running for Senate again, this time against Republican Pete Ricketts – a literal billionaire. I’ve been told by more than a few people that I’m nuts. How could I possibly take on someone with unlimited funds and expect to win? But the first poll already shows we’re tied: 46% to 45%. **I’m running again for the U.S. Senate to flip this seat for working class people, because I am sick and tired of the billionaires and corporations screwing over families like mine and getting away with it. They may think they can buy every Senate seat and write the laws to make themselves even richer. But ours is a movement, and we are just getting started.** I’m not a billionaire. I can’t write my campaign a million-dollar check any time I want to. Instead, I’m funding my campaign entirely with donations from grassroots donors like you. **We can defeat billionaire Republican Pete Ricketts and flip Nebraska’s Senate. But the only way I’ll be able to fight back against the attacks and win is if grassroots donors like you chip in right now to my campaign:** [**Please, will you split a donation right now between my campaign for U.S. Senate against Republican Pete Ricketts here in Nebraska and Chris Deluzio? I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so no amount is too small.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111577532/557691411/-368770254?refcode=email_071625_Osborn-split&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODI1OWQzYy00ZDYyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2HBiNUfWJyeeJb6MxHou_JONfhalf9T0s_lZrooiQX8=) There is so much at stake right now in our country. I am ready to go to Washington and give these billionaires hell. But I am counting on your donation now to help me win. We can flip this Senate seat – but we can only do it together. Thank you, Dan Osborn
---
| Make sure this email goes to your inbox. Add **info@chrisforpa.com** to your address book. Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. But if you no longer want to receive our messages, you can [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/z5DxLUzOH0Cbr-Ed1epOKA2?unsubscribedata=azOIz5ed2z%2B4g%2FMgmz63MAmKTdF2RG%2FLy2a4ru%2Fy%2BHZi6zkKjgS%2Bs%2BaaBx69ThFxTzNE7qr6i67EukjuzMCJLAzApCp9%2BIZJtewSwZIKhByKPXJ2dBd7oAgddWhYMFYwG%2FrLZsEYADIzzm5qyixbnu8PW70hVXQLnu2hHHMwT18Qp6fvVXPzm3ylcp1Tpix1X8ZewvY1Kj5S2EyJwAHFEyS%2BoaqStqDbp0gjWOSmYlXLXJNJ2fpHmgKNSJIiJawaolF3JllKXnJDd6ddoZ7kjS%2FiA9MbWBzafI7iWjjWdUCRHVISaLg8TzNTJBPqkjK%2F9Q6bmaHLS65udkumbdbU%2BqCujxuyZ4C2Q2bUItd0OMegl4hONm4P50QNzaanQz%2FeOPxEgtxSudQcRaBi4nnA8HfBm4uBjnQqY3YTe%2BMjq4Zi%2BiU1e5PIH8mpMZFhrGLk).

| Folks, Gavin Newsom continues to fight back against MAGA extremism: [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92195?t=6&akid=20639%2E878179%2EWkyAjR) We’re THRILLED he’s so bravely standing up to Trump — but MAGA Republicans are FURIOUS, _and attacking him relentlessly._

[**We’re rounding up urgent signatures to stand with Gavin Newsom in the face of MAGA attacks — Please: Add your name to stand with Governor Gavin Newsom! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92195?t=7&akid=20639%2E878179%2EWkyAjR) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92195?t=8&akid=20639%2E878179%2EWkyAjR)

TO: Governor Gavin Newsom
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: Thank you for taking a stand. Dear Governor Newsom,

_Thank you so much for standing up for what’s right — even when it’s unpopular and makes you a target for MAGA extremists!_

**MAGA Republicans are already furious with you, but you are showing them you won’t back down. We need more heroes like you!**

Republicans are plotting to END Social Security and Medicaid, DESTROY the federal government, and make Trump an untouchable KING — but you’re working tirelessly to stop them, and we’re so grateful.

**I know that Trump has put a MASSIVE target on your back — so it means the world that you refuse to step down and let them get away with this.**

I’m doing everything in my power to protect Democrats like you who are brave enough to face Trump head-on and risk MAGA revenge.

[**I know you’re facing relentless attacks from Trump and his MAGA minions, so I’m signing this thank you letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to help Democrats keep fighting for justice »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92195?t=9&akid=20639%2E878179%2EWkyAjR) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92195?t=10&akid=20639%2E878179%2EWkyAjR)

I was twenty years old and living in a studio apartment in Syracuse, New York when I had my son - unplanned - my junior year of college.
My small home had a window unit that struggled through the day, a kitchen best described as ceremonial, and a bathroom you could barely turn around in, but it was mine--just barely. Rent was $500 then.
It felt like climbing Everest every month with a baby strapped to your back and a statistics final in your pocket.
I was working more than forty hours a week--delivering newspapers, working in reservations at various hotels for people whose shoes cost more than my annual income--while carrying nineteen credits at Syracuse University. I graduated _cum laude_ , though that triumph felt immense over the challenges I faced along the way.
I had my son on a Friday and was back at work and school the following Monday, midway through the Fall 2009 semester. I didn't miss a beat -- tough I missed that critical time alone with my newborn son. Time that I'll never get back...

name: Dr. Cordie Williams
subject: Forever Free Wellness Newsletter | July 16, 2025
body:
Reclaiming Your Health and Liberty

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/1776foreverfree.com/forever-free-wellness-newsletter-july-16-2025?e=3c92f5cc01)
---
|
---
[|
---](https://cordie4senate.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e5d6d5e535e64d56a3dbe6a1d&id=898907d864&e=3c92f5cc01)
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://cordie4senate.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e5d6d5e535e64d56a3dbe6a1d&id=f1498ec7f0&e=3c92f5cc01)
| _By Dr. Cordie Williams_
---
| **Greetings 1776 Freedom Fighters,****Welcome to Forever Free Wellness!**
---
| **W e’ve traveled many miles and years together across this great country** and for many of you, across the communist State of California. Thanks for all the support and love towards me and my family!
Now we embark on a new age and journey **Together**!One that is about our health!! How can we save a country if we can’t save and preserve our #1 asset, our HEALTH?
The answer is simple....WE CAN’T.
My wife, Dr. Tania Williams and I have assembled some of the brightest and smartest people on our team to educate and empower you and your family to make positive and permanent changes to your life. We plan on giving you monthly lifestyle tips and hacks that you can implement NOW.
You’ll hear from Functional Medicine experts like my lovely wife Dr. Tania Williams, and our mentor Dr. Ron Sinagra.
---
| You’ll learn about how to quiet your mind and relax your soul, while communicating with your loved ones more effectively!
How you might ask? Well, we even have a Functional Psycho Therapist on our team, my dear friend and soon to be Doctor himself, Rudy innocent.
There will be recipes available, stretching and workout tips monthly as we dive into removing chemical, physical, and emotional stresses.
Our goal is not to be another email you get that takes forever to read, but rather an email that you can get in and out of from a newsletter perspective in less than five minutes.
We will have short three minute videos and easy tips and hacks and then if you want more, you will be directed to our website or individual platforms where you can seek more information.
I hope you were empowered by this newsletter and you can expect another one in two weeks. God bless you and again thank you for your support.
Let’s get healthy together and continue to save our mission to SAVE OUR Republic.
---
[|
---](https://cordie4senate.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e5d6d5e535e64d56a3dbe6a1d&id=f804b34646&e=3c92f5cc01)
| **Semper Fi,**_**Drs. Cordie and Tania Williams**_

|

# Tania’s Treats
# **Homemade Chia Pudding 🥣**
---
| | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://cordie4senate.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e5d6d5e535e64d56a3dbe6a1d&id=859405f621&e=3c92f5cc01)
| _Dr. Tania Williams_

[|
---](https://cordie4senate.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e5d6d5e535e64d56a3dbe6a1d&id=be888a54f2&e=3c92f5cc01)
| | **W ant a quick grab and go breakfast idea?**
**Chia seeds are rich in Omega 3 fatty acids** and can help with weight loss, cardiovascular health, can improve digestion and help lower cholesterol.****
**Here’s the recipe I use****(makes 4 servings):**
* 1/2 cup organic coconut milk
* 1/2 tsp Organic vanilla extract
* 1 Tbs Chia seeds
* Organic maple syrup to taste

1. Mix these ingredients into four separate glasses

2. Cover each one with saran wrap and refrigerate overnight. Can also make in 8 oz mason jars 🫙

3. Top with fresh berries or topping of choice! 🍓🥥🫐

# Dealing with Disruption: The Impact of Global Events on Our Mental Landscape and Self-Care Practices

---
| _By: Rudy Innocent, LMSW_
It’s an undeniable truth: the world’s currents profoundly impact our inner landscapes. We are living through a period where current events, with their rapid shifts and profound implications, consistently raise questions about the future. This inherent uncertainty often manifests as a pervasive, lingering stressor, whether we consciously acknowledge it or not. We're often expected to maintain a facade of normalcy, to go about our daily lives as if everything is perfectly fine, yet the reality is often far from it. It's crucial to address this disconnect because as we traverse the myriad stressors embedded within our lives—stressors that frequently impact us in ways we can barely articulate—we must confront their effects on us, and, most importantly, we must genuinely explore our true feelings.

### Cultivating Presence: Stepping Back to Reconnect
Throughout your day, whenever possible, take a deliberate step back to observe the world you inhabit. Acknowledge that things are not always okay. Yet, conversely, also recognize and appreciate the moments when things are genuinely good. This dual awareness is vital, especially now, more than ever. It's an opportune time to reflect on your current position in life and on the collective state of society as a whole. Times are unequivocally changing. There will be moments of profound questioning—moments when you doubt whether your current path is the right one, or when you sense a powerful urge for a significant shift in your life.
To genuinely examine and answer these profound questions, engage in deep self-reflection. Reflect on your true feelings. Acknowledge that you might not be feeling the way you truly desire to feel. Recognize that lingering uncertainty and discomfort that has been bothering you. And, even more importantly, give space to the ideas and concepts you’re trying to articulate, even if the words haven't fully formed yet. These internal signals are clear indications that the shifting global landscape is indeed having a profound impact on your personal well-being. It erodes our comfort in situations where we once felt secure. This makes it even more crucial to reassess and remind ourselves of the foundational elements that truly ground us.
---

subject: Can I be direct with you, Friend?

body:
I wouldn’t be reaching out if we didn’t have to

Friend, important deadlines are coming up and we really need your help,
House Republicans' crucial mid-month deadline is right around the corner, and we're WAY SHORT of our goal.
I wouldn't do this if we didn't have to. But I'm coming to you and asking for your help.
[**Will you chip in $35, $50, or even $100 to help us hit our BIG goal Friend?**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zd29kqvqvqudukku6tn9io28njct3mglfnjrkrno_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cdge9pr4cph2bs)[PITCH IN $35 NOW
](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ztk9lkagu1k4o07pdnrc7gccplvtfk66s1eeed3o_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cdge9pr4cph2bs)I want to be as clear with you as possible with why we need to hit this goal. [Our War Chest is falling behind the Democrats already, and if this keeps up, we may just fall too far behind to keep our Conservative majority.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z14qm0np998gb57vo5n7t7mpgehpl06q2h1skieo_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cdge9pr4cph2bs)
Democrats are scared! They see what our Republican trifecta has been able to accomplish, and they are going to do everything in their power to destroy it.
[Unfortunately, they've realized the best way to do that is by stealing our majority in 2026, and they're building up a MASSIVE war chest to do just that!](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z4i9m9kjusddjmrb7oa64cmtjq03nmf093rc77a0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cdge9pr4cph2bs)

[Hitting this mid-month goal is crucial in ensuring that we have the resources we need to counter the Democrats dirty tricks and keep our MAGA majority! ](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ze7ffql4qqrunonl00urrku78oaf28m4n7njedog_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cdge9pr4cph2bs)

[I hope we can count on your support Friend, we need your help ASAP!](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z0gmfdkalv3hj35rf4ump753047qptnq1gs7hvu8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cdge9pr4cph2bs)[PITCH IN TODAY

This isn’t just another campaign, Derek. This is our war room for electing Abigail Spanberger for Governor, Ghazala Hashmi for Lieutenant Governor, Jay Jones for Attorney General, and Democratic candidates in every district in the Commonwealth.
**We aren’t waiting to get started. We already have:**
* **87 staff** on the ground
* **7,400+ volunteers** trained and ready to go
* Candidates running in **every single House of Delegates district**
* **A plan to reach voters** by door, email, phone, and community

But to keep building this momentum,_we need you with us._
**We’re asking you to become a founding donor of _Operation Virginia Victory_. Your early investment will fuel this work and send a powerful message that Virginians are ready to organize, fight, and win.**
[**We’ve set an ambitious goal of 200 founding donors by midnight on Friday. Will you join Operation Virginia Victory today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111579377/557697646/2142065886?refcode=E14181-20250715-OperationVV-SL-DPVA-2025Race&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjMzY2E1MC01MDYyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oV6OxGDTx9DzsuROvSrooZU7FEDVwDcyKGOcMOgkpoQ=)
**************[JOIN THE TEAM](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111579378/557697647/-1176307649?refcode=E14181-20250715-OperationVV-SB-DPVA-2025Race&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjMzY2E1MC01MDYyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oV6OxGDTx9DzsuROvSrooZU7FEDVwDcyKGOcMOgkpoQ=)**************

This November, all eyes will be on Virginia. Let’s make sure we deliver.
– Team DPVA

name: Josh Weil
subject: D.C. = They Don’t Care.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Weil, Democrat for US Senate
body:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/387153444E713877456653376A556574376F314841345859327A4D665362374C42586753794B64635252546F6551413647436E7356536243345157355952664A/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-06-18%20at%2011.41.25%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Friend, Right now, I’m standing just steps from the Capitol.
And I’ve got to tell you walking these streets doesn’t feel like sightseeing, it feels like a reminder that the decisions made in these buildings ripple all the way back to Florida. Our schools, our clinics, our paychecks, our rights, are all tied to this place. I’m fighting my hardest to make it here come next fall.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/447A62366259396D4958455A7A535A6E5A653272484C4F4E366E7459346941494C7A6F754E73795A31536236574F685576516D47645558623864376F4D78334F/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-07-16%20at%2010.04.02%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Too many of the people inside these buildings have no idea what it’s like to live paycheck to paycheck, to wait months for care, or to be ignored by the very government that’s supposed to serve you. I have had enough.
I’m not running to join a club. Not to become another talking head. But to bring real representation back to Washington. We’ve got the energy. We’ve got the movement. But we need the resources to finish this fight.
Will you chip in today? Even $10 helps power a people-first campaign all the way from Florida to the Senate floor. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Express Donate: $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
Express Donate: $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
Express Donate: $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
Express Donate: $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
Or, donate another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]
One day soon, I want to walk into the Capitol not just as a visitor, but as your voice.
Let’s get there, together.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/387153444E713877456653376A556574376F314841345859327A4D665362374C42586753794B64635252546F6551413647436E7356536243345157355952664A/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-06-18%20at%2011.05.04%E2%80%AFAM.png]

Josh Weil for US Senate
5800 Beach Blvd. STE 203-337
Jacksonville, FL 32207
United States

name: State Democrats HQ
subject: The earlier we take action, the more we can shape the outcome.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
Right now, we’re in a critical window to build momentum for Democrats — and we need your help to do it.
#
**The earlier we take action, the more we can shape the outcome.**
That’s the simple truth about why your donation of $5 or more in 2025 could make an even bigger impact than it would in 2026.

| | | | [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zms1c24lp31vm6pns3ui7lk8ar8naicmc79id1mo_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cdie0or0cdh2bs)
---

_Yep, that 's me._

When this picture was taken, I had no clue what the Lord was about to bless me with.

**My name is Young Kim, and my story is anything but ordinary.**

I was born in South Korea to two loving parents. My family wanted one thing above all else - _a shot at the American Dream._

When we moved to America, we didn't speak a word of English. All we had was faith, a strong work ethic, and an unshakable belief that if you work hard, you can achieve anything.

I took those firmly held beliefs and I got right to work. I learned English, put myself through college, and started a small business.

**Needless to say, Friend, I achieved the American Dream.** I'm a proud mother, wife, small business owner, and a humble servant of God. I was overflowing with gratitude, and I needed to give back to the country that gave me everything.

So I made the life-changing decision to run for Congress. I poured blood, sweat, and tears into my campaign, and at the end of it all, _I lost._

We came up a few thousand votes short. It was one of the toughest moments of my life, but I remembered the values my parents taught me and every hardship I had overcome. I _refused_ to let that be the end, so I ran for Congress again, and this time, we won.

**Every day since then, I 've gone to fight for the American people against self-serving politicians. I'm fighting for YOU.**

But when you make as big of an impact in DC as I have, you're bound to make some powerful enemies. For years, the Democrat Money Machine has spent huge amounts to take me down, but I fear that this time they might win.

We've never seen them act like this before. They're pledging millions to defeat me and steal the House Majority from the GOP. They've already recruited a top candidate to run against me. I'll be blunt: **We 're in serious trouble.**

This is why I'm coming to you today: Friend. I need your help. _**[Can I count on you to chip in a small donation to defend my campaign from the Left's attacks?](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z149hif2h8tl7q3nhtgld4nl0ghcr4hdioucm6bo_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cdie0or0cdh2bs "Can I count on you to chip in a small donation to defend my campaign from the Left’s attacks?")**_
| | | [DONATE NOW](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z3srbn2ot8bj21qqh3jd6k496eo5s0uv5s239o40_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cdie0or0cdh2bs)
---
| | [HELP YOUNG KIM](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z89afq2mv8esv378n6tdu81dp06ur66k9pgirit8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cdie0or0cdh2bs)
---

This country has given me countless opportunities, and I could not be more grateful. Now I want to make sure that EVERY American has the same opportunity I had at the American Dream. I hope I can count on you.

Thank you and God Bless,

[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zg050tsplu0cernq1gq23k3913b9b6f1l6800mi8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cdie0or0cdh2bs)
---

_Young Kim_

name: Mark Warner
subject: It's bizarre: -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | [](https://go.dscc.org/go/21368?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20250716-MarkWarner-WarnerBipartisanshipTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20250716-MarkWarner-WarnerBipartisanshipTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=20760%2E9716520%2EWT0hrI)
Folks,

I have to tell you, in my time in the Senate, maybe in my time in politics, there has simply never been anything as challenging, as bizarre, and as chaotic as the last 177 days of the second Trump administration.

Yet, so many of my Republican colleagues can't find their voice at this moment – and I don't say that lightly. I'm proud to find bipartisan solutions. I've been involved in every bipartisan deal made in the past decade.

But I'm getting tired of my Republican colleagues who publicly stay silent but quietly come up to me and say "Mark, keep at it." I even had a colleague tell me the other day, "Mark, you're like our conscience."

**Well, I don't want to be your damn conscience. I want you to vote your conscience.**

[**It's clear: taking back the Senate for Democrats is the only way we can hold Trump accountable. So I'm asking: can you split a donation between my campaign and the DSCC before our midnight deadline to flip the Senate blue?**](https://go.dscc.org/go/21368?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20250716-MarkWarner-WarnerBipartisanshipTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20250716-MarkWarner-WarnerBipartisanshipTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=20760%2E9716520%2EWT0hrI)

name: Jane Fonda
subject: Last night’s special election results from Arizona (hint: it’s good news!)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
We’re building something powerful together.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111581133/557701998/1328794144?refcode=ea.a5dbd81b-5362-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.a5dbd81b-5362-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE1ZGJkODFiLTUzNjItZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WfL4xQ6akY5ardk-iN09NVZNUX3r7nCbQtfeWv_qu94=&emci=078c198a-dd61-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=a5dbd81b-5362-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)
---
It’s Jane Fonda! I have some incredible news to share: **Voters in Southern Arizona just made their voices heard in the Democratic primary for Arizona’s 7th Congressional District — and our JanePAC-endorsed candidate, Adelita Grijalva, WON!** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111581134/557701999/2105508926?refcode=ea.a5dbd81b-5362-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.a5dbd81b-5362-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE1ZGJkODFiLTUzNjItZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WfL4xQ6akY5ardk-iN09NVZNUX3r7nCbQtfeWv_qu94=) There’s a lot of noise in politics these days, but when someone like Adelita steps forward, you pay attention. I’ve paid attention, and clearly, voters did too. Adelita has spent more than two decades fighting for working families — not for headlines, but for real results. It just so happens that “Adelita” means _fighter_ , so we know she’s the leader this moment demands. She was raised here. Served here. Fought here. She knows the neighborhoods, the struggles, and the resilience of this community — because Adelita’s story is one of the many stories of Southern Arizona. She’s the proud granddaughter of a Mexican immigrant who came to this country through the Bracero Program, and the daughter of Congressman Raúl Grijalva, one of the most steadfast progressive voices in Washington. Her entire life has been shaped by a deep belief that public service is about lifting others up. And today, I want to thank you for everything you did to help Adelita win. **Whether you chipped in to her campaign, joined our virtual fundraiser, or helped her team knock doors in the scorching Arizona heat — your support made a real difference.** **[If you’re feeling hopeful after last night’s win, I hope you’ll consider making a donation to help us elect more climate champions like Adelita — leaders who have the guts to stand up to the fossil fuel industry and deliver for the people they serve.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111581135/557702000/2105508926?refcode=ea.a5dbd81b-5362-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.a5dbd81b-5362-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE1ZGJkODFiLTUzNjItZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WfL4xQ6akY5ardk-iN09NVZNUX3r7nCbQtfeWv_qu94=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [**DONATE $5**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111581136/557702001/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.a5dbd81b-5362-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.a5dbd81b-5362-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE1ZGJkODFiLTUzNjItZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WfL4xQ6akY5ardk-iN09NVZNUX3r7nCbQtfeWv_qu94=) | [**DONATE $25**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111581137/557702002/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=ea.a5dbd81b-5362-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.a5dbd81b-5362-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE1ZGJkODFiLTUzNjItZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WfL4xQ6akY5ardk-iN09NVZNUX3r7nCbQtfeWv_qu94=)

clean_body: We’re building something powerful together. | It’s Jane Fonda! I have some incredible news to share: Voters in Southern Arizona just made their voices heard in the Democratic primary for Arizona’s 7th Congressional District — and our JanePAC-endorsed candidate, Adelita Grijalva, WON! = There’s a lot of noise in politics these days, but when someone like Adelita steps forward, you pay attention. I’ve paid attention, and clearly, voters did too. Adelita has spent more than two decades fighting for working families — not for headlines, but for real results. It just so happens that “Adelita” means fighter , so we know she’s the leader this moment demands. She was raised here. Served here. Fought here. She knows the neighborhoods, the struggles, and the resilience of this community — because Adelita’s story is one of the many stories of Southern Arizona. She’s the proud granddaughter of a Mexican immigrant who came to this country through the Bracero Program, and the daughter of Congressman Raúl Grijalva, one of the most steadfast progressive voices in Washington. Her entire life has been shaped by a deep belief that public service is about lifting others up. And today, I want to thank you for everything you did to help Adelita win. Whether you chipped in to her campaign, joined our virtual fundraiser, or helped her team knock doors in the scorching Arizona heat — your support made a real difference. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = That’s the kind of grit it takes to win, and it’s why this community means the world to me. Let’s keep the momentum going, Jane = | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: Young Kim
subject: I’m proud to say I’m the woman in this photo
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Young Kim for Congress
body:
See it for yourself >>>

| |
---
| | | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z5mugd4b0ubm3vbk84cpur65fso15i2ia3t7qqn8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cdie8pb2cdh2bs)
---

_Yep, that 's me._

When this picture was taken, I had no clue what the Lord was about to bless me with.

**My name is Young Kim, and my story is anything but ordinary.**

I was born in South Korea to two loving parents. My family wanted one thing above all else - _a shot at the American Dream._

When we moved to America, we didn't speak a word of English. All we had was faith, a strong work ethic, and an unshakable belief that if you work hard, you can achieve anything.

I took those firmly held beliefs and I got right to work. I learned English, put myself through college, and started a small business.

**Needless to say, Friend, I achieved the American Dream.** I'm a proud mother, wife, small business owner, and a humble servant of God. I was overflowing with gratitude, and I needed to give back to the country that gave me everything.

So I made the life-changing decision to run for Congress. I poured blood, sweat, and tears into my campaign, and at the end of it all, _I lost._

We came up a few thousand votes short. It was one of the toughest moments of my life, but I remembered the values my parents taught me and every hardship I had overcome. I _refused_ to let that be the end, so I ran for Congress again, and this time, we won.

**Every day since then, I 've gone to fight for the American people against self-serving politicians. I'm fighting for YOU.**

But when you make as big of an impact in DC as I have, you're bound to make some powerful enemies. For years, the Democrat Money Machine has spent huge amounts to take me down, but I fear that this time they might win.

We've never seen them act like this before. They're pledging millions to defeat me and steal the House Majority from the GOP. They've already recruited a top candidate to run against me. I'll be blunt: **We 're in serious trouble.**

This is why I'm coming to you today: Friend. I need your help. _**[Can I count on you to chip in a small donation to defend my campaign from the Left's attacks?](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z98bmeb19p3ec6h3gsjqot2ok4svt9b0ofd0nup0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cdie8pb2cdh2bs "Can I count on you to chip in a small donation to defend my campaign from the Left’s attacks?")**_
| | | [DONATE NOW](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z1tfeu009rnlu4ffd82k3og4h0pinn2q97puah30_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cdie8pb2cdh2bs)
---
| | [HELP YOUNG KIM](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zs5aorm90pv0rs1khd4u9g9n62t19e45n9oo7mfg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cdie8pb2cdh2bs)
---

This country has given me countless opportunities, and I could not be more grateful. Now I want to make sure that EVERY American has the same opportunity I had at the American Dream. I hope I can count on you.

Thank you and God Bless,

[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zvlirkl6ul7fi8h84i9vicdnte57u8199eugjk70_rp22sh2s8i6epb2cdie8pb2cdh2bs)
---

_Young Kim_

They're pledging millions to defeat me and steal the House Majority from the GOP. They've already recruited a top candidate to run against me. I'll be blunt: We 're in serious trouble. This is why I'm coming to you today: Friend. I need your help. "Can I count on you to chip in a small donation to defend my campaign from the Left’s attacks?" | | | | | This country has given me countless opportunities, and I could not be more grateful. Now I want to make sure that EVERY American has the same opportunity I had at the American Dream. I hope I can count on you. Thank you and God Bless, Young Kim | | | Paid for by Young Kim for Congress P.O. Box 17490 Anaheim, CA 92817 | To ensure that you don't miss out on important messages, please add "info@email.youngkimforcongress.com" to your address book. Not Sure How? Follow the link below to your email provider to get step by step instructions on how to add us to your address book. , , , , | Pop Acta Media | Your America PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

| On August 26th, Georgia Democrats are facing a key special election for a seat in the state Senate.

A victory in Georgia would weaken the state's GOP power – and it’d be a disastrous upset for Trump and his authoritarian buddies.

[State Democrats have overperformed by an average of over 10 points in legislative elections this year. We can continue winning races in states like Georgia if we have the resources. A major medical center in Southwest Nebraska just announced plans to close its doors.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111582934/557707329/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjNkNGZhMC01NTYyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nTqHEi6nXwzGDVbaEn-sbVboz6J0VvPP5OMA4NGjTdc=&emci=9eaa10d1-8461-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=a23d4fa0-5562-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=26261389)

| | We're already starting to see the fallout from Trump's Big Disastrous Bill, and it's devastating. A major medical center in Southwest Nebraska just announced plans to close its doors. Their reason? Uncertainty over funding due to over $800 million in cruel cuts to Medicaid. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111582936/557707332/-1197072038?refcode=2025-07-16-bill&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=a23d4fa0-5562-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjNkNGZhMC01NTYyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nTqHEi6nXwzGDVbaEn-sbVboz6J0VvPP5OMA4NGjTdc=) **Make no mistake: this is what almost every Republican in Congress voted for, and Trump signed it into law.** It'll take time for the full effects of this bill to ripple across the country, but hospitals, nursing homes, and community health clinics are already preparing for the worst. Some – like this Nebraska center – are being forced to shut down. That means seniors losing care. Parents scrambling for pediatricians. Communities left without emergency rooms. All because Donald Trump and House Republicans chose tax breaks for the ultra-wealthy over basic health care for working families. **We won't let them forget it.** This bill is a disaster. Trump and his Republican allies are a disaster. In the Senate, I'll keep fighting to oppose Trump's reckless agenda, and I'm asking you to continue raising your voices against this administration's devastating cuts to vital programs. Don’t trust everything you hear. | [ ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=aa16b94f1bb644a7b80ef0b2838e8aa8&_e=S4ThsAQ-6x5LVs3-y3G9rekCd00JqYTSDkdCbvZSvceW8EfQVZpmVWQEVN2QQ2GK8VZ7rQga6Gj0GFHko1cWjDlmaLeubfb-ZfC19oO_Pv1oDjrd9w6GE8C111Kht9rVGPZumwawerLH3WomH6o7TvX7zDCwlH8lLxoSTLxw8syNu9bOZxedinHLpEsP-WQSpWiDuI_jRFDEKRDTgsbH34hAS2twYF_cE7jbs544tydYO4snfOMa3_tDLf-vqrx9Ge-Rk_P1i3WWrnryByF33P_4Kla533xh1QIZzaRwu_oPMgCw-wbhqn-xs3ka9nf3TXo3Dp0QUwOVgfWbLeOxn5t2ygHXXh58eBUvKdMKmQ64lQvFZmaFPC85NbJKpKchLhK--aqs6hWwwfl_1IpP_F50E0EXjipL7cVeM4Jzj3DlIRGhJEQ2sXjFvbAfzY7S-mfvks0O3DEgDnyOrgX3Fn8g06-CxcyDZ0YJ3p60oglNvBVzx6n44_U25uKc7xXH4hR63lktNvTWLK8FMhNOkZXrVBH3igYACDKGZls2EDnw2nqLjwuIuYvkfqxTlsYp)

Peter, Let’s tell the truth.

The government’s response to COVID was a complete and utter failure. Not just a mistake, but **a calculated attack on common sense, freedom, and your health.**

They closed gyms. They closed parks. They locked you in your home.
But fast food joints? Open. Liquor stores? Wide open.

**_Why?_**

Because it was never about your health, it was about control.

They said, _“Trust the science.”_ But they silenced dissent, censored truth-tellers, and protected the corporations profiting off your misery.

You weren’t allowed to lift weights or get sunlight, but you could order DoorDash and drown in fear. _That wasn’t an accident._

**I’ve said it before, and I’ll repeat it:

**A society that shuts down gyms and keeps McDonald’s open isn’t sick with a virus.
It’s sick in the soul.
| [ **STAND WITH ME** ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=aa16b94f1bb644a7b80ef0b2838e8aa8&_e=S4ThsAQ-6x5LVs3-y3G9rekCd00JqYTSDkdCbvZSvceW8EfQVZpmVWQEVN2QQ2GK8VZ7rQga6Gj0GFHko1cWjDlmaLeubfb-ZfC19oO_Pv1oDjrd9w6GE8C111Kht9rVGPZumwawerLH3WomH6o7TvX7zDCwlH8lLxoSTLxw8syNu9bOZxedinHLpEsP-WQSAqYXeQINpyLKVqBYfDOh5EpJ48iJhfbFIndzObTgEh0G1H-3hciWKb0Yh-RC4Pa1r_U4JYQ0WXR_I0dalBS3hvhc7OrDKrMJvlJMn_R44VVkw4HC1bHg2VLFHiTx-m9tZj3fQJ3iYc_jd68qOk03e9vpg9tDWDo3Viv8I16X0r-ejxwdh1yp2DKEPj6ISAanlNyE90_GSFbYyE6-9r9ZUdQWIF9n3Jv07L0pOJ24bk-I1pIT0PnNxsqnFrVWxXe3WQbTqf-brNJ1g2DXPLbUu_i4SFoaS4pl7sfwizGLzBWzsaNf2trT8c29frx-uCNl3ctqYoSqynrLoTygqfaO2prqE6gKjzPJEA-AeeDVwZe240u91MtgT4d0fuK4dbsr)
---

We need to stop pretending these people care about us. **We need leaders who speak the truth, even when it’s uncomfortable.

** **[If you’re done with the lies, stand with me. Let’s expose the whole rotten system.](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=aa16b94f1bb644a7b80ef0b2838e8aa8&_e=S4ThsAQ-6x5LVs3-y3G9rekCd00JqYTSDkdCbvZSvceW8EfQVZpmVWQEVN2QQ2GK8VZ7rQga6Gj0GFHko1cWjDlmaLeubfb-ZfC19oO_Pv1oDjrd9w6GE8C111Kht9rVGPZumwawerLH3WomH6o7TvX7zDCwlH8lLxoSTLxw8syNu9bOZxedinHLpEsP-WQSFFnzcO5SBgu7NzyguDcFpqY7IqB2mMLXdKl85fUDbFkb9ZkCPUY_fb4fd5XSUj8GnkX-a96QcRz3ZbwQ7CZYAtKpRl1lw_QiWY_xtwx7iqzIr5mz3KLy-3csGskpkVg33UE0-3LN17kJv0g4F87yKpWczgTlP5iy1mcY_UDcIHvTYlmjlnyA7He9h0HXQeSP2sGpQC7JtMC11zHF8wS9DmVyrTbZOot0mfbE9e0C7SHFc_FmPQUYopynOQDMhGsI_gGe8O9J4NIAcxveyGmNkF2i-aB8dOULFLtbrbxjq6Lwrk9xp3HlO733SUX-l4VHuzRfmbw7LeY5RnEPs_qNAiGKuzZD-kTPESTdIHJe1AhMOoxlmdTy0LzIchf6jix-)**

For truth,
Royce White

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=aa16b94f1bb644a7b80ef0b2838e8aa8&_e=S4ThsAQ-6x5LVs3-y3G9rekCd00JqYTSDkdCbvZSvceW8EfQVZpmVWQEVN2QQ2GK8VZ7rQga6Gj0GFHko1cWjDlmaLeubfb-ZfC19oO_Pv1oDjrd9w6GE8C111Kht9rVGPZumwawerLH3WomH6o7TvX7zDCwlH8lLxoSTLxw8syNu9bOZxedinHLpEsP-WQSHHQsSjq67HdkTCwGmpP378SGXE9KvoPeN1WyAV2hKvTVMiOmdRuAsSptGvbjQrruNpdMAbgsXyDIomGziLVYZjYzXnlGY6s3TjqSxOnvYWvioo-pUY2cUoIUawQLzWhdSl0uj5G-fJSi4RlXpqHj8B93nbXkTr0SgIzVr3vEri8g1QblE4OIq0WyGaWVEgzz6FDJMzqobm34dsEHBofvlxWM7JZaS3Z98fDiLfA5ZUNvp3MmbV7p5onF2oIH_rPW1_2CNrtjIdq_9pwwe5qkZjJCXTLVwJAnyILkNlyATb51Dg5kNQvRzuBlrm_w44BOi1OfAHm48vQTHEl7lK7UGpSsaSAL6_t8Ir6QAakkOfsFdkGR5r8EqXGeaaCUdNSY)

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc._

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

** [**PASS ROYCE AN ASSIST**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=aa16b94f1bb644a7b80ef0b2838e8aa8&_e=S4ThsAQ-6x5LVs3-y3G9rekCd00JqYTSDkdCbvZSvceW8EfQVZpmVWQEVN2QQ2GK8VZ7rQga6Gj0GFHko1cWjDlmaLeubfb-ZfC19oO_Pv1oDjrd9w6GE8C111Kht9rVGPZumwawerLH3WomH6o7TvX7zDCwlH8lLxoSTLxw8syNu9bOZxedinHLpEsP-WQSQBT2UfEnWVzt7OxRthgbVD3by8VNR7vIWGaZf62KrhhqAcqlOkxSCFhjuIOpM3s1a3UrTA1txindyADxjTNQACqXeQDcuKG9vaMTYBQAeiF98PBIbBQkNKfa3jXUDsqWn3L4gLPsh2B3h4r9I_GV0TJ7fnyOQeqja1TrcSA94i1CDq7xGayDVyKpMq3S5LqaJT4NbD8ozOnVs1nt1TgSdoqhR4eh_jQF36Qp0L93mZ073vPTYsOLi5ogpJlJ2ZLvGRvd9cW2gQFgLgJwPwVe6_Fc1lXOlbZkyQbl17UzrSjZ3e3-26ljS-Z5Hi18injGVF3_TSHerxZbKPrim-2nET7V5Psqcsax88RSKOLlM1oyrtDjsJCi_BhR9X87ucRK)

clean_body: Don’t trust everything you hear. | Peter, Let’s tell the truth. The government’s response to COVID was a complete and utter failure. Not just a mistake, but a calculated attack on common sense, freedom, and your health. They closed gyms. They closed parks. They locked you in your home. But fast food joints? Open. Liquor stores? Wide open. Why? Because it was never about your health, it was about control. They said, “Trust the science.” But they silenced dissent, censored truth-tellers, and protected the corporations profiting off your misery. You weren’t allowed to lift weights or get sunlight, but you could order DoorDash and drown in fear. That wasn’t an accident. I’ve said it before, and I’ll repeat it: A society that shuts down gyms and keeps McDonald’s open isn’t sick with a virus. It’s sick in the soul. | We need to stop pretending these people care about us. We need leaders who speak the truth, even when it’s uncomfortable. - For truth, Royce White Meet Royce White: Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards. After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy. Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc. Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans. PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE P.O. body:
The bottom line is that opponents of voting rights are on track to easily enact many of the proposed policies from Project 2025 . We're focused on the changes to voting and our elections, but there's no doubt that this plan is radically altering our country and our lives into a mix of our inequitable past and an unrecognizable autocracy. We cannot let the loss of our rights become irreversible.
We cannot stand by and let Project 2025 become reality. Chip in $25 or more right now to make sure every American knows about the dangerous consequences of this plan and holds Congress accountable for standing by to let this happen >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2]
Voter Action Project
Courier: Trump's executive orders seem to be ripped right from the pages of Project 2025
Remember when opponents of voting rights spent 2024 disavowing the Heritage Foundation's "Project 2025", Team? Now that they're in control they are following that playbook line by line.
Organized by the Heritage Foundation, a right-wing, dark money, inside-the-beltway, anti-voting think tank , and advised by more than 100 conservative groups, Project 2025 put forth a 922-page list of policy recommendations, going agency by agency in the federal government.
So far the Trump administration has followed Project 2025 in five major ways:
➜ Filling the administration with the authors of Project 2025. From installing Russell Vought, the main author, as head of the Office of Management and Budget to making the head of the FCC section head of the FCC to and more, the author's list has been appointed to powerful positions en masse.
➜ Mass firings in the civil service. Elon Musk's DOGE team started with a buyout scheme for federal employees and when that failed, moved to layoffs. The Supreme Court recently cleared the path for mass firings. Project 2025 calls for replacing the open positions with MAGA henchmen.
➜ Military immigration enforcement. They've deployed U.S. troops on our domestic borders, with ongoing operations in Los Angeles supporting ICE and their operations to round up anyone who might not be a legal immigrant -- with a lot of legal Americans wrongly arrested.
➜ Persecuting transgender Americans. The Trump administration has attacked gender identity across the board.
➜ Environmental rollbacks. From pulling out of the Paris Climate Accords (again) to opening Alaska's land to drilling to valuing fossil fuels over all other forms of energy production, they're dismantling environmental regulation piece by piece.
We're just six months in. If they've already accomplished all this, you can bet Project 2025's recommendations for voter suppression are coming soon . We must use this playbook of theirs against them and fight back however we can.
Please, step up and fuel our efforts to defend our fundamental right to vote and more with $25 or whatever you can today >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.

Celebrating 15 years of fighting for election integrity
| | | | July 16, 2025 | [Read Online](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.V3w8YMCG4nRbND5mzNN4kDMB-DsSVFFhDy-o1OwWzilyI3mIKr6K-jmvKZFQFdY7kbxU2MKPBElmebbVchshFoNJX0OwTq-HbyiEMlaWdvVdHsm59-wb4KCjbXId1pRCdloYkWdT3873vCRajneCbPsCPxRd37DYAbOINTTqtSQ1Tf5K7QuDXJGL47e_tuz_zIPtFb75kcjnY_hnN9PEOeHijL6wAtDtXQTY6vkq3L2K_Uo3pYwrHnrnPe3iiuLcy2YtWdnpeGjDsd5-R4qB1dsJhd3Kj7KfF3e1NQlTlhs-C3XtShzQBQiaqQcHxrjW7JR_oMWNpB4Kw2nwYNEPs4iuACyFK9kv9NvhRWL2nC3hj95UDVKbN_bDfIlzMlYZA_n_4Y2NGyqaOlxaQfebPa_ekL6uxcMPyUAySt0HWYJ1qr6Q880Zepl3VmFU_zOQMAERH2XjldcrONmUkhtqUpucID268xsTq_D_xZ8m4qO8yst043N0_7g2a8a2tQvSdkwu1p8799C1tn2PJjsTt98xHxykNt4QqCyIip59-C356QO8fJNm0HhFXQey3nbXIH801lvYCNLfrLCetKiyLheD1BtKZMR-fg1ddIb7cUPB3JYInlW2n5_PuK7mwGHmQ1afFeRl4y5eaK-WP17lrFsvSDZ1TbHGeNomZwdotUUuN3gUJX7R-mVo_t85p7JhIXKswD5lZFKJt_ALKGGjRDx4VqN-1m9gPZEFmskl0ja2prRu_5wxJQtHMD3g_11P6hr7z0Mgbozv_wFfeL3lIlkpxLHPvieOZDgMpQJudQ8/4i8/UFdXp8SPTTyjdh555oJuhQ/h0/h001.BuONkF_6QbyngQNvfqpF7vaX1iKc8RojosIikbqs7e4)

| Hi Friend -
---
Fifteen years ago, in July of 2010, we stepped into the arena.
We chased truth. We challenged power. We fought to break through ceilings others said couldn’t be broken. We prayed that America would wake up — and inch by inch, she has.
Today, we see something extraordinary: people are rising. On their own. In their communities. For their country.
This is the legacy we’ve built together. Quietly. Steadily. Without seeking headlines. But with hearts on fire for liberty.
Over the past fifteen years, we’ve accomplished more than most thought possible:
* We brought national awareness to the need for clean voter rolls—and helped get them cleaned. (In fact, we filed and won the very first NVRA Section 8 lawsuits in our nation’s history)
* We trained thousands of election workers nationwide, building a national brigade of poll watchers in years when very few even knew the position existed.
* We fought the IRS in court — and won — helping to end the targeting of pro-liberty organizations and improving the nonprofit application process for groups across the country.
* We helped pass election integrity legislation in states from coast to coast.
* We supported and equipped hundreds of grassroots organizations and tens of thousands of citizens working to safeguard elections in their communities.
* We developed the first-ever citizen-led voter roll research database, now known as[ IV3](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.ZOvxkEhKDw9DETb6Ummm9zQuo-zt7v1AcpXkOLMbvNt6YrZM562R3uGahNjwIn7jkGt_IWnw-uSgtquK_mdpjjdISa-tLImUGCjFLnGJ8wiTGekRP4_8qsbR4gvrGXhvGUpRRahhMd56QXOS5Bdrvu3a7oiZIx-FoIuO-5PcpPPx2a4ha-s60LqgpemN7sBhtD-yu3kwn1psbRUoBkmBImXRjeM5bOu32RuV1RwTLsA/4i8/UFdXp8SPTTyjdh555oJuhQ/h2/h001.0XCOLyDauLxAegUcCVJTcQOTB3y_KmkwnS1OUuShhfI).
* We launched the first mobile app for election worker reporting, first as VoteStand, and after it was targeted and ultimately removed from the app stores, we relaunched as [VoteAlert](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.QaMHj7Qq1DDbDECCtYugmAHxKQRoU6lXtZdwF-D70_upyg-YyrOhoNbDuNYWjg-GsdjYNuPYfRtChfPsABiOhqkvIMAMKko4ujHsWpsgrLUsN4lnfdMvQl1fo9wqeMWHZ06VOC4gs0Ca5F3fOKqDtXvjOEcIftCbJST1N2qwAOe2DUNLc2gDqUWt-Z9A1PgRIdDcpg5BrqhPmHJM2maE0DnBJJSm7HoZZKBPG3-yenM/4i8/UFdXp8SPTTyjdh555oJuhQ/h3/h001.wB40jg3iIiR7qvvpmC61ZojPLCTucVMFR_ADi_wtnr8).
* We stood firm in dozens of lawsuits, [fighting back](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.bYZLwP2tKNW52PF5H5Fs6e_tt3v5FcyxfBAwX8eOipG1RfV2slKZYC8SGox98vd-RtZERLCCRH8AJu_RwpdOaKRNXrbCZhUJaCs9GQ6Up7XWm3o9W3GKU1SDxp-6qSfpHd2P0aNCgg1sRX_Dvt1bOHOQjc2tu_XGSexASj1utdVrsqKLBFZtSdzGBgvT1VRDPPSuk5VtDJCSYq4hgId5gx4to0u-P5nMw6t_wEzMJtuXd-JjtCF45OtAJckzVXLkq2V0x1z3GQ8UhjPU7uNtO313aVXc1O99zPj9rlTXOyWH_HX7R9A05tf8_-_auvYsMnEq5oNzpPuIq2BMCkB8Zu8dc-jO_L7ycjTzCvrdYP7LN8I6LlIkGC-H6AW7f9B2woM9_Zp8Kn7cLdWV8Dn71p-TSnFCSQWBnufWVMMQIwTL-AE05kWv8Z6njasAmjO1/4i8/UFdXp8SPTTyjdh555oJuhQ/h4/h001.CYFDezywOaNekf_j7onwQGXH97xQSEGDz8yXDXBtOOk) against the likes of Marc Elias, Stacey Abrams, and the Biden and Obama DOJs - and winning. _(Interesting note: prior to starting True the Vote in 2010, I’d never been in court. Since starting True the Vote, I’ve never been out.)_
* We exposed [widespread ballot drop box abuse](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.bYZLwP2tKNW52PF5H5Fs6Qnzdaf1G_a1z2_KOIqFO6AuhcM65GRYWidoU0yP_01BAFJ0GHK8xaTx3apAuQEEHfBYu6Rcx9tBc2G5cuDAawkSxm8Cl1H6pMdCtjz-QUkkCo8jgX3ouTZtSL0FHmsP4DvoR8He1iY2oTF-iEIICMgLMFsci5CCvYC9gWdyFFzhxpqIdyLf8RHuKzSpIfps4Tguknwk1vFwOgF1q6jWXamz3uV0HnTHC0pLTuMpnK8-/4i8/UFdXp8SPTTyjdh555oJuhQ/h5/h001.hXrvMIwLIAfv2yJObTIcRuiyHCe7yMpEsn0C_b2nzuM) using geospatial (cell phone) data and stood firm against cowardice, cover-ups, and false claims that the work had been debunked, helping change the national debate on mail-in ballots and ballot drop boxes, and radically improving election integrity nationwide.
* We exposed [CCP-linked efforts to infiltrate U.S. election systems](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.bYZLwP2tKNW52PF5H5Fs6aJ-qw2ZcytwUjOhb8IQ1tdMYc--7BNT2wG14M8MsfH8wMwy8n5DZYr-9A8fYyKIB5Dy16Ee4cqPsFT2VTlyBvST4OsHGBa49-QqYM7IhAIFKtCW9HuboDsH3KB90DUxz3-8L8Btm-UWp8Zgk3CWH8alnONnL1-Q5YM5X-n1_CvlJw1XtaGUS0tKbqX0TcHNbXKpnZJ5FwzYqKAX6CCNuU1cRsGO8XrsTXLA0aFe9uCZ/4i8/UFdXp8SPTTyjdh555oJuhQ/h6/h001.TVnBnULtIM5sa1Ii84VF_bZnXkr-Iyq1pBFPR5ohfBc) (which led to a federal court judge sentencing Gregg Phillips and I to prison, only to be released by Emergency Order of the 5th Circuit Court of Appeals and recusal of the judge).
* And so much more: more stories we could tell, and certainly more to come.

For fun, we put a mash-up video together, featuring bits of our work from the past few years and kicked off by the very first video interview we ever did, with the amazingly wise David Horowitz. We could never have imagined the adventures that awaited us ...
[| | [](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.Ur26RXVGdHypG5WgXqOaBhpyRyqaGE0SeBtq1gF3flPveuKlmTKlb8Vl7Brn8QNYW1a32MhQ9bXm5ukNH9D9ZgcHVujPJtddxbVR6g8LHSLqb1YovFfmtmaed6GIKF4wjz5gGlpjok45ipaRCUXtATS_zUa3PcKpB2J1gk0ULm3DSymstc-hA3Lq9exnSiDv9XzU6XHbVPjTigYxAUV38gt7vgPoq5UItgMbGzNCKR-0E9sGdYMzvjerv7HjeZOv/4i8/UFdXp8SPTTyjdh555oJuhQ/h8/h001.VnJEEKv2kWEGhFQD2PgPk_85or2vy7Gronm55c31wQc)

TTV 2010 - 2025 ](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.Ur26RXVGdHypG5WgXqOaBhpyRyqaGE0SeBtq1gF3flPveuKlmTKlb8Vl7Brn8QNYW1a32MhQ9bXm5ukNH9D9ZgcHVujPJtddxbVR6g8LHSLqb1YovFfmtmaed6GIKF4wjz5gGlpjok45ipaRCUXtATS_zUa3PcKpB2J1gk0ULm1jjNMYPYh8yh50Zv1dPdD1utbTUBEKSiHOYZ96lbm6KFnJCzkSXADU2Cr3OnKyyqozmYxfUM6YpE59i0-5rjKE/4i8/UFdXp8SPTTyjdh555oJuhQ/h7/h001.CRZGnfEYZRnRcSWqHPXXlaBABY8UeFlcPQ4fe1F03sA)
Here is the danger we now face: we cannot forget the fundamentals. In a time when artificial intelligence and synthetic media threaten to blur reality itself, we must hold fast to what is real, our voices, our votes, our communities, and our faith.
Over the years, politicians have failed us more often than they’ve helped.
But the American people? You have never failed. You are awake. You are aware. You are powerful.
Take that power and apply it. Call your local board of elections. Ask how you can serve. Even if just 1% of those reading this email today take that next step into local election service you could help change the course of history.
Never underestimate what you can do.
Over these fifteen years, I’ve been accused of awful things. I’ve been tracked, threatened, poisoned, imprisoned, and sued — relentlessly. And I count it all as victory. Because we are still standing. Still fighting. Still growing.
True the Vote will not stop.
As we near what we’ve called “voter singularity”— when the same data used to support elections may be twisted into a digital control grid — we must hold the line. We must never give in, never give way, and never forget why we fight.
Because this has never been about politics. It has always been about liberty.
And as we look toward the future, it feels like the start of Act Two. If the first act was about standing against corrupt men, this next may be about standing against machines, to preserve our humanity and our freedom.
Thank you for coming along with us on this incredible journey. Though it’s rocky, steep, and full of twists and turns, the road less traveled still leads to liberty.
Hold the line. Never quit. Ephesians 6 FTW!
Ever onward -
|
---
[P.S. The only way we can stay standing in this fight is with your help. If you’ve been around a while, you know we don’t often bang the drum for financial support, but today and in the days ahead, we will be. Our adversaries have strategically sought to drain our resources in court. Thank God, we are down to only two lawsuits, but we need to keep winning in court while still doing the work we do with initiatives like IV3, LegiTrack, Scan.Check.Protect, VoteAlert, and scores of training programs and supporting materials. We have our eyes trained on what’s coming in 2026. This entire paragraph is linked to our donation page. Please help us if you can. ](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.QpSyXf61MHmBXCNRmciJj3PUgb36uh_VYyzARbBoy8V4IIXfwPI29p_RsGNgUB1TiiaogtipJdX9Vif9CG-1g7USR7d76zxeGo1dHQubv6NL4XjQ5SnDsDLcFSO6CiEzG-gAbn8kfWts8gmI4M_pVunjPE1pXt9u-GD6Eo70QovaYvIdRhM010pMds4J-NqAioMxJMCz9UBlNaUNLUsJOSG3PzNE0gmDbfu5GZKrppidb3-C4LdAmx2i1m9W-Vw5/4i8/UFdXp8SPTTyjdh555oJuhQ/h9/h001.C8YyuybVFjWEVV-CM5-3DIrJyEaWcMk3lybY0Ov0VqE)

clean_body: Celebrating 15 years of fighting for election integrity | | | | July 16, 2025 | | | Hi Friend - Fifteen years ago, in July of 2010, we stepped into the arena. We chased truth. We challenged power. We fought to break through ceilings others said couldn’t be broken. We prayed that America would wake up — and inch by inch, she has. Today, we see something extraordinary: people are rising. On their own. In their communities. For their country. This is the legacy we’ve built together. Quietly. Steadily. Without seeking headlines. But with hearts on fire for liberty. Over the past fifteen years, we’ve accomplished more than most thought possible: We brought national awareness to the need for clean voter rolls—and helped get them cleaned. (In fact, we filed and won the very first NVRA Section 8 lawsuits in our nation’s history) We trained thousands of election workers nationwide, building a national brigade of poll watchers in years when very few even knew the position existed. We fought the IRS in court — and won — helping to end the targeting of pro-liberty organizations and improving the nonprofit application process for groups across the country. We helped pass election integrity legislation in states from coast to coast. We supported and equipped hundreds of grassroots organizations and tens of thousands of citizens working to safeguard elections in their communities. We developed the first-ever citizen-led voter roll research database, now known as. We launched the first mobile app for election worker reporting, first as VoteStand, and after it was targeted and ultimately removed from the app stores, we relaunched as . We stood firm in dozens of lawsuits, against the likes of Marc Elias, Stacey Abrams, and the Biden and Obama DOJs - and winning. (Interesting note: prior to starting True the Vote in 2010, I’d never been in court. Since starting True the Vote, I’ve never been out.) We exposed using geospatial (cell phone) data and stood firm against cowardice, cover-ups, and false claims that the work had been debunked, helping change the national debate on mail-in ballots and ballot drop boxes, and radically improving election integrity nationwide. We exposed (which led to a federal court judge sentencing Gregg Phillips and I to prison, only to be released by Emergency Order of the 5th Circuit Court of Appeals and recusal of the judge). And so much more: more stories we could tell, and certainly more to come. For fun, we put a mash-up video together, featuring bits of our work from the past few years and kicked off by the very first video interview we ever did, with the amazingly wise David Horowitz. We could never have imagined the adventures that awaited us ... TTV 2010 - 2025 ]() Here is the danger we now face: we cannot forget the fundamentals. In a time when artificial intelligence and synthetic media threaten to blur reality itself, we must hold fast to what is real, our voices, our votes, our communities, and our faith. Over the years, politicians have failed us more often than they’ve helped. But the American people? You have never failed. You are awake. You are aware. You are powerful. Take that power and apply it. Call your local board of elections. Ask how you can serve. Even if just 1% of those reading this email today take that next step into local election service you could help change the course of history. Never underestimate what you can do. Over these fifteen years, I’ve been accused of awful things. I’ve been tracked, threatened, poisoned, imprisoned, and sued — relentlessly. And I count it all as victory. Because we are still standing. Still fighting. Still growing. True the Vote will not stop. As we near what we’ve called “voter singularity”— when the same data used to support elections may be twisted into a digital control grid — we must hold the line. We must never give in, never give way, and never forget why we fight. Because this has never been about politics. It has always been about liberty. And as we look toward the future, it feels like the start of Act Two. If the first act was about standing against corrupt men, this next may be about standing against machines, to preserve our humanity and our freedom. Thank you for coming along with us on this incredible journey. Though it’s rocky, steep, and full of twists and turns, the road less traveled still leads to liberty. Hold the line. Never quit. Ephesians 6 FTW! Ever onward - | P.P.S. They wouldn’t take it. It was about that time when we learned we were their targets. \- Subpoenas from Google and Apple, revealing the Biden DOJ’s demand for all my accounts and archives in a sealed, years-long Grand Jury probe by the Northern District of New York—part of a secretive effort to criminally indict Gregg Phillips and me. \- Full texts and emails with all FBI agents we dealt with—names, contacts, all of it. | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- | | Update your email preferences or unsubscribe (C) 2025 True the Vote 3120 Southwest Frwy Ste 101, PMB 19128 Houston, Texas 77098-4520, United States of America

name: Dominic Rapini
subject: Let’s celebrate the victory of principles; not the losses of the left
body:
Values Unite, Issues Divide

| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/05d5fda478d0/when-we-vote-we-win-14764457?e=8763c56857)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | “Don’t do the silly dances in the end zone. Look like you have been there before!” – Lou Holtz
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| **Are you tired of winning?**
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| |
# Chris Coyle - WinLabs Consulting
IT is my honor to introduce my talented and trusted friend, Chris Coyle—a Connecticut native and current RTC chair of Pomfret, CT, who has been recognized for his influential work in developing effective messaging and strategies that drive Republican campaign success. Now serving as a new member of the CTGOP State Central Committee, Chris leverages his expertise in persuasive communication, strategic narrative creation, and coaching to help GOP candidates resonate with voters. His experience in proposal writing and presenter coaching equips Republican candidates with the skills to stand out and achieve significant victories, making him a valued strategist and leader within Connecticut’s Republican Party.
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
# _Opinion_ | Let’s celebrate the victory of principles;
# not the losses of the left
---
|
**My friend and our guest author this week:**
**Chris Coyle, Pomfret, CT - RTC Chair and Political Activists**
We all get it. It feels good to win. It even feels betterwhen the hypocrisy and cynicism of many of the opponents of the Trumpadministration and those who generally support its policies is stripped barefor all to see in the bright light of reality.
From “mostly peaceful demonstrations” and **“Let’s go Brandon”** catchlines that exposed the spin-turned propaganda to the more recentpush back on the Democrat Judges using political talking points instead oflegal reasoning, we are beholding a reawakening of values and principles. Recently,the short and simple rebuke of a dissenting Supreme Court Justice who scoldedthe majority Justices, seemed to rip the band aid off the gauze of silentfrustration; pent up for years as we were lectured by the liberal elite andprotected/entitled class.
**Why it Matters:** Whenwe celebrate “Winning” and those who are against us as “losing” are we creatingthe dynamics for sustaining our movement to reunite our country with thestrength of a committed and growing majority for years to come?
**Consider this** ;
**Long-TermProcess not Short-Term Outcomes** : Ever notice after a big win,the elite coaches smile, high five and pump their arms, but always with ameasure of reserve? From UCONN Women’s basketball coach Geno Auriemma and thePatriot’s former coach Bill Belichick to the famous Alabama Football coach NickSaban, and many other honed leaders, they are all focused on how well everyonedid their job. Their team may have just won that game, but for these leadersthe question is the quality of the win, not just the outcome of that game. Theyfixate on how they can sustain the highest level of performance to keep onwinning. In today’s culture where every action and statement is magnifiedten-fold through digital networks, when we spike the ball in our opponents’face, are we creating an image that will attract more new followers? Don’t wewant folks to understand the power and potential of our positions, not ourpersonalities which may appear fixated on beating someone we disagree with?Remember, Making America Great Again is all about reaffirming our commitment toour founding values and Constitutional principles. The pursuit of greatness isa journey, and one that got a jump start last November 2024. But it is along-term process so we must think; what is the best message for the outcome weall want, the sustainable, long-term growth of our movement. The answer isgrowing our ranks by explaining not celebrating, so the wins today can be thefoundation for the wins tomorrow. Think long-term.
§ **Buildingnot boasting:** My friend and fellow collaborator on ourpodcast show, the Liberty Collaborative, [https://www.youtube.com/@LibertyCollaborative](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=63ddbb25fc&e=8763c56857), MichaelHancock [https://hancman.substack.com/](https://dominicforct.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=2e08243586&e=8763c56857) spokerecently about Republican’s focus on being builders. As Frederick DouglassRepublicans, we focus on what we stand for more than we focus on what we areagainst. The reason is fundamentally simple: we advocate for our foundationalvalues and principles. Those who created the most successful, free, andprosperous society ever built. It explains why our success in enforcingimmigration laws or demanding some measure of fairness in reciprocalinternational trade builds a stronger foundation for everyone, regardless ofpolitical orientation. Liberty is the gift that keeps on giving, if we willcontinue to free it from its shackles. Boasting and mocking opponents willfurther alienate them and others, while making the win about ourselves ratherthan the principles and values we champion. Does boasting feel good in theshort term, after so much ridicule and demeaning treatment? You bet. However,it is not conducive to the long-term movement we must continue to build.
**Winningwith honor:** One of the key elements of Lincoln’s historicsuccess in reuniting the country was General Grant’s approach to the surrenderof General Lee, which ended the Civil War. While Lee dressed up in his bestConfederate military dress uniform adorned with all the accoutrements of hishigh rank, General Grant wore slightly dirty clothes of the common Unionsoldier. Grant claimed he never thought about it, but historians point out thestrategic artistry of the event. Don’t demean, respect. And, the terms of Lee’ssurrender were unlike anything ever known in history, where the victorious armyusually imprisoned and tried its vanquished enemy. While there was strongopposition to this treatment of those supporting the Confederacy, historyproved the fundamental power of forgiveness and rebuilding. We are still theunited, United States because of that careful, thoughtful thinking.
Another powerful lesson comes fromFrederick Douglass’s treatment of his former slave master, Thomas Auld.Although Douglass was a passionate and outspoken critic of slavery and slaveowners specifically, when he had the opportunity to connect with Auld, he didso with magnanimity and grace. He wanted to use Auld’s capitulation as to theevils of slavery as an example for the public to see. Douglass’s demeanor andmoral strength reinforced the power of his principles. Similarly, we can letthe twisted logic of the failed promoters of divisive and destructive policiesgo up in flames on their own, offering a clear contrast to the unifying powerof our enduring values and principles.
**The Takeaways:** Sure, it feels good to celebrate the wins. If you want toearn clicks or build a following shouting at our opponents, it is certainly atarget-rich environment. But, don’t confuse that with what it takes to build asustainable majority for years to come. The way we win and how we explain whywe are winning has critical implications for the future of our movement.
Winning on shared values and Constitutional principles is awin for everyone. Since it is unlikely Trump can or will run again, let’sleverage the bigger story of what we are all about and why Making America GreatAgain is a long-term victory for everyone today and for years to come.

Peter, Republicans are escalating their efforts to steal the midterm elections. Texas Governor Greg Abbott is conspiring with Donald Trump and shameless extremists to rig the state’s congressional map in a rare mid-decade gerrymander — a move that would disenfranchise millions of voters. The GOP is running scared after enacting the largest cut to Medicaid and food assistance in American history in order to give massive tax breaks to their billionaire donors. The Trump presidency is a failure, the One Big Ugly Bill is deeply unpopular and House Republicans are nothing more than a rubber stamp for their Puppet Master's extreme agenda. **Republicans know they cannot win a free and fair election. So they’re pulling from the extremist playbook to rig congressional maps.** I’m committed to fighting tooth and nail alongside organizations like the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, who work to protect fair representation and combat ongoing gerrymandering. How hard we fight back comes down to what we do _right now._ [**So I’m asking: Can you split a donation between my campaign and the NDRC to stop far-right extremists from stealing our elections?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111586487/557717173/-1228467921?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_JeffriesTXRR_email_202050715-NDRC-Tier1-JeffriesTXRR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=202050715-NDRC-Tier1-JeffriesTXRR_&utm_campaign=JeffriesTXRR&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE3ODk2MWNlLTU5NjItZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LVoBvEktGFCp_bXJ3F_xYLv8xd2Xdtgi_SyfZ23NvNo=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: I can’t overstate how important your support is | Peter, Republicans are escalating their efforts to steal the midterm elections. Texas Governor Greg Abbott is conspiring with Donald Trump and shameless extremists to rig the state’s congressional map in a rare mid-decade gerrymander — a move that would disenfranchise millions of voters. The GOP is running scared after enacting the largest cut to Medicaid and food assistance in American history in order to give massive tax breaks to their billionaire donors. The Trump presidency is a failure, the One Big Ugly Bill is deeply unpopular and House Republicans are nothing more than a rubber stamp for their Puppet Master's extreme agenda. Republicans know they cannot win a free and fair election. So they’re pulling from the extremist playbook to rig congressional maps. name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: Republicans are trying to steal Georgia — again. We MUST fight back!!
body:
Trump and his allies are already laying the groundwork to steal Georgia — and with it, the Senate. We can’t afford to fall behind while they rig the map and flood the zone. We’re racing to close a critical $13,638 gap so we can help keep Georgia blue and protect Democratic power. Every dollar matters right now - rush a donation of any amount you can. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-georgia?refcode=071625_1]
Georgia has been the tipping point in some of the biggest political fights of the last decade. Next election WILL be the same.
We've JUST learned that Trump’s allies are plotting a full-scale power grab in the MOST CRUCIAL SWING STATE of Georgia... and it’s ALREADY in motion!!!
A new report just revealed that Gov. Brian Kemp is quietly working to boost Trump’s preferred Senate candidate.
The goal? Flip Georgia red and cement Republican control of the Senate.
We’re doing everything we can to stop it — including launching a $60,000 fund to help shore up resources in Georgia and other battleground states. But we’re still $13,638 away from hitting our goal - can you help close the gap? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-georgia?refcode=071625_1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-georgia?express_lane=true&refcode=071625_1&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-georgia?express_lane=true&refcode=071625_1&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-georgia?express_lane=true&refcode=071625_1&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-georgia?express_lane=true&refcode=071625_1&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-georgia?express_lane=true&refcode=071625_1&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-georgia?refcode=071625_1&amount=25]
The stakes couldn’t be higher. If we fall short, we risk letting Trump and his megadonors drown Georgia in dark money and take the seat without a fight.
Don’t let this happen. Stand up now, while there’s still time.
👉 Donate now to help defend Georgia [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-georgia?refcode=071625_1]

Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account.
