name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Help me take back our libraries
body:
Before you do anything else today, will you please take a moment to sponsor a gift to our “See You at the Library Day” happening on August 16th?
[Unsubscribe](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj205g2217b57libdj1vhaylhrde2grqhdboykcgtis9ajwl5czggo4egprty0tegsbr6ng51dmzcercbxwpf&__stmp=szi1mj&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
| | | [](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szi1mj&__onlt=h)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, Before you do anything else today, will you please take a moment to **[sponsor a gift to our "See You at the Library Day" happening on August 16th?](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szi1mj&__onlt=h)** If you haven't heard about the "See You at the Library Day" on Fox News or Newsmax or your other favorite news sources, please let me tell you why it's so critical.
---
Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian. She would fill your mind with classics like _Pat the Bunny_ and _The Little Engine That Could_. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the _Three Musketeers_ , _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte's Web_. But today, all that has changed. The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described "Marxist lesbian." Radical librarians call _Adventure of Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ "racist." They've stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder's name from a prestigious book award because of her "problematic" _Little House_ series. And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for "Drag Queen Story Hours" where books like these are read to children of all ages... A is for Activist. An ABC board book for "families who want their kids to grow up in a space that is unapologetic about activism, environmental justice, civil rights, LGBTQ rights, and everything else that activists believe in and fight for..."
---
| | [](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szi1mj&__onlt=h)
---
| Woke Baby. "For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world."
---
| | Woke Baby. "For all the littlest progressives, waking up to seize a new day of justice and activism. Woke babies raise their fists in the air. Woke babies cry out for justice. Woke babies grow up to change the world."
---
[](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szi1mj&__onlt=h)
---
| | Prince and Knight. The "premier queer-friendly fairy tale" about a prince who marries a knight instead of a princess.
---
| | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A "family-friendly celebration of drag" that encourages children to "work it."
---
| [](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szi1mj&__onlt=h)
---
| | And The Hips on the Drag Queen Go Swish, Swish, Swish. A "family-friendly celebration of drag" that encourages children to "work it."
---
[](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szi1mj&__onlt=h)
---
| | I wish I could tell you this was only happening in places like New York City and San Francisco.
---
| | [](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szi1mj&__onlt=h)
---
| But that's just not true. <\- THIS IS A MAN leading "Drag Queen Story Hour."
---
| | But that's just not true. THIS IS A MAN leading "Drag Queen Story Hour."
---
[](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szi1mj&__onlt=h)
---
| | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros' Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA. And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content. Maybe you've noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating "the environment" to a type of religion. The "Teen Zone" is filled with books like: _Rick_ about a cross-dressing Grandpa, _Melissa_ filled with graphic nudity, and _Darkstalker_ featuring gory violence and domestic abuse. But here's what's really alarming. We can't just sit back and say, "Well, I'll just make sure my family doesn't go to "Drag Queen Story Hour" and we won't check out those inappropriate books." That may be good for your family – for now. But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values! [**I hope you see why I need your help today.**](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szi1mj&__onlt=h) My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980's family sitcom "Growing Pains" or from my work in inspirational movies like "Fireproof" and "Left Behind." I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood. But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what's far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian. When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named **BRAVE Books** , I wrote "As You Grow" to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit. And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome **BRAVE Books** that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism. And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn't like that one bit. >> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves. >> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that's original), **BRAVE Books** was accused of trying to "confuse and demoralize children," our supporters were described as "bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about," and on and on. I can't even print most things these radicals said because it's so vile. In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States. And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang "God Bless America," and read wholesome and Godly books. It was incredible. But here's the greatest part... From there, parents and grandparents started asking **BRAVE Books** how they could host Story Hours of their own. And that's how our nationwide "See You at the Library Day" was born. Last year, committed conservatives just like you booked event rooms at 360 libraries in 45 states. On the same day, we held hundreds of Story Hours to fill children's hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God. **I went to as many "See You at the Library" events as I could in one day to stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots...** ...for a very simple mission – to reject the Left's radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America's libraries. _And this year, our ambitious goal is to expand "See You at the Library Day" to over 1,000 libraries reaching over 100,000 children._ That day is August 16th, 2025. And what we need is you! It's going to be expensive to give these volunteers the resources they need to hold Story Hours for 100+ children at each library – that's 100,000+ children in all. **[That's why I hope you'll give a sponsorship gift of $125, $250, $375 or more today.](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szi1mj&__onlt=h)** Your sponsorship gift will be used to send a "Story Hour Kit" to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who's organizing a "See You at the Library Day" event. The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items. **BRAVE Books** is a small Christian company. They don't have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA. Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our 1,000 Story Hours to counter the radical leftists who've taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, [**please consider a sponsorship gift of $125.**](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szi1mj&__onlt=h) That's enough to sponsor one entire "Story Hour Kit" yourself. Singlehandedly, you'll be reaching 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. **[Whatever you can give whether it's $35, $125, or anything higher or lower will be necessary for the success of the "See You at the Library Day" on August 16th.](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szi1mj&__onlt=h)**
---
[**DONATE** ](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szi1mj&__onlt=h)
---
Thank you! God Bless You and God Bless America,
---
[](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szi1mj&__onlt=h)
---
Kirk Cameron
---
|
---
| | [](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szi1mj&__onlt=h)
---
**Brave Books** 3528 S Loop 336 E Suite C Conroe, TX 77301
---
| [](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=594o1mmcprrdl5tu13huf5wbt28tbqaha6hlgjhspkl8brj4oaow1uoldc4jx2hj107qicm4vqnb43wpb5hmfxeeqi31jxogbjm8ubx2a4i4ge8brt2sssu25b&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szi1mj&__onlt=h) | [](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=4p3q32ws8ye095pfqbmnqcg1bk6egxkfwr0j0dafley4647f76thgxz1zrmcqgijbray38jyanp8ai1q4jsht7fylxacer0hpq1j6hl3ug0nmlth0qarti9wnxvgeqej570uo7etnrp7oypmtr8uwev15&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szi1mj&__onlt=h) | [](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=14oag80vul0x2o20rig92ajpd5vbmgrnabcwxmbnbuq1lihqie22paqesap3ilspy662ck1bj547hwph8rchtcb8i6cnihm5vgvpu0ou8d76h0fqx8s5rmjpt4obtgbi5hemcxdnasm5l&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szi1mj&__onlt=h)

To Unsubscribe by email, please reply to this message with Unsubscribe as the Subject Line. When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named BRAVE Books , I wrote "As You Grow" to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit. And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome BRAVE Books that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism. And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn't like that one bit. >> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves. >> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that's original), BRAVE Books was accused of trying to "confuse and demoralize children," our supporters were described as "bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about," and on and on. I can't even print most things these radicals said because it's so vile. In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States. And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang "God Bless America," and read wholesome and Godly books. It was incredible. But here's the greatest part... From there, parents and grandparents started asking BRAVE Books how they could host Story Hours of their own. And that's how our nationwide "See You at the Library Day" was born. Last year, committed conservatives just like you booked event rooms at 360 libraries in 45 states. On the same day, we held hundreds of Story Hours to fill children's hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God. I went to as many "See You at the Library" events as I could in one day to stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots... ...for a very simple mission – to reject the Left's radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America's libraries. And this year, our ambitious goal is to expand "See You at the Library Day" to over 1,000 libraries reaching over 100,000 children. That day is August 16th, 2025. And what we need is you! It's going to be expensive to give these volunteers the resources they need to hold Story Hours for 100+ children at each library – that's 100,000+ children in all. Your sponsorship gift will be used to send a "Story Hour Kit" to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who's organizing a "See You at the Library Day" event. The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items. BRAVE Books is a small Christian company. They don't have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA. Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our 1,000 Story Hours to counter the radical leftists who've taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, That's enough to sponsor one entire "Story Hour Kit" yourself. Singlehandedly, you'll be reaching 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. Thank you! God Bless You and God Bless America, Kirk Cameron | | | Brave Books 3528 S Loop 336 E Suite C Conroe, TX 77301 | | | ---|---|--- To Unsubscribe by email, please reply to this message with Unsubscribe as the Subject Line. .

name: NPR + PBS Protection Alert via Our Revolution
subject: "The most serious threat ever faced by public broadcasting."
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

⏰⏰Donald Trump’s latest authoritarian power grab will gut NPR, PBS, and
local public radio and television stations – unless we stop it in the next
24 hours.⏰⏰

Trump’s so-called "rescission package" will defund our public media,
forcing countless rural stations off the air. It’s already passed the
House – and now, if the Senate doesn’t pass it by Friday, the entire
package dies. That means the clock is ticking – and the pressure is
mounting with several key Republican Senators expressing concern.

But Trump is mounting a massive pressure campaign on the Senate to get in
line so it’s going to take ALL of us speaking out.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32925?source=email-20250716&t=1011&akid=9027%2E5885482%2EKcdL7O ]Headline: Donald Trump gives Republicans ultimatum over PBS, NPR
funding

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32925?source=email-20250716&t=1012&akid=9027%2E5885482%2EKcdL7O ]Will you send an urgent message to Congress RIGHT NOW demanding they
stand up to Trump and save NPR and PBS?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32925?source=email-20250716&t=1013&akid=9027%2E5885482%2EKcdL7O ]ADD YOUR NAME

In Trump’s world, if media isn’t loyal to him, it gets silenced. Which is
why MAGA has been trying to come after public media for YEARS. But NPR’s
CEO just called this attack the "most serious threat ever faced by public
broadcasting."

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32925?source=email-20250716&t=1014&akid=9027%2E5885482%2EKcdL7O ]Headline: Rural America and kids will suffer if PBS is defunded, its
cheif says

Right now, key Senators are expressing concern about the bill, but Trump
is piling on the political pressure for ALL Republicans to get in line. If
we overwhelm them with opposition TODAY, we can give them the political
cover they need to stand up to Trump.

Make no mistake: Trump’s rescissions push isn’t about saving money – it’s
about silencing truth-tellers and gutting the public good. ANY senator who
supports it has no business claiming to defend our freedoms.

That’s why we must act fast. Thousands of Our Revolution members joined
our Stop the Cuts call earlier this week and we’ve delivered 70,000+
signatures to Congress TODAY. Now, we have just HOURS left to make sure
this bill dies in the Senate.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32925?source=email-20250716&t=1015&akid=9027%2E5885482%2EKcdL7O ]Will you urgently send your message to Congress: Don’t let Trump defund
public media – kill his rescission package NOW!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32925?source=email-20250716&t=1016&akid=9027%2E5885482%2EKcdL7O ]ADD YOUR NAME

This is a fight we can win if enough of us stand together. Let’s make sure
the public still has access to free, independent media – and show Trump
that our democracy can’t be defunded.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

subject: Do you trust Trump and Bondi with the Epstein evidence? Hell no. We need someone else to ensure they're not stolen or destroyed
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Don't let Trump destroy Epstein evidence. Appoint a special counsel to hold and protect the files](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5084421b-ec76-47b1-ba30-26dd9c6231e3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tafa3aa48-2f1e-4de0-abd1-f8c061d2eeed/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Donald Trump is a convicted felon who clearly has no problem stealing and hiding files. And it's obvious that something in the Epstein files scares the hell out of him. **Which is why we need a[special counsel right now, or some other appropriate official](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6ff8a1fd-bac5-4a53-8129-3fae1bf713cd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), to take possession of all the Epstein files, protect them, and make sure they are not stolen or destroyed.** Trump clearly cannot be trusted, and Attorney General Pam Bondi has shown time and time again that she will put Trump's interests over those of fairness and justice. It's pretty clear that they will have the paper shredders and fireplaces going nonstop to get rid of evidence that incriminates Trump. Don't let them do it. [_**Add your name: Don't let Trump destroy Epstein evidence. Appoint a special counsel to take charge of and protect the files.**_](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf1c89f69-6b6e-409e-9f93-d72120338901/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

body:
A federal officer was nearly shot in broad daylight. California’s leaders are silent. Watch the footage. |
**Friend,**

I’m fuming.

A federal immigration officer was nearly shot in broad daylight right here in Southern California.

It wasn’t a peaceful protest. It was a mob of violent criminals trying to block federal agents from serving a legal warrant at a cannabis farm that **employs illegal immigrants.**

One of them pulled a gun and opened fire.

While the FBI scrambles to find the shooter, Sacramento Democrats are silent. No cooperation. No condemnation. No leadership.

**[Watch the video for yourself.** See what happens when our state leaders look the other way.](https://links.biancoforgovernor.com/s/c/pmTRicH0T-_2Ae9w7zMDmJHMa38ix0mHV4PVmifyUc31roOdYppUtI3A-ITNLvzWBfiDQPEr3CewzJbOXw8y6vhDHNarzFu0-kTVCiC2lfZlVKNmPyPn_nTf_Kd4X06lmzB9_cubKs_TkhY7rlPLm3xLy0DlmN1Y3RHB_C6jhUEKUpL_j6wVONd13LV8pvXpvIKa_XdnfztF9QmZy6rk3LQYn8DaOy5mu_uJ6T5hmT86wULBKBBDc1-u3MI9s6v-KdA3HSRB5y49HWNyXem3q4UMm4WLRvr1u94q9iP-LRyURUA7kO0vCV8GXCt5E2zbPgXfsPHYTBB6bHyOtZrZwhz1FYxUlaLqWscfrXGLUWMYXtZzD2766kOCswF6VTOuE4_Le4j1lK3K7iSOm7jquIEh7OMuqEEMEQtAL-zEv7WqB0WWLjJZjBaDfP8lMqiL0MmZQjg3twCeCCFBxwm8q5977YlD573H8tBdz-j0d_9lWn6shavtMvrHyWqlne60mbH78GC3ZBSjjT5kDTTTK4GglCT9-h4bny7rwM9b8VwQDOz2VY3KePxVxyV-VxebYHXzWkr0rHHvxYo/1xJhEhIYRSgia3-kvKEjf_CDm0H7Hz0t/10)

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111590828/557730347/-1787004069?refcode=header&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAzNTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzE1YjNkYTctNjA2Mi1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=msUUfvfDsyHA1chgkfXgGUgwq1eCbnEUVTbIMyV_u7o=) | Here’s what just happened: **A federal appeals court ruled that private citizens can’t sue under a core section of the Voting Rights Act.** That’s a massive break from decades of settled law. And it would mean that only the U.S. Department of Justice—not you, not your community, not organizations that work for justice—could challenge racial discrimination at the ballot box. It’s a radical, dangerous precedent, and one that’s headed straight for the Supreme Court. Steve Simon is standing firm. He’s made it clear: **Minnesota will stand up to preserve the right of ordinary people to seek relief under the Voting Rights Act.** **[We need to be ready. Stand with Steve and help us defend democracy and protect the right to vote. clean_body: = | Here’s what just happened: A federal appeals court ruled that private citizens can’t sue under a core section of the Voting Rights Act. That’s a massive break from decades of settled law. And it would mean that only the U.S. Department of Justice—not you, not your community, not organizations that work for justice—could challenge racial discrimination at the ballot box. It’s a radical, dangerous precedent, and one that’s headed straight for the Supreme Court. Steve Simon is standing firm. body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111593373/557738285/896231865?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjJiY2FhNS02NTYyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5iE6pV0Ydczy_dFqf_XBvecqxJ_5Ycb5K7q04t58ovk=)
Peter, One of Donald Trump’s most dogged campaign promises was to release the files on Jeffrey Epstein and his clientele of abusers. He nearly incited riots theorizing which people, coincidentally all of whom are his enemies, might be on the report. And now he’s just gaslighting us, and pretending this was an Obama issue, if the files even exist. Well, Peter, the American people deserve the truth. So let’s get it. [**Sign your name: Demand the Justice Department release the Epstein files.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111593375/557738286/-828839371?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjJiY2FhNS02NTYyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5iE6pV0Ydczy_dFqf_XBvecqxJ_5Ycb5K7q04t58ovk=&emci=4023d2fd-3c62-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=ab2bcaa5-6562-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=18052858) | [Sign Your Name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111593378/557738287/-828839371?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjJiY2FhNS02NTYyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5iE6pV0Ydczy_dFqf_XBvecqxJ_5Ycb5K7q04t58ovk=&emci=4023d2fd-3c62-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=ab2bcaa5-6562-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=18052858)
---
Let’s be honest, Peter. If the Epstein Files cleared him, Donald Trump would be selling copies on Truth Social.
But even if, by some random chance, Donald Trump isn’t included in this whatsoever, we have to know what and who is. Not only was it promised to the American people, but it’s an issue of protecting vulnerable people and holding abusers to account.
Sunlight is the best disinfectant to corruption, and if anyone’s values stop at “it’s bad unless it's my side doing it” then you don’t have values at all. We must remove these people from public life.
That’s why it’s critical they give the people what was promised, and make Epstein’s list public.
[**If you agree, add your name to demand that Trump’s White House release the Epstein files.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111593381/557738292/-828839371?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjJiY2FhNS02NTYyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5iE6pV0Ydczy_dFqf_XBvecqxJ_5Ycb5K7q04t58ovk=&emci=4023d2fd-3c62-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=ab2bcaa5-6562-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=18052858)
[Sign On: Release the files](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111593383/557738293/-828839371?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjJiY2FhNS02NTYyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5iE6pV0Ydczy_dFqf_XBvecqxJ_5Ycb5K7q04t58ovk=&emci=4023d2fd-3c62-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=ab2bcaa5-6562-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=18052858)

clean_body: | = Peter, One of Donald Trump’s most dogged campaign promises was to release the files on Jeffrey Epstein and his clientele of abusers. He nearly incited riots theorizing which people, coincidentally all of whom are his enemies, might be on the report. And now he’s just gaslighting us, and pretending this was an Obama issue, if the files even exist. Well, Peter, the American people deserve the truth. So let’s get it. | Let’s be honest, Peter. If the Epstein Files cleared him, Donald Trump would be selling copies on Truth Social. But even if, by some random chance, Donald Trump isn’t included in this whatsoever, we have to know what and who is. Not only was it promised to the American people, but it’s an issue of protecting vulnerable people and holding abusers to account. Sunlight is the best disinfectant to corruption, and if anyone’s values stop at “it’s bad unless it's my side doing it” then you don’t have values at all. We must remove these people from public life. That’s why it’s critical they give the people what was promised, and make Epstein’s list public. Eric Sorensen HQ | Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. name: Giffords.org
subject: We are making a real difference.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
While the Trump administration continues their ongoing assault on public safety, we are making a real difference in the states.
#

Team,
We’ll be frank -- it’s easy to feel discouraged right now.
Donald Trump wants you to give in. He wants to overwhelm us with so much bad news that we start to think nothing matters.
_We cannot give in._
For the last six months, GIFFORDS has been working directly in states to pass safer gun laws and fight back the gun lobby. Your donations have helped secure huge wins across the country.
[**Before we share more, will you contribute any amount to help GIFFORDS PAC continue this important work? We are fighting, state by state, until every community is safer from gun violence.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-july25.e1MNu_&refcode=em250716-1-b&t=1&akid=10682%2E3935704%2ErjTc66)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-july25.lWZeCS&amount=3&refcode=em250716-1-b&t=20&akid=10682%2E3935704%2ErjTc66)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-july25.Pa0HtQ&refcode=em250716-1-b&t=21&akid=10682%2E3935704%2ErjTc66)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-july25.kqPk76&refcode=em250716-1-b&t=22&akid=10682%2E3935704%2ErjTc66)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-july25.fCKs9x&refcode=em250716-1-b&t=23&akid=10682%2E3935704%2ErjTc66)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-july25.-bFWqW&refcode=em250716-1-b&t=24&akid=10682%2E3935704%2ErjTc66)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-july25.lWZeCS&refcode=em250716-1-b&t=25&akid=10682%2E3935704%2ErjTc66)**
---
****
While the Trump administration continues its ongoing assault on public safety, we are making a real difference in the states.
* **We’ve secured funding.** Wisconsin and New York directed millions of dollars to help prevent violence and Texas’ state legislature allocated $2 million to community violence intervention programs for the first time.
* **We’ve made our communities safer.** Colorado passed laws to alert domestic violence survivors when abusers attempt gun purchases and protect Coloradans from armed intimidation and harassment at polling places.. Rhode Island banned the sale of assault rifles, while Oregon passed a ban on rapid fire devices.
* **We’ve helped stop bad bills.** Arizona Governor Katie Hobbs vetoed bills to allow concealed carry on college campuses, while Florida Governor Ron DeSantis failed to dismantle commonsense gun laws after Parkland — one of his top priorities for the session.

And that’s just the beginning. _In spite of Donald Trump_ , we are making real progress to protect communities and curb gun violence. Now, as we head into the next stage of the year, we’re counting on your support to continue this work.
[**Chip in today to support GIFFORDS PAC. Every donation has an effect, and together it adds up.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-july25.e1MNu_&refcode=em250716-1-b&t=26&akid=10682%2E3935704%2ErjTc66)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-july25.lWZeCS&amount=3&refcode=em250716-1-b&t=45&akid=10682%2E3935704%2ErjTc66)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-july25.Pa0HtQ&refcode=em250716-1-b&t=46&akid=10682%2E3935704%2ErjTc66)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-july25.kqPk76&refcode=em250716-1-b&t=47&akid=10682%2E3935704%2ErjTc66)**

****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-july25.fCKs9x&refcode=em250716-1-b&t=48&akid=10682%2E3935704%2ErjTc66)**

Emma Brown
Executive Director, GIFFORDS

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=51&akid=10682%2E3935704%2ErjTc66) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

body:

Fellow Republican, I encourage all Hoosiers to take a moment to reflect on how far we’ve come and to recommit to the conservative principles that made that progress possible.
**American exceptionalism is alive and well.** But it’s under constant attack from the far-Left.
That’s why I’m asking for your support today.
**The Indiana Republican Party is working tirelessly to elect America First leaders** — conservatives who will **secure** our border, **rein in** inflation, **defend** life, and **protect Hoosier values** from Washington’s overreach.
But we can’t win this fight without grassroots supporters like you.
Radical Democrats and their allies are pouring **MILLIONS** into Indiana. They want to flip key seats, silence conservative voices, and turn our state blue.
_**We must stay on offense.**_
[_**Will you chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can afford today to help us defend Indiana and Hoosier values?**_](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/aqy_SiUFkjcyQ2WDLZvKa7aqXPlicbVGId5ReKbOyvPe1yaok6R22v5kl2j5BIhBAceysqM18UdBZvffkg7dV2ACv91ptI3qTcSd4z8M26bboA1kzpQTn7BXmfC5Qvki7Hv9Y9cEw3PRKTv3Mgu1ZGws-pypRqhewGu5VrWHQ0hfc21tmm6MY9n-6-CMbJ7TGcwWkQi3IMmvuoAVToIQzSBVcJg85hODeePfyz9yMA4BQnCHndzRN4bFa1ts9vrZ3Oo02o-krjGb_z4RFhOqyy2ci22JDA22dMcH2ZdGfohOizBPFsAr2eCunuk6WfWn0m-4Xf5nh51oZXPWe6X7AvW61Tm7rH1Ii1PxkIUQT7frT9OKKOrdqfx558QkkDW-JgSe3aL9UTBR1FhEdiLeqTE4bOTlz8boYuRI4haQWgxju5NKGHFDgeHa_KQdxoFVa_WbLHoDSt23GZKz1qMRvjqSJ6UmzrWvFzyrPviN2rJyrgX0IoXcCY1ML6YRWOYubAyDXZ27TkQp_7txPgKd3ocQXss2k-_pD3ysOjD3T1iGM9e2pT7ziKVBK-tWhKiyJw9icKJEKSHDOY1V557UQLyyilveENZEBGA2V4MmlQ/ir5p8KW5v5s_a7BX-tktKjG9mNDynP3U/10)
Together, we can make sure the next generation inherits a stronger, freer America. Our best days are still ahead—if we have the courage to fight for them.
---
| | With gratitude, **Lana Keesling** Chairwoman, Indiana Republican Party

subject: Join us Saturday for our Office Opening & Block Walk!

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake_july25?refcode=0716_e [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake_july25?refcode=0716_e]
Friend,
Team Amanda has a big weekend ahead, and we’d love for you to be a part of it! We’re kicking things off with the grand opening of our new Edwards HQ [https://secure.ngpvan.com/C8PDlcplQUSr8U2omJaDrA2] , followed by a block walk through the Museum District. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/hXEPKizJ90O-y2IW7vxo8g2]
📍 Where : Meet at our new campaign office - 2808 Caroline St, Houston, TX 77004 - then we’ll block walk in the Museum District
📅 When: Saturday, July 19
🕘 Time: Office opening at 8:30 AM, with block walk to follow at 10 AM
Click on the graphics below for information about each event:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/C8PDlcplQUSr8U2omJaDrA2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/C8PDlcplQUSr8U2omJaDrA2] https://secure.ngpvan.com/hXEPKizJ90O-y2IW7vxo8g2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/hXEPKizJ90O-y2IW7vxo8g2]
This is a great opportunity to meet neighbors, spread Amanda’s message, and build community power. Whether you're a first-time volunteer or a seasoned canvasser, your energy makes a real difference.
Hope to see you there,

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: $5 from you matters more than $5 million from billionaires
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Real people, real power
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=509%2E181023%2EZ9baUf)
Team,
The DeVos family can pump as much money into my opponents' campaigns as they want, I’ll still never back down and never waver in my fight for the working people of Michigan.
**Because $5 from you means more to me than $5 million from the anti-public education DeVos family.**
Getting $5 from Gerald in Traverse City, Bella in Troy, Brandon in Coloma, and Cynthia in Marquette — all real grassroots donors who care about protecting our public schools and building an affordable Michigan where everyone can thrive — is what matters most to me.
The people who chip in a few dollars to support me aren’t just names on a list. They’re actual Michiganders who are standing up and saying: “I believe in this campaign. I believe in making Michigan the best place to be a kid, raise a kid, and call home.”
[**I’d be honored if you’d stand up and join them. Before our big fundraising deadline, will you join this grassroots team by making a $5 contribution?**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q32025.OcO0Lx&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250716_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=509%2E181023%2EZ9baUf)
[DONATE →](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q32025.OcO0Lx&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250716_PM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=509%2E181023%2EZ9baUf)
---
Every dollar from folks like you is a direct challenge to the big money trying to buy this election.
Together, we’re proving that when Michigan comes together, we can win, no matter what the billionaires and bullies might throw at us.
Thank you for stepping up.
Jocelyn

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with supporters like you.
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-jbmi/?t=4&akid=509%2E181023%2EZ9baUf)

Ferndale, MI 48220

Friend, Things hit the fan for MAGA after Zohran won. As the saying goes, you know you are over the target when you start taking the most flak. The fact that Trump is saying he won't let Zohran take the mayorship if he wins in November and is **_threatening to strip him of his citizenship and deport him_** should tell you everything you need to know.
---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91DHpSl8E0zrZlUCJw0dJH2tMXmdfdFzbUo4LsYUF1KHx1DUH3asB9aFu5xdGDyYpIIIuDOGzpsy2D8fvRj2xLlXkHNgTL_DBYtatIFipQbWamuv_Ho6miVZF1Cp828LALCDMKxOfIqr5SIbn7W8a6l1GDYsaOgNOPn-k1DEMN7khQ9rMAqy7i0-dEftYfJf--fCcbqLh6pdAkD6J1aiMpJzAadorSRXTby0ECDkuKpehJ4oatPdfWldnLQxRUYBDf-JXRbN0r2fli7znILSRRNdSOr3-M9QoBum-NaaabJUIE/4i8/xzJb3fmFTSCSv0HkNom_Fg/h1/h001.b1X2ea_vVYZqTndxYp0waOMNOXEpYFB2Wuen2CVyocQ)

New York Democrats overwhelmingly chose Mamdani this past June because of his defiant no holds barred approach to taking on President Trump and his platform which offers a radically new approach towards fighting for working families. In winning, Zohran defeated Andrew Cuomo, whose campaign was blatantly **funded by the same MAGA billionaires who elected Trump.** Now Cuomo has entered the race as an independent. Cuomo represents the moneyed ultra-elite within the Democratic party whose interests align with MAGA on all but a few issues. If Trump cuts Medicare or slashes the Department of Education nothing changes for these folks, but they will be impacted if Zohran Mamdani raises taxes on billionaires to pay for universal childcare. MAGA continues to win because they pretend to be taking on the elite status quo. Catering to the wealthy is a losing strategy for Democrats and Zohran's platform of _actually fighting_ for _working people_ is a model that can compete with and defeat MAGA. So when Zohran was being attacked from all sides in the final weeks of his primary and needed help, _No Dem Left Behind came to his aid_. There was no way we could leave a good Democrat like him behind.** ** **It doesn 't matter whether you are a progressive or a conservative blue dog, when an authentic Democrat risks it all to fight for us, we need to have their back -- and that's exactly what No Dem Left Behind is here to do.** **[We need your support to continue ensuring that good Democrats aren 't left to fend for themselves, can we count on you to support our fight with a donation of whatever you can spare?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91DHpSl8E0zrZlUCJw0dJH2tCMLOhIz6V1d-cqPlkZOuprISwJDrv6n-BGVSeqBVJAERWykUeYv6WRbsl_3AfNgC1YDwbzLkyV45AjB6FJiQ5eCIxki1cWlAHCFPMe_5Du0wQYraNW7pYzqQReOTU2TElacpDaJsCVOJ4nX6xWJworE-VQPlvtJYkkhQNOoBUCLpbaXH2lixnPkjgCNHKmlVZ6-keKDhAHp916FsVCmvSoUnwvs7nAnDgPJ9vTe8Ue_bhlXxjjUb_ZngGW7GsJH2jakSo8iLhNTPXte9a19cNY/4i8/xzJb3fmFTSCSv0HkNom_Fg/h2/h001.5c29tP38GAqJ9gJFy2BblwLKU_7ZgNxizEU1xsrhMv8)**

Catering to the wealthy is a losing strategy for Democrats and Zohran's platform of actually fighting for working people is a model that can compete with and defeat MAGA. So when Zohran was being attacked from all sides in the final weeks of his primary and needed help, No Dem Left Behind came to his aid. There was no way we could leave a good Democrat like him behind. It doesn 't matter whether you are a progressive or a conservative blue dog, when an authentic Democrat risks it all to fight for us, we need to have their back -- and that's exactly what No Dem Left Behind is here to do. Thank you for helping to keep good Democrats in the fight. Team No Dem Left Behind | | Mail checks to: No Dem Left Behind P.O. Box 15320 Washington, D.C. 2003 | Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC Not Authorized by Any Federal Candidate or Candidate's Committee. | | Sent via . name: DNC HQ
subject: How we're going to kick Republicans Out of Congress.
body:
---
Derek, **This summer, we’re making history by organizing earlier than ever before to kick Republicans out of office in 2026.** [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025-organizing-everywhere?refcode=em_20250716_3975_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3989_22930333_Q8Plvi&akid=3989%2E22930333%2EQ8Plvi) In a minute, we’re going to ask you to [**make a $3 donation to support our early organizing efforts in key House and Senate races.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025-organizing-everywhere?refcode=em_20250716_3975_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3989_22930333_Q8Plvi&akid=3989%2E22930333%2EQ8Plvi) But first, let us tell you more about the Organizing Summer program. This program is historic. **If Democrats are going to take back Congress, we need to lay the groundwork right now.** That’s why we launched Organizing Summer in partnership with the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee, the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee, and the Association of State Democratic Committees. Organizing Summer is a nationwide campaign to register voters, train up our volunteer base, and host in-person and virtual events in places where people need to hear from us the most. But we can’t do this work alone. Your donation now, along with the donations of thousands of grassroots supporters just like you, helps to fund these early investments and allows us to build our strongest organizational infrastructure yet. With your help, we can elect Democrats up and down the ballot who can act as a check on Trump’s power. [**Can you give $3 today to our Organizing Everywhere Fund? If everyone reading this email used this link to give what they could today, we would be able to expand our organizing efforts in key races and kick Republicans out of Congress.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025-organizing-everywhere?refcode=em_20250716_3975_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3989_22930333_Q8Plvi&akid=3989%2E22930333%2EQ8Plvi) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025-organizing-everywhere?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250716_3975_fr&refcode2=3989_22930333_Q8Plvi&akid=3989%2E22930333%2EQ8Plvi)**

name: Steel River GoPack
subject: When the grid goes down, what will you do
body:
No power. No help. Just you and what you’ve got...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21642/6374453/1c40f8ae411cd754d1c766b59841e89be24e5b23/1c8d74fd113520e79b40135cb25c9a215be5d07e)
---
| | |
---
_July 16th, 2025 at 09:09 PM UTC_
---
| | |
---
| | Hey, Not trying to be dramatic, but if the last few years have taught us anything, it’s this: **You can’t count on the system to bail you out.** That’s why we’re giving away 200 of our **Steel River Go Packs**. It’s a simple survival kit we built for regular people who just want to be a little more prepared. It’s got:
* Waterproof matches
* A tough little multitool
* Solar charger
* Headlamp
* Emergency baton — flashlight, area light, and flashing red SOS mode with a magnetic base
* And a spork that’s actually kind of badass
* No fluff. Just useful gear. Just pay shipping and it's yours.

If you've been meaning to get your act together — even just a little — this is an easy first step. [Get your free Go Pack here while they’re still available](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21642/6374453/ba505af9ff59fc1a4f092e1ba321af4710b922bc/1c8d74fd113520e79b40135cb25c9a215be5d07e) Stay sharp,
– Mike
Steel River Team P.S. These usually go fast when we open up a new batch. If the link doesn’t work, we’re out.

body:

**GET TO KNOW BETH:
** | Beth is a single, working mother of two amazing kids. Every day, she reminds them that we live in the greatest state, in the greatest nation, in the history of the world.

Where else but the United States could a girl leave home at the age of 17, put herself through college, become the first female Mayor of her hometown, and then be asked to serve America in a presidential administration?

**Beth Van Duyne is running for Congress because she knows the people of the 24th District deserve to have a strong, principled voice in Congress.**

She's been asked what prompted her to run for public office; the answer is simple – her children. We live in a very fragile time for our nation, our families, and the future of the American Dream. Socialism is on the rise, our border crisis has never been worse, and we face constant threats from hostile nations willing to use cyber-attacks, nuclear weapons, and terrorist jihad. When Beth thinks about her two children, she wants them to have the same opportunities in life that she did; She wants them to be able to grow up safe and proud of our country.

**Beth is a single mom, a conservative Republican, a reformer who has defeated government corruption, a believer in the rule of law** who has helped remove thousands of criminal aliens from North Texas, a leader who helped deliver growth and new job opportunities, and a Constitutionalist who has never backed down when it comes to protecting the rights of all North Texans.

name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: Restoring hope in our country
body:
Have you read about President Biden’s Ambassador to the United Nations?

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zvjf5iu3o135verds2bc0fs0fo4u333hvsq08ct0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2ctg60pb4cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Have you read about President Biden’s Ambassador to the United Nations? She is telling her fellow ambassadors from around the world that “white supremacy” is “weaved into [America’s] founding documents and principles.” Can you imagine being told that America’s glorious founding principle—the principle that “all men are created equal,” endowed by God with “unalienable rights”—embodies the idea of white supremacy? Can you imagine being told the same thing about our cherished **Constitution** , which is responsible for America becoming the freest, most prosperous nation in human history? That America’s United Nations Ambassador is promoting these lies is reprehensible. But even more reprehensible is the fact that so many K-12 and college students in America are being taught this same false narrative. Too many young Americans are not learning what makes America an exceptional nation and a beacon of liberty for the world. Instead, they learn that our great nation’s history is essentially a history of injustice—that America at its heart has **always** been racist and is undeserving of respect. Is it any wonder that so many younger Americans today feel an increasing attraction to so-called “critical race theory” and other ideas destructive of liberty? Is it any wonder that there is decreasing support among younger Americans for basic liberties that past generations have revered and taken for granted—liberties such as freedom of speech? It is easy to become discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities and its increasing influence in K-12 education. But we must not lose hope—we must fight back with the truth. **Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education from the beginning.** In fact, we produced a free online course that helps do just that, titled **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope.”** And I’m asking for your help in promoting it to additional millions of Americans—especially younger Americans—and to expand our other critical outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide. You can help fund the promotion of this important course at this secure link: _**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0vsf6a62d2bv0obvd0s6e05bfk4digec2ch8sqg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2ctg60pb4cdh2bs)**_ [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zvn8ljk3h170c97aa6pge7p4jiohquqbkcds4do0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2ctg60pb4cdh2bs) Historian and Hillsdale professor Wilfred McClay teaches the course based on his published history of America. **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** presents a full, unbiased account of America’s past. Our goal in producing and promoting this free online course is to **restore the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among our young people—that is essential to preserving free government.** This work is the surest means of defending liberty—which is why we make every online course available **free of charge** to any citizen wishing to learn. **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times_ ’ “1619 Project,” which seeks to inject the idea that America is essentially unjust into the curricula of America’s K-12 schools. Of course, producing an online course and making it available free of charge requires significant resources—and promoting the course nationwide, which is essential, costs even more. To date, more than 118,000 Americans have enrolled in **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** —but we must do more. Your support is critical to our success. As you may know, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student loans and grants. That’s why we can remain true to our mission on behalf of liberty, free of so many bureaucratic regulations that burden other colleges and universities. This independence also means that all of our work is entirely dependent on the support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. This is especially true of our national outreach efforts, including free online courses. **Can I count on you today to help fund the promotion of “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope” to millions of Americans nationwide and expand our other educational outreach efforts with a generous tax-deductible gift of $100 or more?** Please make your best tax-deductible gift using this secure link: _**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zbqudabikik8kffm7qkd76itsluk3o38l3tai0a0_rp22sh2s8i6epb2ctg60pb4cdh2bs)**_ We deeply appreciate your partnership in promoting the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among younger Americans—that is essential to preserving free government. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 **P.S.** For a gift of $100 or more, we’ll send you our online course, **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,” in a handsome DVD box set. The course explores America’s history as a land of hope founded on high principles** and counters the far-Left’s false narrative about our country. Thank you so much for helping us promote intelligent patriotism—especially among younger Americans. _**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-great-american-story-dvd](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zmajeil18se2n6e12nr1bi296tngumqh6mbcip80_rp22sh2s8i6epb2ctg60pb4cdh2bs)**_

clean_body: Have you read about President Biden’s Ambassador to the United Nations? This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, Have you read about President Biden’s Ambassador to the United Nations? She is telling her fellow ambassadors from around the world that “white supremacy” is “weaved into [America’s] founding documents and principles.” Can you imagine being told that America’s glorious founding principle—the principle that “all men are created equal,” endowed by God with “unalienable rights”—embodies the idea of white supremacy? Can you imagine being told the same thing about our cherished Constitution , which is responsible for America becoming the freest, most prosperous nation in human history? That America’s United Nations Ambassador is promoting these lies is reprehensible. But even more reprehensible is the fact that so many K-12 and college students in America are being taught this same false narrative. Too many young Americans are not learning what makes America an exceptional nation and a beacon of liberty for the world. Instead, they learn that our great nation’s history is essentially a history of injustice—that America at its heart has always been racist and is undeserving of respect. Is it any wonder that so many younger Americans today feel an increasing attraction to so-called “critical race theory” and other ideas destructive of liberty? Is it any wonder that there is decreasing support among younger Americans for basic liberties that past generations have revered and taken for granted—liberties such as freedom of speech? It is easy to become discouraged by the Left’s dominance in our colleges and universities and its increasing influence in K-12 education. But we must not lose hope—we must fight back with the truth. Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education from the beginning. In fact, we produced a free online course that helps do just that, titled “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope.” And I’m asking for your help in promoting it to additional millions of Americans—especially younger Americans—and to expand our other critical outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide. You can help fund the promotion of this important course at this secure link: Historian and Hillsdale professor Wilfred McClay teaches the course based on his published history of America. “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope” presents a full, unbiased account of America’s past. Our goal in producing and promoting this free online course is to restore the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among our young people—that is essential to preserving free government. This work is the surest means of defending liberty—which is why we make every online course available free of charge to any citizen wishing to learn. “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope” is a powerful counterweight to The New York Times ’ “1619 Project,” which seeks to inject the idea that America is essentially unjust into the curricula of America’s K-12 schools. Of course, producing an online course and making it available free of charge requires significant resources—and promoting the course nationwide, which is essential, costs even more. To date, more than 118,000 Americans have enrolled in “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope” —but we must do more. Your support is critical to our success. As you may know, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student loans and grants. That’s why we can remain true to our mission on behalf of liberty, free of so many bureaucratic regulations that burden other colleges and universities. This independence also means that all of our work is entirely dependent on the support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. This is especially true of our national outreach efforts, including free online courses. Can I count on you today to help fund the promotion of “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope” to millions of Americans nationwide and expand our other educational outreach efforts with a generous tax-deductible gift of $100 or more? Please make your best tax-deductible gift using this secure link: We deeply appreciate your partnership in promoting the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among younger Americans—that is essential to preserving free government. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 P.S. For a gift of $100 or more, we’ll send you our online course, “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,” in a handsome DVD box set. The course explores America’s history as a land of hope founded on high principles and counters the far-Left’s false narrative about our country. Thank you so much for helping us promote intelligent patriotism—especially among younger Americans. Pop Acta Media | Your America PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

Hi, it’s Congressman Robert Garcia, the top Democrat on the House Oversight Committee.
There’s been a lot swirling in the news in recent weeks about Jeffrey Epstein. Trump and his MAGA allies were obsessed with Epstein during the campaign.
Trump is on record promising to release the Epstein files to the public. But now he’s backtracking, and Republicans in the House just voted to stop the release of the files.
When Elon Musk and Trump had their nasty public breakup, Musk told us that the reason he wouldn’t release them was because Trump would be implicated.
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111595638/557746459/789508428?refcode=250716_RG_Epstein&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2N2NhZmMyYS02YTYyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1VxfPhaQ4bwyEtoGHdAT8N09jB-LZursk_DOZ7cUoCE=)**
**We need to get to the bottom of this. And as House Oversight Committee chair, I promise to do just that.**
**[But I can’t do it until we win back the majority in the House of Representatives. So I’m asking: Can you pitch in $25 or more to help me win re-election and regain the majority for Democrats?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111595639/557746460/789508428?refcode=250716_RG_Epstein&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2N2NhZmMyYS02YTYyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1VxfPhaQ4bwyEtoGHdAT8N09jB-LZursk_DOZ7cUoCE=)**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111595640/557746461/-309737922?refcode=250716_RG_Epstein&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2N2NhZmMyYS02YTYyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1VxfPhaQ4bwyEtoGHdAT8N09jB-LZursk_DOZ7cUoCE=)

Robert

name: Kelloff  HQ
subject: We’ve got momentum on our side
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alex Kelloff for Colorado
body:
https://alexkelloff.com/ [https://alexkelloff.com/]
Hey folks,
Ever since Alex Kelloff launched his campaign, the outpouring of support from across Colorado has been nothing short of inspiring.
From town halls to meet-and-greets, people are showing up, speaking out, and rallying behind our shared vision for CO-03. And now, some of the most respected leaders in our community are stepping up and lending their voices to this movement.
Our campaign is proud to have earned the support of Former U.S. Representative John Salazar, Rep. Elizabeth Velasco, Rep. Matt Martinez, former CO-03 candidate Sol Sandoval, and Arnold Salazar—trailblazers and champions for Colorado’s working families, rural communities, and public lands.
Their support is more than a list of names—it’s a reflection of the momentum we’re building and the broad coalition coming together behind Alex’s campaign. It shows that this movement is about bringing people together and delivering real results for Colorado’s Third.
Now we’re asking: Will you join them? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_agk_email-25q3?refcode=X_250716_endorsementrecap_act]
WILL YOU ADD YOUR SUPPORT? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_agk_email-25q3?refcode=X_250716_endorsementrecap_act]
These are the people who share our values and our vision for what Colorado could be— if we had the right people in D.C.
John Salazar—a Colorado legend—has long exemplified what it means to put people over politics. His legacy of public service and integrity continues to inspire this campaign, and Alex is proud to carry that legacy forward.
Rep. Elizabeth Velasco is Alex’s own representative in rural Pitkin County—a fierce advocate for justice, working families, economic opportunity, and environmental stewardship.
Sol Sandoval, like our friend Adam Frisch, knows firsthand the challenges of running in this district. She’s been a fearless voice for Pueblo and for our CO-03 communities, too often left out of the conversation.
Arnold Salazar has spent a lifetime fighting to make the Valley stronger—from defending Adams State University to expanding access to mental health care and lifting up working families across the region.
And Rep. Matt Martinez, a true champion for the San Luis Valley, shares Alex’s commitment to protecting our water, standing up for agriculture, and ensuring no one has to choose between paying the bills and seeing a doctor.
This is how we win: by building a team that reflects the strength and spirit of CO-03. Let’s keep that energy alive and build something that will last, together. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_agk_email-25q3?refcode=X_250716_endorsementrecap_act]
STAND WITH ALEX [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_agk_email-25q3?refcode=X_250716_endorsementrecap_act]
— Kelloff HQ
https://alexkelloff.com/ [https://alexkelloff.com/]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_agk_email-25q3?refcode=X_250716_endorsementrecap_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_agk_email-25q3?refcode=X_250716_endorsementrecap_act]
Alex Kelloff is an accomplished entrepreneur, financial executive, and committed community advocate whose family’s Colorado heritage dates back to 1897.
His family has operated community-oriented businesses across Colorado—including Kelloff’s Food Stores and Kelloff’s Movie Manor—for over a century. He took that entrepreneurial spirit and became a seasoned financial executive at Jefferies and SBC Capital, focused on expanding IT infrastructure and high-speed internet to rural America, and a dedicated community advocate. Then he co-founded Armada Skis, one of the most innovative brands in the industry and on the slopes.
Now, Alex is running in one of the most competitive seats in the country.
Inspired by his father, Dr. Gary Kelloff, who dedicated decades to cancer research at the National Institutes of Health, he brings that same deep sense of purpose to this campaign.
In Congress, he’ll fight to create jobs, lower costs, preserve our public lands and water rights, protect our seniors, and defend our democratic institutions. He’ll listen to the people back home—and make sure they come first.
Help him flip our Colorado 3rd by chipping in now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_agk_email-25q3?refcode=X_250716_endorsementrecap_act]
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_agk_email-25q3?refcode=X_250716_endorsementrecap_act]
DONATE MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_agk_email-25q3?refcode=X_250716_endorsementrecap_act&recurring=1]

Alex Kelloff for Colorado
P.O. Box 27
Snowmass, CO 81654
United States

name: Cori Bush
subject: Rev. Dr. Stephany Rose Spaulding.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POLITIVIST ACTION PAC
body:
https://www.politivistaction.com [https://www.politivistaction.com]
Hi Peter,
Let me introduce you to someone who inspires me every single day; someone who leads with love, speaks truth with courage, and moves through the world with deep purpose.
Her name is Rev. Dr. Stephany Rose Spaulding, and she’s the heart behind our new campaign Movement 4 Freedom [https://www.movement4freedom.com/] —a campaign rooted in justice, safety, and liberation for all of us.
Stephany and I met back in 2019, when we were both candidates running to shake up the status quo in Congress. From the moment we connected, I knew she was special. She wasn’t running for power or prestige; she was running for the people. Just like me.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?refcode=x_250716_stephanyintro_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?refcode=x_250716_stephanyintro_act]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?refcode=x_250716_stephanyintro_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?refcode=x_250716_stephanyintro_act]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?refcode=x_250716_stephanyintro_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q3?refcode=x_250716_stephanyintro_act]
She’s a former tenured professor, a pastor, and a movement builder. She’s taught in classrooms, preached in pulpits, and marched in our streets. And through it all, she’s never stopped fighting for those who’ve been pushed aside and silenced.
Now, she’s calling us into something bigger than just one election. Movement 4 Freedom [https://www.movement4freedom.com/] [https://www.movement4freedom.com/] is a vision and a call to reimagine what justice really looks like. It’s about safety without criminalization. Healing instead of punishment. Solidarity over silence.
As spokesperson of Movement 4 Freedom, Stephany Rose is a firm believer in the power of collective action. She is determined to amplify marginalized voices, spearhead our educational campaigns, and champion direct action that fosters awareness and collaboration. She knows that true change requires collaboration, unity, and a commitment to equity.

clean_body: [] Hi Peter, Let me introduce you to someone who inspires me every single day; someone who leads with love, speaks truth with courage, and moves through the world with deep purpose. Her name is Rev. Dr. Stephany Rose Spaulding, and she’s the heart behind our new campaign Movement 4 Freedom [] —a campaign rooted in justice, safety, and liberation for all of us. Stephany and I met back in 2019, when we were both candidates running to shake up the status quo in Congress. From the moment we connected, I knew she was special. She wasn’t running for power or prestige; she was running for the people. Just like me. [] [] [] She’s a former tenured professor, a pastor, and a movement builder. She’s taught in classrooms, preached in pulpits, and marched in our streets. And through it all, she’s never stopped fighting for those who’ve been pushed aside and silenced. Now, she’s calling us into something bigger than just one election. Movement 4 Freedom [] [] is a vision and a call to reimagine what justice really looks like. It’s about safety without criminalization. Healing instead of punishment. Solidarity over silence. As spokesperson of Movement 4 Freedom, Stephany Rose is a firm believer in the power of collective action. She is determined to amplify marginalized voices, spearhead our educational campaigns, and champion direct action that fosters awareness and collaboration. She knows that true change requires collaboration, unity, and a commitment to equity. So I’m asking you—as someone who’s walked this path with her—to stand with Stephany today. Join this movement. name: Indiana Democrats
subject: Erin Houchin and Indiana Republicans Voted to Keep the Epstein Files Hidden
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Peter, We had a chance. A real chance to shine a light on one of the most horrific abuse networks in modern history. But instead of standing with survivors and the public’s right to know, **Rep. Erin Houchin** voted in the House Rules Committee to block the release of the Jeffrey Epstein files. Just hours later, **every single Indiana Republican** joined her on the House Floor to kill the effort to bring these documents to light, while **every Democrat voted to release the files.** [_**We’re building a campaign that won’t back down from this fight. But we can’t do it without your support.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111596327/557749172/1764064610?refcode=250716files&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDJlMjE1NS02YzYyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TxDjFF0EgmGi8jdLSLA2KQ-t-dd2hyAogmfBclbf4PY=) All it would’ve taken was **one** Republican. Just **one vote** from Indiana could’ve forced the release. Instead,**they all voted to keep Epstein’s secrets buried:**
* **Erin Houchin**
* **Rudy Yakym**
* **Marlin Stutzman**
* **Jim Baird**
* **Victoria Spartz**
* **Jefferson Shreve**
* **Mark Messmer**

They stayed silent to protect Donald Trump, who we all know was Epstein’s biggest client. This vote shows **the Republican Party never cared about children and they’ll do anything to protect powerful men like Donald Trump and Jeffrey Epstein.** This is exactly why we must fight harder than ever to elect leaders who believe in truth, accountability, and justice — not protecting the powerful. [_**Donate now to help us hold these officials accountable, and replace our Republican representatives with Democrats who will put the public first.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111596328/557749173/1764064610?refcode=250716files&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMDJlMjE1NS02YzYyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TxDjFF0EgmGi8jdLSLA2KQ-t-dd2hyAogmfBclbf4PY=) Whether it’s $5 or $50, your donation fuels this fight. We can’t let them think they can vote like this and face no consequences. **Hoosiers are watching. And we demand better.** Indiana Democrats

| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tadc0e322-cf41-4d96-a6ba-a87d2fff9ea7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T66ca6122-598c-46c0-82f1-21ed301d6a50/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Hi Peter, It’s Congresswoman Kristen McDonald Rivet, Democrat representing MI-08, and I’m reaching out with an urgent update: Outside GOP groups are pummeling us on the airwaves right now. In May and June, Mike Johnson’s super PAC spent more than $600,000 on deceptive ads attacking me. Now, we just got word that Donald Trump’s super PAC is jumping in with nearly $150,000 more. **This is now the most aggressive wave of GOP attacks against ****_any_**** House Democrat in the country.** [**We set an emergency goal of raising $20,000 before midnight tonight to respond and send a message that MI-08 is not for sale. Can you rush a split $10 donation between my campaign and Blue Amp Action**** ****today?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf7daf6c1-cf81-46d3-ac6f-3baa8fd7f058/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| Republicans know this seat is one of the most competitive in the country. They know I was one of the only Democrats to win a Trump-won district. And they’re betting that if they flood the airwaves early with lies and fear, they can buy this seat back. We must prove them wrong. That’s why today’s request is so important: [**Can you rush an urgent $10 donation between my campaign and ****Blue Amp Action**** today? If we want to take back the House next year, we must hold the line here in MI-08.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb82624ac-03e6-4561-9fc4-93d8d786642c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf9e8e131-a718-4b73-a578-b3adf1e3c11d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC | | or

Several states are considering creating their own _'Alligator Alcatraz'_ facilities. And the Trump administration is urging state GOP leaders to follow suit. _'Alligator Alcatraz'_ is just the beginning of a horrific GOP plan. Officials in Georgia and Arkansas revealed that they already have their own version of these inhumane detention facilities in the works. This situation makes one thing clear: Trump’s regime is looking to the states to do its bidding and is depending on MAGA Republicans up and down the ballot to rubber-stamp their cruelty. clean_body: Trump needs his state-level allies. The most direct way to fight back is by defeating them at the ballot box and electing state Democrats who won’t bow to his tirade of authoritarianism. | | | | | ---|--- Several states are considering creating their own 'Alligator Alcatraz' facilities. And the Trump administration is urging state GOP leaders to follow suit. 'Alligator Alcatraz' is just the beginning of a horrific GOP plan. Officials in Georgia and Arkansas revealed that they already have their own version of these inhumane detention facilities in the works. This situation makes one thing clear: Trump’s regime is looking to the states to do its bidding and is depending on MAGA Republicans up and down the ballot to rubber-stamp their cruelty. We can’t sit back while these atrocities are being carried out. Knowing that Trump needs the support of his state-level allies, the most direct way we can fight back is by defeating them at the ballot box and electing state Democrats who won’t bow to his tirade of authoritarianism. Democratic power is the strongest tool we have to combat GOP extremism. Dear Friend,
---
The Radical Democrats think they’ve finally got me.
---
**You see, a Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
---
_I’m left with no escape and no lifeline, especially after they’ve already STRIPPED me of my law licenses!_
---
But even though the most powerful man in the country legally cannot step in to save me from being **JAILED** for the rest of my life, the most powerful force absolutely can: _THE AMERICAN PEOPLE_.
---
With my back against the wall, I’m turning to the _ONE_ _THING_ that can save me: _**the collective voices of MILLIONS of patriots like YOU.**_
---

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: Why is California Gavin Newsom in my hometown?
body:
I can't think of a better gift than being criticized by Hollywood Newsom because I voted for President Trump's One Big Beautiful Bill.

|
---
Well, we now know how many liberals there are in Seneca, South Carolina, Fellow American, they all fit in one room with CA Governor Gavin Newsom.

Gavin Newsom spent the morning attacking me in my hometown, on my birthday, just because I voted for President Trump's One Big Beautiful Bill.

I can't think of a better gift in South Carolina.

I know why Gavin Newsom doesn't like this bill; it's everything the liberals hate. And everything that we wouldn't have been able to pass if Democrats had control of the Senate or the White House.

| [** PROTECT OUR
SENATE MAJORITY >> **](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zj11t2jsduo3hshit5i2r2t37rg1tgojbaj0l31o_rp22sh2s8i6epb2ctg62p36cdh2bs)
---

The One Big Beautiful Bill cuts taxes. It reduces spending, with a debt reduction of over $400 billion. It's also the largest investment in the history of the country for border security, and it makes our military stronger.

Instead of taking care of the mess that is California, Newsom is more concerned with campaigning in our early presidential primary state, South Carolina.

While I'll take the digs, Newsom's Hollywood friends are ready to dump millions into my race, again.

Democrats like Gavin Newsom helped my 2020 opponent raise more money than any other Democrat in South Carolina Senate history. We must be prepared for this flood of liberal cash **[and be ready to fight back against their attacks!](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zj05dhs7k2sm2mnluco1ttlnsj7sq0thstm7r1a8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2ctg62p36cdh2bs)**

**[Will you help me by chipping in even just $5 before the end of the day?](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z7uouki7nmemt6gruf4n9if41519kfsssebu5p0o_rp22sh2s8i6epb2ctg62p36cdh2bs)**

[** SAY NO TO CA NEWSOM >> **](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zug7kkrj9tifmdsmsa3g3l4bkk9bu4oaab6ogcb8_rp22sh2s8i6epb2ctg62p36cdh2bs)
---

I hope you have safe travels back to California, Governor Newsom. I appreciate your shout-outs, and I hope they continue!

Thanks,
Lindsey Graham

[** STAND WITH TEAM GRAHAM >> **](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z1a0g12ds178n6mitlcqm87re0v1ggrgevauvcrg_rp22sh2s8i6epb2ctg62p36cdh2bs)

He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges.

[** SUPPORT SENATOR GRAHAM **](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zrtf1lcbq7q73tiqt3qjluu7bhphcekbfelmduuo_rp22sh2s8i6epb2ctg62p36cdh2bs)
