body:
See it for yourself >>>

| |
---
| | | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Fi_aY54Q2C43UwIUB3CPEA~~/AARclBA~/Q45i0t-zvdNLTfujhxJnr482MP8yQeiLI4O7l7DFOTq5-Dojt1lezZGjoJ5_FYzajZgXS9uH10hYS4LHVxhEHV7zuc7sOFTz1aGPNAepbQ93t5L58GZ6iqbT0b556JQFt79s4CxmGH3XF5Xt6LL2u-3RU9H5p5_RN-VXg0mk519iYqOuzrpkQ_Lyf-jkUJmZ-eXn-kI5NhtDc_f7DJqdXMhN5d1xYY4Q6AN2emGCx9cZH9b5rTCIEOgd-L4OEAAdfMX9db7ShSp8tE8IYgLuLoDauPko7HWx6MO4qvp2a_I75vSzCkxIaE5Uu0vos-rv-ML7iz2hRSPMfogLjP8IGvNW0Croo5eG5c-BQkZB_iDvXFewzZxJ6OYPW3yTQsQ_-57cw47SxOv6hOUBHuSI4g~~)
---

_Yep, that 's me._

When this picture was taken, I had no clue what the Lord was about to bless me with.

**My name is Young Kim, and my story is anything but ordinary.**

I was born in South Korea to two loving parents. My family wanted one thing above all else - _a shot at the American Dream._

When we moved to America, we didn't speak a word of English. All we had was faith, a strong work ethic, and an unshakable belief that if you work hard, you can achieve anything.

I took those firmly held beliefs and I got right to work. I learned English, put myself through college, and started a small business.

**Needless to say, Friend, I achieved the American Dream.** I'm a proud mother, wife, small business owner, and a humble servant of God. I was overflowing with gratitude, and I needed to give back to the country that gave me everything.

So I made the life-changing decision to run for Congress. I poured blood, sweat, and tears into my campaign, and at the end of it all, _I lost._

We came up a few thousand votes short. It was one of the toughest moments of my life, but I remembered the values my parents taught me and every hardship I had overcome. I _refused_ to let that be the end, so I ran for Congress again, and this time, we won.

**Every day since then, I 've gone to fight for the American people against self-serving politicians. I'm fighting for YOU.**

But when you make as big of an impact in DC as I have, you're bound to make some powerful enemies. For years, the Democrat Money Machine has spent huge amounts to take me down, but I fear that this time they might win.

We've never seen them act like this before. They're pledging millions to defeat me and steal the House Majority from the GOP. They've already recruited a top candidate to run against me. I'll be blunt: **We 're in serious trouble.**

This is why I'm coming to you today: Friend. I need your help. _**[Can I count on you to chip in a small donation to defend my campaign from the Left's attacks?](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/aarJs-Bkg7wCQib2oOu1Pw~~/AARclBA~/jH3wb3GsEv3QLy-n4EkQ227HkVEtkiN7qfp0qc7wbg5_EAVPmTNuVdXg_VLj7vDTXw-FMj0wCyFO4VmBEW8dLn82llrVPQaz8ON890P3q-XRBpWeuyI9_mog5sM5i_ydbAQx7gyKm9X2xAtNgGAyWX5mPh2tSW-6xkHaMGFhIUPfS88MB6zvH2yD1l0lXuzSoPQHlE-uYX8kdX77wTfUc43J419-y-_Ufc1wNI1tGCDPOf_NdztIHAeXkm_1kjRqreLi1lwJW-UQGkHGPoNaz9msVHkavdMoa8TIxYNfOki9-ck09r49c-H3pB2iLjiihX3y93IZxhgDbb7Ee2Ce85XZF1fvsvyResDaZqdwDkCd7bW9yQx7D_BqLfKBRx_eZEg33-EmT5m144BJosiJpKKiKQKch6j6NlOgZZlPFwY~ "Can I count on you to chip in a small donation to defend my campaign from the Left’s attacks?")**_

clean_body: See it for yourself >>> | | | | | | ~~ Yep, that 's me. When this picture was taken, I had no clue what the Lord was about to bless me with. My name is Young Kim, and my story is anything but ordinary. I was born in South Korea to two loving parents. My family wanted one thing above all else - a shot at the American Dream. When we moved to America, we didn't speak a word of English. All we had was faith, a strong work ethic, and an unshakable belief that if you work hard, you can achieve anything. I took those firmly held beliefs and I got right to work. I learned English, put myself through college, and started a small business. Needless to say, Friend, I achieved the American Dream. I'm a proud mother, wife, small business owner, and a humble servant of God. I was overflowing with gratitude, and I needed to give back to the country that gave me everything. So I made the life-changing decision to run for Congress. I poured blood, sweat, and tears into my campaign, and at the end of it all, I lost. We came up a few thousand votes short. It was one of the toughest moments of my life, but I remembered the values my parents taught me and every hardship I had overcome. I refused to let that be the end, so I ran for Congress again, and this time, we won. Every day since then, I 've gone to fight for the American people against self-serving politicians. I'm fighting for YOU. But when you make as big of an impact in DC as I have, you're bound to make some powerful enemies. For years, the Democrat Money Machine has spent huge amounts to take me down, but I fear that this time they might win. We've never seen them act like this before. They're pledging millions to defeat me and steal the House Majority from the GOP. They've already recruited a top candidate to run against me. I'll be blunt: We 're in serious trouble. This is why I'm coming to you today: Friend. I need your help. ~ "Can I count on you to chip in a small donation to defend my campaign from the Left’s attacks?" | | | ~~ | | ~~ This country has given me countless opportunities, and I could not be more grateful. Now I want to make sure that EVERY American has the same opportunity I had at the American Dream. I hope I can count on you. Peter, I spent years calling plays from the sidelines, but you don’t need to be a football coach to see what’s happening now: **The Left is calling plays straight out of the anarchist’s playbook.**

They’re demonizing ICE. They’re vilifying our police. And now, they’re surprised when Radicals start aiming their weapons at the very men and women sworn to protect us?

**_Give me a break._ **

If you attack our law enforcement, you’re attacking America itself. I don’t care how loud the Left gets—**I’m standing shoulder-to-shoulder with every badge and uniform in this country.**

My message is simple:**If you’re under fire, defend yourself. Period.**

_I’ll never cave to the mob._ And I’ll never stop fighting for the brave folks who keep us safe.

| [ **BACK THE BADGE** ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=0c6fd5ec405243baad102a64692985f6&_e=2jmgmV4i4Dd_bZTE9V2rvM0yjHQoCFPaeIBloeSiwSmTevUNl9YSQnFAZJGKV9J49AE3sIX6QNNqfp1SfoCfKD4lnBRebdlpr38_w56IjJIOpgshvUvxnlN8jMt5Gj78mwLURK3FsKLd7z--uZq-hQs4idIFoeOFaY-zfBWR9bBSDAs2cuwNN11LkLcUYHk_Px7Z5fzvESbqSrseJjyi2RE5ZLinvgfYzmJF46ym_gIlFzSc2HZLiSuuCz5cq-TCVa9yKBpTtZ_p4O047y27Jl0d6yzzkkSk50OUP0kUanl8drZ_lmIts9LA8x6Iai9eQDfuULoarS9r2gWMKLi58jzv0grEK4zEspuuv0ysFHXcD0Dy9CBIc8FDg8i55uDbYA7fepoz8OaG5DbSev5ghEryiCNmnJ151q7ilS5YY1-F2YCIEzg0QR6I1Wsy-c1bhsuqVKSA41U4VRq5SGIPRUoGpSY6ZJvGlzG3_tuHlTAnto7waM88Z-W9oxUUWNOLnTG_quMlNq26lUi4FM5KGTEP4LoOQxguihpuE5Lau459DEX9BFosCP3pWPpVWDR6)

If we don’t get loud now, _**the Left’s chaos will become the norm.**_ Let’s put a stop to it—together.

For Alabama,
Coach Tommy Tuberville

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=0c6fd5ec405243baad102a64692985f6&_e=2jmgmV4i4Dd_bZTE9V2rvM0yjHQoCFPaeIBloeSiwSmTevUNl9YSQnFAZJGKV9J49AE3sIX6QNNqfp1SfoCfKD4lnBRebdlpr38_w56IjJIOpgshvUvxnlN8jMt5Gj78mwLURK3FsKLd7z--uZq-hQs4idIFoeOFaY-zfBWR9bBSDAs2cuwNN11LkLcUYHk_Ac-g0b8w-40eLTgckclKjimDVOgy9uzk58Ahi1_MantoHGolT-IiDV1TRiQJMwhynltHVPAuIuuwlxfyHxiaqr-sP-KfDFgBsVIGkidB8Dvt9TkOiv0xyD7tKSB7W7yW02j9j1fPoP--2iWhXbztZH-KNgT6pAwhu-jFmdKPYWm_gZOul77NCR3xeMzh-ebw0iALPoc-Rb9paC96Z8M15pQKr6DF6nnT3yHA3GuLeqznwCONitn4Zu-3CKHBVwkA2mVYbP-jPn9831Y6T1T-57VlTDk3xuu1GjSZDoGxuhZhMaJcYvvUzAkPiX4MenwhN_7oGBn08KnVCX6_1CDFhevmCbyatISUWV_sHX6pIlVjsI038cHEG-w3FVTjjcYD)

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football’s 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville’s time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year’s Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP’s SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul “Bear” Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=0c6fd5ec405243baad102a64692985f6&_e=2jmgmV4i4Dd_bZTE9V2rvM0yjHQoCFPaeIBloeSiwSmTevUNl9YSQnFAZJGKV9J49AE3sIX6QNNqfp1SfoCfKD4lnBRebdlpr38_w56IjJIOpgshvUvxnlN8jMt5Gj78mwLURK3FsKLd7z--uZq-hQs4idIFoeOFaY-zfBWR9bBSDAs2cuwNN11LkLcUYHk_8GzhJD28rzf2OY7XmxB3aBBDqwNm5597Ef5bsBD4rQKJkWbLyU3NHcpj3GTKkBqKmNc42Vr3R28Y5t_eBF0Fp1Md4v9ENgLcvNN9A0lcIvubXsj3Y5D1iB69vB0ORg9CMOTKDfZKD5gaScQZ2w6RNYVRX1qKVoaoguW2lpsVg9h-APwsQ6ZrZAwcYi_P2ZzFS-URDpi9hCWAFnuRdx2LM3EyVUjZUinX8jGnpykQdvkCyJUQEgOYaZSV-qcBgjZ4x4rhlRRkFf3SsXAxt4bI-yt8Gl3YGGn7IkFmw34BVSAIejO8EmmILLR3p35vzCwf_cClKeyVQffN0siwz4gftoMXxUgYLaRAiHh86wymnGg529qSpYK_3-xenYnm0Ecy)

The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE FOR GOVERNOR, INC PO Box 43124 Birmingham, AL 35243 Copyright (C) 2025 Tuberville for Governor, Inc, All rights reserved.

subject: A clear line in the sand:

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111598770/557758391/-1623651544?refcode=em-7.16.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDRjM2VkZDctNzE2Mi1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kLFYh5N8IUDCaPS7aAwNUjtvIa9qyRGm8gv6DGVtImc=)

Friend,

We are officially half-past July, but we are not quite where we hoped to be with our fundraising. Before I personally ask you to chip in [**$3**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111598771/557758392/-1623651544?refcode=em-7.16.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDRjM2VkZDctNzE2Mi1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kLFYh5N8IUDCaPS7aAwNUjtvIa9qyRGm8gv6DGVtImc=) toward re-electing the first woman to ever represent CA-30, I need to make clear why this matters right now.

**In Washington, there’s a clear battle line that’s been drawn: You’re either fighting for the American people, or standing with the billionaire class. There is no middle ground.**

That’s why in Congress, just as I did in the Assembly, every vote I make is grounded in whether or not it truly meets the needs of this district, of each of you.

I’ve championed bold policies to create more affordable housing, protect our vulnerable communities, and make the country follow California’s model for environmental sustainability and clean renewable energy, even as deep-pocketed special interests have fought us.

But in a post-_Citizens United_ world, I cannot do this alone. And every seat we can flip in Washington will go a long way toward winning even bigger battles.

Remember: Action is the best antidote to anxiety. And we all can play a part however we’re able.

That’s why I need to ask today:

[**If you can, please pitch in $3 by midnight to help us stay on track and build the resources to help flip the House blue, and once again become a majority that reflects the American people.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111598772/557758393/-1623651544?refcode=em-7.16.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDRjM2VkZDctNzE2Mi1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kLFYh5N8IUDCaPS7aAwNUjtvIa9qyRGm8gv6DGVtImc=)

clean_body: | = Friend, We are officially half-past July, but we are not quite where we hoped to be with our fundraising. Before I personally ask you to chip in = toward re-electing the first woman to ever represent CA-30, I need to make clear why this matters right now. In Washington, there’s a clear battle line that’s been drawn: You’re either fighting for the American people, or standing with the billionaire class. There is no middle ground. That’s why in Congress, just as I did in the Assembly, every vote I make is grounded in whether or not it truly meets the needs of this district, of each of you. I’ve championed bold policies to create more affordable housing, protect our vulnerable communities, and make the country follow California’s model for environmental sustainability and clean renewable energy, even as deep-pocketed special interests have fought us. But in a post-Citizens United world, I cannot do this alone. And every seat we can flip in Washington will go a long way toward winning even bigger battles. Remember: Action is the best antidote to anxiety. And we all can play a part however we’re able. That’s why I need to ask today: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you, Laura | | Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress Laura's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! name: Lindsey Graham
subject: Why is California Gavin Newsom in my hometown?
body:
I can’t think of a better gift than being criticized by Hollywood Newsom because I voted for President Trump’s One Big Beautiful Bill. |
---
Well, we now know how many liberals there are in Seneca, South Carolina, Fellow American - they all fit in one room with CA Governor Gavin Newsom.

Gavin Newsom spent the morning attacking me in my hometown, on my birthday, just because I voted for President Trump's One Big Beautiful Bill.

I can't think of a better gift in South Carolina.

I know why Gavin Newsom doesn't like this bill; it's everything the liberals hate. And everything that we wouldn't have been able to pass if Democrats had control of the Senate or the White House.

| [**PROTECT OUR
SENATE MAJORITY >> **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=baa8395152df4a1fbb167cce39f6d703&_e=kx4W00ILz_OMk0KsMzUdQy7Vtk1kAOi6S8LGtMXXvM_GLzAC4N7rx3o9ZkxtUkS8MNL_No5-he-x-sfz5ppboqXXKOuIjWeMk1bHdOkqKE3UEuuEqlsBW1lqQtb93PcAhmtWiqGwT2nC1UvZAjra7ForC7OSkUAhSzghgfs5OHG9BNveJ19PLJgMdThgNDWfHX-07rBPzurIdud9lyygZool-DTHUGiAKunK9p08uTyzt8uBpRd7Y0STn2F0OxEthMt0T42qOemu673doFr9JLISlp4AS9IJ1hKlk08ds8H48aufFB54XdtXBaN6C-Fa1Lqmq05RaSM4JnzUkEXvGmbMG814opsVApxcpQ2QGP_VFfLtUiPzsnBiG5aHKKBaydhVpQ4yQDlQmrhGuPZ7PtGmAql6GIj0P7qpPOMpIV_J6ZPa88kDFxGM2-HlrCFhoZZFI1SmRQl5Td_00BZKCurMuxhQUuEyfz6VePE3MIxVMA27S7HPVb56bWZPzyj1PtToIncfbtJy7g1wnOtlrXzsS-XWHGweiuHMUDQkQUHM8CzlA9aAR4v28AhJDHRbhrSQlGGj9Z1wn4hW7IgjRsk87dsyE6NQzW3SjDqly3_sWKeEGlH9GHzBhg2vY3YtIM6I2tEn-y4sf08PykGJqPrBApeTnTAHzYXyVcIyA9AstCVgUKBjZWBdCC-5qlr4)
---

The One Big Beautiful Bill cuts taxes. It reduces spending, with a debt reduction of over $400 billion. It's also the largest investment in the history of the country for border security, and it makes our military stronger.

Instead of taking care of the mess that is California, Newsom is more concerned with campaigning in our early presidential primary state, South Carolina.

While I'll take the digs, Newsom's Hollywood friends are ready to dump millions into my race, again.

Democrats like Gavin Newsom helped my 2020 opponent raise more money than any other Democrat in South Carolina Senate history. We must be prepared for this flood of liberal cash **[and be ready to fight back against their attacks!](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=baa8395152df4a1fbb167cce39f6d703&_e=kx4W00ILz_OMk0KsMzUdQy7Vtk1kAOi6S8LGtMXXvM_GLzAC4N7rx3o9ZkxtUkS8MNL_No5-he-x-sfz5ppboqXXKOuIjWeMk1bHdOkqKE3UEuuEqlsBW1lqQtb93PcAhmtWiqGwT2nC1UvZAjra7ForC7OSkUAhSzghgfs5OHG9BNveJ19PLJgMdThgNDWfHX-07rBPzurIdud9lyygZool-DTHUGiAKunK9p08uTw9XuM2rErtBTh0MNS6Jg-Zuwtie3CB2IeQc1sjxoPJbBuyTV6ph-KsPqZ2d8Y0RYy_fmbmugyPspCdsiYHXO4u16OMgUlXEIHCKrJQALZPOLi69ZYnoE74Sr-OGQYPox9tuiFE8AVsvFXI1we1q2oveIDZMG5eNPIVKxTflmzjT76TL_NbZwILjnWlMp-sZksMfgbjZFM5HdSjsiXS7Gm94bsfBSPIWxHYDynZesodKU8tuX3H4NouivZalYjzy0EM-Q_e6V9kj77IduOd9pVDgUsffAV2VHlx5B0MUh0aebKyfpTVqDlbZeX7IBYshEg4lqgd_Xgew18Czx3hbcGRuG-em5RHu2JQ8UxalMwumK49PQwXQH1MFCPFbJ2bz4J-bNedauoLti_zkwi0Vuydo7_8oR4fO9U4VzreQbP_BtdTMre2FM-ycSlnYdwUcf3i_j_-Bv3ZpkJfZcNmzi6R)**

clean_body: I can’t think of a better gift than being criticized by Hollywood Newsom because I voted for President Trump’s One Big Beautiful Bill. | Well, we now know how many liberals there are in Seneca, South Carolina, Fellow American - they all fit in one room with CA Governor Gavin Newsom. Gavin Newsom spent the morning attacking me in my hometown, on my birthday, just because I voted for President Trump's One Big Beautiful Bill. I can't think of a better gift in South Carolina. I know why Gavin Newsom doesn't like this bill; it's everything the liberals hate. And everything that we wouldn't have been able to pass if Democrats had control of the Senate or the White House. | The One Big Beautiful Bill cuts taxes. It reduces spending, with a debt reduction of over $400 billion. It's also the largest investment in the history of the country for border security, and it makes our military stronger. Instead of taking care of the mess that is California, Newsom is more concerned with campaigning in our early presidential primary state, South Carolina. While I'll take the digs, Newsom's Hollywood friends are ready to dump millions into my race, again. Democrats like Gavin Newsom helped my 2020 opponent raise more money than any other Democrat in South Carolina Senate history. We must be prepared for this flood of liberal cash I hope you have safe travels back to California, Governor Newsom. I appreciate your shout-outs, and I hope they continue! Thanks, Lindsey Graham In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges. | We want to make sure you're a proud member of Team Graham, and we don't want to bother you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, please . | Paid for by Graham Majority Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Team Graham Inc, Fund for America's Future, Security Is Strength PAC, and NRSC.

Trump said he'd leave abortion to the states—but now his government is trying to force clinics to close even in states where abortion and other reproductive care are legally protected. Today, the Center for Reproductive Rights filed a lawsuit to block the cruel and dangerous new federal law that strips Medicaid funding from reproductive health providers.

[**We brought this case on behalf of Maine Family Planning, the state's largest network of reproductive health clinics.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111599034/557759235/1268344831?sourceid=1150803&utm_campaign=26emaus-0701aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medicaid&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODkyNzU0Ni03MjYyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z5pDHxaSlUdBha2iGSMES9twEMJ4iCeRonX144U13vI=&emci=c7927546-7262-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=c8927546-7262-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237) The Trump administration is targeting essential, legal care and threatening to shut down clinics that thousands of Mainers rely on. [**Your donations will have an immediate impact on our litigation.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111599035/557759236/1268344831?sourceid=1150803&utm_campaign=26emaus-0701aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medicaid&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODkyNzU0Ni03MjYyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z5pDHxaSlUdBha2iGSMES9twEMJ4iCeRonX144U13vI=&emci=c7927546-7262-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=c8927546-7262-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237)
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111599036/557759237/1268344831?sourceid=1150803&utm_campaign=26emaus-0701aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medicaid&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODkyNzU0Ni03MjYyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z5pDHxaSlUdBha2iGSMES9twEMJ4iCeRonX144U13vI=&emci=c7927546-7262-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=c8927546-7262-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237)
Our lawsuit argues that this law is unconstitutional and we're asking the court to block it so MFP clinics can keep providing essential care. [**Half of MFP's patients rely on Medicaid, and many live in rural areas with no other health care options. MFP has already stopped accepting new Medicaid patients for primary care and may be forced to close up to half its clinics—cutting off care for all patients, regardless of insurance.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111599037/557759238/1268344831?sourceid=1150803&utm_campaign=26emaus-0701aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medicaid&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODkyNzU0Ni03MjYyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z5pDHxaSlUdBha2iGSMES9twEMJ4iCeRonX144U13vI=&emci=c7927546-7262-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=c8927546-7262-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237)
> _"Congress and the Trump Administration have taken away patients' freedom to choose their own trusted health care provider and have cut off access to care for thousands of Mainers. It's wrong and counter to our values as Americans and Mainers. Every person should live with dignity and autonomy,"_ said George Hill, president and CEO of Maine Family Planning.

This is just the beginning. If the federal government can defund legal reproductive health care in Maine, no state is safe. [**With your help, we will continue to fight back.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111599039/557759240/1268344831?sourceid=1150803&utm_campaign=26emaus-0701aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=medicaid&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODkyNzU0Ni03MjYyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z5pDHxaSlUdBha2iGSMES9twEMJ4iCeRonX144U13vI=&emci=c7927546-7262-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=c8927546-7262-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237)

clean_body: A devastating new law defunded care for thousands of Mainers | | | ---|--- Peter, | "FUND THE FIGHT" Trump said he'd leave abortion to the states—but now his government is trying to force clinics to close even in states where abortion and other reproductive care are legally protected. Today, the Center for Reproductive Rights filed a lawsuit to block the cruel and dangerous new federal law that strips Medicaid funding from reproductive health providers. The Trump administration is targeting essential, legal care and threatening to shut down clinics that thousands of Mainers rely on. Our lawsuit argues that this law is unconstitutional and we're asking the court to block it so MFP clinics can keep providing essential care. "Congress and the Trump Administration have taken away patients' freedom to choose their own trusted health care provider and have cut off access to care for thousands of Mainers. It's wrong and counter to our values as Americans and Mainers. Every person should live with dignity and autonomy," said George Hill, president and CEO of Maine Family Planning. "DONATE NOW" This is just the beginning. If the federal government can defund legal reproductive health care in Maine, no state is safe. In solidarity, Nancy Northup President & CEO "DONATE NOW" | | | | ---|---|--- The Center for Reproductive Rights uses the power of law to advance reproductive rights as fundamental human rights around the world. (C) Center for Reproductive Rights Center for Reproductive Rights 199 Water St. New York, NY 10038 United States

name: Sean Feucht
subject: FWD: 5 Years of Faithfulness, 5 Years of Testimonies!
body:
Sent from my iPhone| | | Sean Feucht here—I just wanted to make sure you saw this email. God has done some amazing things through Let Us Worship over the past five years, and I wanted to share just a few of the testimonies!

If you have a minute, **[watch this video](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=255d7e1fe97643e787126390ccfa096b&_e=kvUVHg31l2ZKESF2ydH445EqKIj1oESZwlww_fSa6KUi82YyS38tj0jCnGwVZ6VLy03zDmYTfZlF-AuicvaM_-UnTX-wsa6mEib93xIpl50B-G12FvhzQPyrbC1y2LmLNzV6HOzNbzrSGu2wTfYioa-biHy0xDowzC61kgnjtQdxwu29VHs7dht_w8pyf8Y_QdMV_b2mlLCG5wU7ejnpvFCv0H0dm2JycoRG49S-PzY5ES-75QeRi-xXwuWsauRnNeuKx75y87iCWcEc62vKfEYAiVKdHaG3P9KWapeGlFrFh5KIDahuoTI9koxnFrMfFaWO-YxloWYFIVlMtfH8b22DZSPMf1bucxJM04vEOiWAJOXdE92PcuJhkomlHmyMM0otB-y8eY4n_TzznfFqGXuTXDtZSSv72cG4yd8qV0RLj4cLVVU5sZmWmJ9y7F3bICDFs-M_0PnNfD_VMlLjyQ%3D%3D)** —and if you feel led, help fund Let Us Worship so we can continue bringing revival for five more years and beyond.

Till all hear,
SeanSent from my iPhone \-------Forwarded message-------

Dear Peter,
---
God has been so good to us—He’s done more in the past five years than anyone could have ever asked or imagined! We’ve witnessed incredible things: people healed of sickness and disease, people set free from addiction, and people delivered from the cold grip of depression. We put together just a few testimonies from the past few years—I hope these stories will encourage and embolden you in your faith. [**WATCH THE TESTIMONIES HERE >>>**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=255d7e1fe97643e787126390ccfa096b&_e=kvUVHg31l2ZKESF2ydH445EqKIj1oESZwlww_fSa6KUi82YyS38tj0jCnGwVZ6VLy03zDmYTfZlF-AuicvaM_-UnTX-wsa6mEib93xIpl50B-G12FvhzQPyrbC1y2LmLNzV6HOzNbzrSGu2wTfYioa-biHy0xDowzC61kgnjtQebGGhY2nv73WRd4rPO-KLHN7qs6LOtt2SFOdM5mB2Ab_1OoyoghA10WS5yv2uN4NQWCLzxfLH-uPIhbMq-c4wTLpJ00ocjSpC4qenlXCCRDt4eaYk7IdfCOAEcYGsxhZDGBYuFt30HCEAq5icDk3NbjuxJQ4aGVgeTWAP2Q-vSRjuzb9v1lYgO_l3yAAjLefcVsqAFGRsadt69OC82IS4PpWlvde4wpEfbfgbh96hwrI1Ki7ce8x_0cGRZ5BFmWApZEfQz0r60qwL5rj7NflFzHnFgmp-jOqeFSrGKZniEjg%3D%3D) Some ministries are funded by ticket sales—**not us!** Every revival we hold is **free of charge**. We want to offer up the sound of worship to heaven, and we don’t charge anyone to join in the celebration. Jesus lived a life of service without charging anything, relying on the faith and generosity of others to fuel His miracles and ministry. We’re committed to following that example. That’s why we ask for donations from Believers like you—so we never have to charge admission at our revivals. [**HELP KEEP LET US WORSHIP FREE >>>**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=255d7e1fe97643e787126390ccfa096b&_e=kvUVHg31l2ZKESF2ydH445EqKIj1oESZwlww_fSa6KUi82YyS38tj0jCnGwVZ6VLy03zDmYTfZlF-AuicvaM_-UnTX-wsa6mEib93xIpl50B-G12FvhzQPyrbC1y2LmLNzV6HOzNbzrSGu2wTfYioa-biHy0xDowzC61kgnjtQfAw6oTbwrMhMpho4GPUuVeQ5EQ7olT7CX921m_pXCQm2AxKByOT0eLLx7Erzuq281rYoGEhls4p_akpiBbXIkeCypWgOrb4AqBlINZvaGbwZdEpiYP07AAcytBczFJXdt7xutixTiLYp0mU9gVBkINXgOvFjbvyE8LePbbBFsLY52ac9zjJSxw4Z-aB6nPzI4Uwh-tObjMsaVbYlhFt1z4cAMP8Rv4ogTugRQHfYxCd0LapfudAp5jqK_RnX1h-274MNNG11uZvdWOx_B0xCenyVcj-FeQVGYrMxWpf9ydpg%3D%3D) When we set out on this journey, both Believers and non-Believers told us our radical model was unsustainable—that it would fizzle out. But we had faith. We kept going where He sent us. And here we are—**five years in and more passionate than ever!** If you believe in the call to bring revival to America and beyond, please consider contributing. You have no idea how the seeds we’ve sown—and continue to sow—will impact the world! [**HELP FUND 5 MORE YEARS OF LET US WORSHIP >>>**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=255d7e1fe97643e787126390ccfa096b&_e=kvUVHg31l2ZKESF2ydH445EqKIj1oESZwlww_fSa6KUi82YyS38tj0jCnGwVZ6VLy03zDmYTfZlF-AuicvaM_-UnTX-wsa6mEib93xIpl50B-G12FvhzQPyrbC1y2LmLNzV6HOzNbzrSGu2wTfYioa-biHy0xDowzC61kgnjtQcGDBZBj_zLZl0b7k6w-TmnLcWjpIOZGLRfuBIgFH9mpYEbdadHHJLeVFJrdersG1UtFkBKH5IWlzj_3yz1gXksMaV-IwyNc9vuwm9DCD8wNg7EqjH7P1wQKif-ut94S9XkzI_eiQgfP7Ou3mFLt4FCTnNDeLG6y4TsUZg_rpPTijgIifWFsD38smYkTipVdnN3SzjZY0o2THikmhsorRuWd6wiImS7QAhPDqn8A7szhuoumM3z3OkjO1Q5mOqDO0ASUQJA8Ha8tqPfM1vMtFQWMZ-YepzQDwDUhNT8l1yAJQ%3D%3D)

clean_body: Sent from my iPhone| | | Sean Feucht here—I just wanted to make sure you saw this email. God has done some amazing things through Let Us Worship over the past five years, and I wanted to share just a few of the testimonies! If you have a minute, —and if you feel led, help fund Let Us Worship so we can continue bringing revival for five more years and beyond. Till all hear, SeanSent from my iPhone \-------Forwarded message------- From: Sean Feucht Date: Tuesday, July 15, 2025 To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Subject: 5 Years of Faithfulness, 5 Years of Testimonies! | | | | | Dear Peter, God has been so good to us—He’s done more in the past five years than anyone could have ever asked or imagined! We’ve witnessed incredible things: people healed of sickness and disease, people set free from addiction, and people delivered from the cold grip of depression. We put together just a few testimonies from the past few years—I hope these stories will encourage and embolden you in your faith. Some ministries are funded by ticket sales—not us! Every revival we hold is free of charge. We want to offer up the sound of worship to heaven, and we don’t charge anyone to join in the celebration. Jesus lived a life of service without charging anything, relying on the faith and generosity of others to fuel His miracles and ministry. We’re committed to following that example. That’s why we ask for donations from Believers like you—so we never have to charge admission at our revivals. When we set out on this journey, both Believers and non-Believers told us our radical model was unsustainable—that it would fizzle out. But we had faith. We kept going where He sent us. And here we are—five years in and more passionate than ever! If you believe in the call to bring revival to America and beyond, please consider contributing. You have no idea how the seeds we’ve sown—and continue to sow—will impact the world! | | Till all hear, Sean | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- INTERNATIONAL DONORS— DONATE Donate by Check or Money Order Sean Feucht Ministries 310 Third Street NEWashington, DC 20002 Contributions are tax-deductible. | | Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Let Us Worship | |

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Direct
subject: Does Harvard have a right to your money?
body:
Did you know that the Trump administration froze over $2.2 billion in taxpayer funds for Harvard University?

| _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/u/1w3pp2nOca-MqVFe-BPqzKWs1RaXMOmKlHfHDkNOZtt_uD6liGqIsLrrra7atrbvgRVjiHWYDnniidtmoh3YqV-TlA-yuI3a_Ib5dIPvp6sQcSytfKWCkdRHgfc2_O1pQqVByrs2WWFYBfuPGfsMMz0PNXtrjqov67ofbAgSCxOlHkCboQucgfTq/Ns87WPVRVoOGcD_Jadcbmu1JlNJyHlgP/10)_

| | Dear Friend of Liberty,

Did you know that the Trump administration froze over $2.2 billion in taxpayer funds for Harvard University?

Now Harvard thinks it has a CONSTITUTIONAL RIGHT to your money. Clearly, the people who run it didn't receive a Hillsdale College education.

If they had, they would know they have no right to your money. Your money shouldn't go to antisemitic, anti-American, and anti-Western Civilization bureaucrats and activists.

And if they had taken our free online course, "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution," they'd understand that a truly free society requires education to be independent of unaccountable administrative agencies.

**As you may know, Hillsdale College doesn 't take a single cent of federal funds.** Unlike Harvard, we know there are rules that come with federal money. And we prefer to make an honest living.

And this makes us unique in American higher education. So many elite institutions--like Harvard--receive millions, if not billions, of your tax dollars.

**By contrast, our supporters give to us because they want to. **

We would rather stand by our principles than receive a taxpayer handout--no matter who is in the White House.

But this is only possible because we have friends like you. Thanks to you--and so many other informed patriots--we don't receive federal or state student grants or loans. Nothing.

[**That’s why I hope you will consider making a tax-deductible gift to our Annual Fund today to help Hillsdale College expand its outreach efforts on behalf of liberty**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/wN6vyWIGgVeW1zjwS8mwO4K7aO5nfGs41jhIoSHtskZ91FLHO88qgR4Ct4KKwGnLBu5i3jRFEL573uFdXfYHYKGG2ZWAixTedfyY0YifhuE_XRzZRdYxG9TA__WhCto83XTwhTmqH1VpfVOB2TtAT45bEahyqm9y3dJ8JxAH1EubBs9-1t1deJ6wK_w7u3Zp3E0xeq9tNhdr7SKM30C0GzY5zU5EoBSwtxcHTmW7L7EOvrrzvbtmhFgMHA7fFD46IhLYVocs1cJgEE84acgRSeorx8wiDFgr4m3tDw0SKtVUYTFRS1RcDkBg-owBWcJwXs0Qru7LKE0Aa2Mx7fHlkCYHWB15yDNZCFvaMHKNziep_8CzaJ_Sq8HKojWT5JX0NBmdkpXgu9KlIuJihnUEI_PZ6eJQleBZU2xAbBqyjap4w-_6akDuTDRnV3ANomNPI2gEVb2wz_HneUX74hmxjnfWFLp5NG0HFtJu7yP8DRIkrJqex_QlOQ326WYl8lkfS5pvQFUZa-WFotZUDlpdnFqD8L9tLt3pY-ndKyJwg5A3pJLm-KruxRkTwYI0ee5DwS_hv3wqwrvH-K6ly1xYhjY-Xa9_iIdNKf6-kwKeqGSp3DL2pGIEtqjH7KmNtnyCQNpr9HHl1BnNmHdxIi1lPXrphxH_JHvTh4jgi5sgPp5uPSMy-adoI1HDbPXLhJOvre0hoj5D7wf2jgNQflJf0o6Jf0S1aIiB44iXkQM4RFzw3mVuYye5/gBHHMnv-CIq3L18mhsfXHJV2GrfIVFMd/10)**.**

You will help us expand the production of our free online courses, increase the readership of _Imprimis_ , and launch increasing numbers of Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 schools nationwide.

Your generous support of our educational outreach programs will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens.

There's an important reason why Hillsdale refuses to accept one penny of government funding.

This allows the College to remain **genuinely independent** and focused on its mission, free from burdensome and corrupting federal regulations.

**It 's a lesson Harvard University would do well to learn. **

All of our work--including our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--is entirely dependent on the support of citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

The upcoming academic year will be critical, and the Left will pull out all the stops to keep its stranglehold on our schools.

It will take significant resources to promote our online courses--such as our recent course, "The Federalist"--while also expanding Hillsdale's other educational outreach efforts.

I'm asking you to make a tax-deductible gift to our Annual Fund today. Many of our most faithful supporters give gifts of **$25** or **$50** , while others give gifts of **$100** , **$500** , or even more.

What's most important is that you give what you can. I've included a secure, convenient link for you here:

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/annual-fund-2025**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/KPor-WrWgdIR-yo4YxUi_PFKczXWeyq87vkxDRbefEkgYryRP9175C2DTI53JDMfyEBZxA7-73dAcy1m1R6dCISIxluxJ0CawwdQ0Oai7IWKROT8sme7u7gRofv9TfJICNTgEDvQbbnkli0AnTTmGecBXaKTf2X9f_47CvWuwA6_5oAmYCThcTZbo30zQ62vN_f0A9zqK1mEowF4QxNvqOd7uo7dGOc2C0DYTFVRhRTjaJ8w-tjWEU-DOfMdmmhmdb8EJL8dXlbsDdXMdd7YXLqF2QJFHMs7wbcoiAcvaSCwDs94jq71P4GFeBQ58HVhScO7Ae8vaLnH0jd2HBjIDeoTSpOpSZ_Qvi_QCWC3rajLKYOVZDeteJQoJQXLgFbDvweWmboFrrEJM8LWsn2ji-qJdGRVNrP61ogaPq6iQx34aP4GZWuYZPGXi0SqGCIgqxN0S7O1LDb4cXfC3yjfbOLZeiWsHYeOG4Gng6otGgOmk0V5qNbnS18bHfOuXcwloF-gFZKGi1i_W6LrmBEYnTMSj4v-VnY0x6pLB-2dOYJfEkFrhZwEQKDHjKO2Qx35JZk3tq4kFWJ84FnXkgcE2IXqGlkvUUt6JFitnOTZRRRd-MyU-j0d1SjV_NbRPgXYPDEbAeJalbfwqRkCfsJt8EPb4hJRK-2Pp50TKm2Ke0iNhYnbEK_nmMofZV3_1ifBuoa2iF9w8t2PvhT_rZafAZiCUOoCeFMMW-2Zjo3aEy_QqJ4PZPVw/jMhO7kFCjzloiIXe2qxudEnaTwOKSTD-/10)

Thank you again for your partnership in our shared mission to revive and preserve liberty and the American way of life.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

subject: URGENT: Republicans are voting to cut NPR and PBS funding today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
NPR and PBS are on the chopping block — add your name to protect trusted news and education.
**Today, the Senate is voting on whether to rescind over $1.1 billion in public media funding** — a direct attempt by Trump and his MAGA allies to defund NPR, PBS and local public stations across the country. **This is about more than a budget cut. This is a political attack on journalism, education and the public’s right to free and factual information.** [**_Senator Gillibrand is standing strong against these cuts — will you add your name to OPPOSE these cuts and stand with NPR, PBS and the future of public broadcasting before the vote?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111599910/557762628/398212912?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.07.16_Public-Broadcasting_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTVlN2IwYi03NTYyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tswYjeDH9eaVgVH0unKRO3jybMxbimyE26EiDVGZDbo=&emci=359f807d-5f62-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=6e5e7b0b-7562-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=7659029) | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111599911/557762629/398212912?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.07.16_Public-Broadcasting_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTVlN2IwYi03NTYyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tswYjeDH9eaVgVH0unKRO3jybMxbimyE26EiDVGZDbo=&emci=359f807d-5f62-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=6e5e7b0b-7562-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=7659029)

Without this support, many local stations will struggle to continue serving their communities. Important programs for children and families could be reduced or disappear entirely. And critical emergency alerts — a lifeline for rural areas — could be at risk.
Public broadcasting is a public good. It’s nonpartisan. It’s essential —**and right now it needs your voice.**
**Standing against these public broadcasting cuts means standing up for trustworthy news, education and the communities that depend on them.**

clean_body: NPR and PBS are on the chopping block — add your name to protect trusted news and education. Today, the Senate is voting on whether to rescind over $1.1 billion in public media funding — a direct attempt by Trump and his MAGA allies to defund NPR, PBS and local public stations across the country. This is about more than a budget cut. This is a political attack on journalism, education and the public’s right to free and factual information. | | Without this support, many local stations will struggle to continue serving their communities. Important programs for children and families could be reduced or disappear entirely. And critical emergency alerts — a lifeline for rural areas — could be at risk. Public broadcasting is a public good. It’s nonpartisan. It’s essential —and right now it needs your voice. Standing against these public broadcasting cuts means standing up for trustworthy news, education and the communities that depend on them. | Thank you for standing with us, — Team Gillibrand * =

name: Team Rayfield
subject: Salem Town Hall 7/23
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/danrayfield/salem-town-hall-723?e=1768325bd4)
---
| |
---
| | Hi friends,

We're taking our town hall series on the road again - this time, in Oregon's capital city! We'll be in Salem the night of July 23rd for our 5th public town hall event, as part of our "Federal Oversight" series.

We've been focused on hearing directly from Oregonians who have been affected by federal actions. Many of these decisions impact healthcare, funding for research and grants, environmental protections, LGBTQ+ rights, and more.

**Here are the details:

What:** Safeguarding Oregon: Federal Oversight Town Hall

**When:** Wednesday, July 23rd at 6:00pm

**Where:** City of Salem Center 50+, 2615 Portland Rd NE, Salem

**Who:** Oregon Attorney General Dan Rayfield, Oregon State Senator Deb Patterson, and Oregon State Representatives Tom Andersen and Paul Evans

**RSVP: ** [bit.ly/July23Salem](https://danrayfield.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f0c603f9d9801c198f6fc68fa&id=8356965f8a&e=1768325bd4) for people who would like to give public comments/submit questions during the event.

We've had really great conversations at these events, and we hope you can join us!
#

_We are grateful to the 150 plus people who came out to the Lincoln City town hall last week! _
---
| | | | | | | [](https://danrayfield.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f0c603f9d9801c198f6fc68fa&id=e89e211630&e=1768325bd4)

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 7/16/2025
body:
Behind closed doors: Leaked memos reveal how Durango 9-R Schools avoided a DEI lawsuit—until now
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi friends,
Check out today's Mountain Minute podcast [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)! Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Durango School District 9-R is under federal scrutiny after a leaked memo revealed [race-based hiring and DEI favoritism](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Civil rights complaints allege a racially exclusive equity committee and policies designed to dodge liability. Meanwhile, Colorado is suing the Trump administration over a $6.8 billion education grant freeze. The state could [lose $80 million in school funding](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) due to DEI practices.
🇺🇸 **On the National Stage...** The Trump administration racked up major wins this week. The Supreme Court upheld Trump’s plan to [downsize the Department of Education](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), greenlighting nearly 1,400 layoffs and restoring powers to the states. A Brookings economist admitted deportations under Trump [raised wages for U.S. workers](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), while Senator Rubio’s State Department shakeup is [eliminating bloated programs](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) and refocusing on national security. Meanwhile, Democrat strategist James Carville admitted he’s [“praying” for an economic collapse](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)—just to defeat Trump.
**🗣️ Commentary Spotlight...** Michael Hancock argues the modern obsession with “systemic racism” is a power grab by ideological elites who [profit from division](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Meanwhile, the Wall Street Journal editorial board [refutes claims that Republicans are slashing the safety net](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), arguing that reforms to Medicaid and food stamps aim to reduce fraud, encourage work, and ensure long-term sustainability.
This is the Mountain Minute for Wednesday, July 16, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Behind closed doors: Leaked memos reveal how Durango 9-R Schools avoided a DEI lawsuit—until now](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
Durango School District 9-R changed its hiring policy this spring without a public announcement—but the move didn’t go unnoticed.
According to a new federal civil rights complaint filed by Mountain States Legal Foundation (MSLF) and authored by its general counsel, William Trachman, the district had for years pushed a race-conscious hiring agenda, encouraged by internal equity committees and shielded by carefully worded legal guidance.
Now, MSLF says those practices violated Title VI of the Civil Rights Act—and that scrubbing the language in 2025 wasn’t enough to undo the damage.
This filing is one of three separate federal complaints MSLF has submitted since late June. The others challenge a district policy that endorses race-based flags and symbols while disallowing others, and a separate complaint targets programs like a Native-only graduation ceremony and parent committee. All three complaints are now under consideration by the Department of Education’s Office for Civil Rights (OCR).
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Colorado Sues Trump Admin Over Withheld Funds Due to “Failure to Deliver”](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [THE COLORADO SUN](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* The Trump administration froze $6.8 billion in federal school funding, including $80 million meant for Colorado, citing a need to align spending with presidential priorities and legal obligations—not activist agendas.
* Colorado Attorney General Phil Weiser is suing over the freeze, claiming it's “unlawful,” but critics argue Weiser is playing politics, ignoring the law’s accountability measures and trying to force spending without compliance.
* While Weiser and Governor Polis decry the move as “devastating,” the Department of Education maintains that it's reviewing the grants to ensure responsible use of taxpayer dollars—a move Trump allies say is long overdue.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Supreme Court Backs Trump in Bold Move to Downsize Federal Education Bureaucracy](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ASSOCIATED PRESS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* The Supreme Court ruled in favor of the Trump administration, allowing it to resume its plan to downsize the U.S. Department of Education by laying off nearly 1,400 employees and shifting authority back to the states.
* Trump called the decision a “Major Victory for Parents and Students,” while Education Secretary Linda McMahon emphasized the President’s rightful authority to reorganize federal agencies.
* Critics, including liberal justices and Democrat-led groups, decried the move as unlawful, but the Court’s decision reinforced Trump’s broader effort to reduce federal overreach and restore local control over education.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
** ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[Ganahl: What’s inside the ‘Big Beautiful Bill’—and why it’s a game-changer for families and freedom](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY HEIDI GANAHL****| COMMENTARY | JULY 15** _They’re calling it the “Big Beautiful Bill”—and whether you love it or hate it, it’s the boldest shakeup to our tax and spending system since Trump’s 2017 tax cuts. Officially titled the Tax Relief for American Families and Workers Act, this legislation does a lot: extends the Trump tax cuts, rewrites how safety net programs work, beefs up border and defense spending, and trims down the green energy handouts._
__
**[The COvid Chronicles June 16-23, 2020: Social justice got a platform—police got massive reform](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY RMV EDITORIAL BOARD | COMMENTARY | JULY 14** _In this ninth chapter of The COvid Chronicles, summer arrived—but sanity didn’t. Looking back at our COVID-19 history is painful. But as Spanish-American philosopher put it, “Those who cannot remember the past are condemned to repeat it."_
__
**[Devotional: The compass that always points to truth](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY DRAKE HUNTER | COMMENTARY | JULY 13** _I’ll never forget the sting of the Texas sun at Camp Bullis, just outside of San Antonio. It was the next phase of my training, following Basic Training and the Police Academy at Lackland Air Force Base. This training wasn’t just about learning the ins and outs of the M60 machine gun or polishing our field discipline—it was survival training in its rawest form. Out there in the wild terrain, you either adapted or you got lost. Literally._
__

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [tori@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\))) or send us a message on social media to chat!
|
---
|
---
**🇺🇸 DID YOU KNOW?** **There’s only one letter not found in any U.S. state name—Q.** You’ll spot a Z in Arizona, a J in New Jersey, and even two X’s in New Mexico and Texas. But despite all 50 states, not one includes the letter Q.
|
---
**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** "We've been blessed with the opportunity to stand for something—for liberty and freedom and fairness. And these are things worth fighting for, worth devoting our lives to." – Ronald Reagan

Critics, including liberal justices and Democrat-led groups, decried the move as unlawful, but the Court’s decision reinforced Trump’s broader effort to reduce federal overreach and restore local control over education. | ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ HEIDI GANAHL| COMMENTARY | JULY 15 They’re calling it the “Big Beautiful Bill”—and whether you love it or hate it, it’s the boldest shakeup to our tax and spending system since Trump’s 2017 tax cuts. Officially titled the Tax Relief for American Families and Workers Act, this legislation does a lot: extends the Trump tax cuts, rewrites how safety net programs work, beefs up border and defense spending, and trims down the green energy handouts. RMV EDITORIAL BOARD | COMMENTARY | JULY 14 In this ninth chapter of The COvid Chronicles, summer arrived—but sanity didn’t. Looking back at our COVID-19 history is painful. But as Spanish-American philosopher put it, “Those who cannot remember the past are condemned to repeat it." DRAKE HUNTER | COMMENTARY | JULY 13 I’ll never forget the sting of the Texas sun at Camp Bullis, just outside of San Antonio. It was the next phase of my training, following Basic Training and the Police Academy at Lackland Air Force Base. This training wasn’t just about learning the ins and outs of the M60 machine gun or polishing our field discipline—it was survival training in its rawest form. Out there in the wild terrain, you either adapted or you got lost. Literally. __ Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share? We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\)) or send us a message on social media to chat! | | 🇺🇸 DID YOU KNOW? There’s only one letter not found in any U.S. state name—Q. You’ll spot a Z in Arizona, a J in New Jersey, and even two X’s in New Mexico and Texas. But despite all 50 states, not one includes the letter Q. | CARTOON OF THE DAY | QUOTE OF THE DAY "We've been blessed with the opportunity to stand for something—for liberty and freedom and fairness. And these are things worth fighting for, worth devoting our lives to." – Ronald Reagan | | | | ---|---|--- Did a friend forward you this email? | A product of Rocky Mountain Voice, Inc. 8200 S Quebec St, STE A3601 Centennial, CO 80112 This message was originally sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com Be sure to put “RockyMountainVoice.com” on your safe-senders whitelist. If you ever stop receiving our emails, it might be because someone to whom you forwarded the email unintentionally removed you from the list. No worries; it is easy enough to reactivate your subscription immediately by visiting: Before you click the link below... If someone forwarded this email to you, please don’t! Clicking the link will end the subscription of dpwillis67@gmail.com []()

name: Rob Bonta
subject: Trump is breaking the law again
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642]
body:
[ https://act.robbonta.com/go/4?refcode=em250716&t=1001&akid=1882%2E1088799%2EtmNqlS ]Rob Bonta

The Trump administration has
illegally shut down the largest disaster prevention program in the
country, putting more than $1 billion in funding for California projects
at risk and making millions of people less safe.

This morning I filed a lawsuit along with 19 other states challenging the
Trump administration’s unlawful termination of the program and asking the
court to intervene so communities across the country can protect
themselves before natural disasters strike.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-250716?refcode=em20250716-1882&refcode2=1882_1088799_tmNqlS&akid=1882%2E1088799%2EtmNqlS ]I need your help to keep up this fight. Will you chip in to my
re-election campaign today so I can keep defending Californians from
Trump’s unlawful actions?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-250716?refcode=em20250716-1882&amount=5&refcode2=1882_1088799_tmNqlS&akid=1882%2E1088799%2EtmNqlS ]Donate $5 »

FEMA’s BRIC program — Building Resilient Infrastructure and Communities —
funds projects in every state for flood prevention, landslide mitigation,
seismic retrofitting, and wildfire evacuation routes.

These investments save lives, protect property, and reduce the cost of
disaster recovery — which is critical for states like California that are
uniquely at risk from natural disasters like wildfires and earthquakes.

Shutting down the program doesn’t cut waste, it incurs more costs for
recovery and cuts public safety — and it’s illegal.

Congress created and expanded this program with overwhelming bipartisan
support because it saves lives and money — period. Trump is violating the
Constitution, defying the will of Congress, and putting us in danger — so
we’re asking the court to intervene.

I’ve gone to court again and again to hold this administration accountable
— and we’ve won. But I can’t keep up this fight without your support.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-250716?refcode=em20250716-1882&refcode2=1882_1088799_tmNqlS&akid=1882%2E1088799%2EtmNqlS ]My re-election campaign is building the grassroots movement we need to
keep fighting for justice — so if you can, please chip in now so I can
continue working to protect California’s right to a safe and clean future.

Thanks for standing with me,

Rob

Rob Bonta
Attorney General of California

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

clean_body: [ ]Rob Bonta The Trump administration has illegally shut down the largest disaster prevention program in the country, putting more than $1 billion in funding for California projects at risk and making millions of people less safe. This morning I filed a lawsuit along with 19 other states challenging the Trump administration’s unlawful termination of the program and asking the court to intervene so communities across the country can protect themselves before natural disasters strike. [ ]I need your help to keep up this fight. Will you chip in to my re-election campaign today so I can keep defending Californians from Trump’s unlawful actions? [ ]Donate $5 » FEMA’s BRIC program — Building Resilient Infrastructure and Communities — funds projects in every state for flood prevention, landslide mitigation, seismic retrofitting, and wildfire evacuation routes. These investments save lives, protect property, and reduce the cost of disaster recovery — which is critical for states like California that are uniquely at risk from natural disasters like wildfires and earthquakes. Shutting down the program doesn’t cut waste, it incurs more costs for recovery and cuts public safety — and it’s illegal. Congress created and expanded this program with overwhelming bipartisan support because it saves lives and money — period. Trump is violating the Constitution, defying the will of Congress, and putting us in danger — so we’re asking the court to intervene. I’ve gone to court again and again to hold this administration accountable — and we’ve won. But I can’t keep up this fight without your support. [ ]My re-election campaign is building the grassroots movement we need to keep fighting for justice — so if you can, please chip in now so I can continue working to protect California’s right to a safe and clean future. Thanks for standing with me, Rob Rob Bonta Attorney General of California

Donald Trump vowed to safeguard Social Security and Medicare for Americans.

**But this month, his MAGA allies in Congress voted “yes” to Trump’s Big Ugly Bill that included the largest Medicaid cut in history.**

**Now, they’re putting Social Security on the chopping block next.** The program’s trustees said it may run out of funds as early as 2033, years sooner than previously projected!

New Dems in Congress are stepping up to defend Social Security and strengthen the long-term future of the program millions of Americans depend on.

name: Juanita, United We Dream
subject: What does our collective future look like? The choice is ours!🤝
body:
🗣️ “We the people will save the people!” - Your neighbor from CA | | | Hey Peter, have you sent in your Solidarity Note? 📭 Last week, we opened our Solidarity Notes inbox — an opportunity for working people like you to send in messages of hope and solidarity about the future we’re building together. **Hundreds of people answered the call, and all across the country, it’s clear what our communities want: a future that puts us, the people, first:**
* We, the working people, want to stop living paycheck to paycheck.
* We, your immigrant neighbors, want to head to work and school without worrying about whether there’ll be an empty seat at the table at the end of the day.
* We, the teachers who inspire the next generation of leaders, want a future that invests in the resources our students need to make their dreams come true.

Peter, it’s your turn! We want to hear from you: what future can we build when we stand together? [**📲 Text “Solidarity Notes” to 787-57 to send in your message, or click this link today if you’re on your in your message today! We’ll be featuring your anonymous Solidarity Notes online!_ **With every attempt to tear our communities apart, we’ve seen our neighbors and friends show up with courage and care to protect one another.** We know that in order to create the change we need, solidarity and care must persist among us. It means taking a stand against the abduction of our immigrant neighbors and making our voices heard when our constitutional freedoms are under attack. **To write the future we need, all of us, across all backgrounds and walks of life, will need to come together to protect one another.** Let your neighbors know you will have their back in this fight! Send in your Solidarity Note today to share the future you’re fighting for alongside working people. clean_body: 🗣️ “We the people will save the people!” - Your neighbor from CA | | | Hey Peter, have you sent in your Solidarity Note? 📭 Last week, we opened our Solidarity Notes inbox — an opportunity for working people like you to send in messages of hope and solidarity about the future we’re building together. Hundreds of people answered the call, and all across the country, it’s clear what our communities want: a future that puts us, the people, first: We, the working people, want to stop living paycheck to paycheck. We, your immigrant neighbors, want to head to work and school without worrying about whether there’ll be an empty seat at the table at the end of the day. We, the teachers who inspire the next generation of leaders, want a future that invests in the resources our students need to make their dreams come true. Peter, it’s your turn! We want to hear from you: what future can we build when we stand together? in your message today! We’ll be featuring your anonymous Solidarity Notes online! With every attempt to tear our communities apart, we’ve seen our neighbors and friends show up with courage and care to protect one another. We know that in order to create the change we need, solidarity and care must persist among us. It means taking a stand against the abduction of our immigrant neighbors and making our voices heard when our constitutional freedoms are under attack. To write the future we need, all of us, across all backgrounds and walks of life, will need to come together to protect one another.** Let your neighbors know you will have their back in this fight! Send in your Solidarity Note today to share the future you’re fighting for alongside working people. In community, Juanita and the UWD team | Follow us on: | | | | |

name: Mazie Hirono
subject: School voucher programs don't work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
Republicans cannot deny this any longer, Peter: **They are selling out their constituents and our children’s futures to do Donald Trump’s bidding. ** The Big Ugly Bill that Donald Trump just signed into law creates the first-ever national school voucher program — a move that they claim will “expand school choice,” but will actually undermine public education and hurt our students. We’ve seen this story before, Peter. **School voucher programs do not work. ** They divert billions of dollars away from public schools and hand it to wealthy families and private schools, and it won’t be the Republicans in Congress who will be affected. Our students, who rely on strong public schools to succeed, and our teachers, who are shaping the next generation, will be left to deal with the consequences of the GOP’s decision. I recently held a forum with teachers, parents, and education leaders to discuss how this move will hurt our communities, and I will continue working with everyone I can to protect public schools in Hawaii and across the country. **[Democrats are working for America’s families, and I will always fight for public schools. clean_body: | Republicans cannot deny this any longer, Peter: They are selling out their constituents and our children’s futures to do Donald Trump’s bidding. The Big Ugly Bill that Donald Trump just signed into law creates the first-ever national school voucher program — a move that they claim will “expand school choice,” but will actually undermine public education and hurt our students. We’ve seen this story before, Peter. School voucher programs do not work. They divert billions of dollars away from public schools and hand it to wealthy families and private schools, and it won’t be the Republicans in Congress who will be affected. Our students, who rely on strong public schools to succeed, and our teachers, who are shaping the next generation, will be left to deal with the consequences of the GOP’s decision. I recently held a forum with teachers, parents, and education leaders to discuss how this move will hurt our communities, and I will continue working with everyone I can to protect public schools in Hawaii and across the country. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Mazie Friends of Mazie Hirono 335 Merchant Street #677 Honolulu, HI 96809 United States mailto:info@mazieforhawaii.com | Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii

name: Team Heidi Hall
subject: This is one of the closest races in the nation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250716_em_fr_b1_THH_standard [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250716_em_fr_b1_THH_standard]
Friend,
CA-03, Kevin Kiley's seat, is one of the most flippable in the nation. And Heidi is the candidate to win. Here's the data and the stories to back it up.
Looking at the data, in 2024, with a national environment that favored Trump and other Republicans down the ballot, Kiley won with only 55% of the vote, showing an underlying weakness.
Analysts are also looking at data which measures how partisan a district or a state is compared to the nation as a whole. In California's 3rd Congressional District in particular, the partisan ranking has dropped from Republican +4 in 2023 to Republican +2 in 2025. That's why we're one of the MOST-FLIPPABLE races nationwide.
Looking at his actions, Kiley's votes to pass Trump's disastrous and harmful budget bill have put him at the center of conversations that the entire state is having about how our Republican representatives have betrayed our nation and harmed our communities.
Rep. Kevin Kiley said he cared about children’s health. Then he voted to gut Medicaid | Opinion
– The Sacramento Bee
23% of our district is covered by Medi-Cal, and Kiley took it away to appease Trump and the billionaire class. It's this hypocrisy that makes it easy to see where his allegiances lie— not with the people he's meant to represent, but with his party leader.
He is also still refusing to come to our district to hear what we have to say about his votes to cut Medicaid.
Nurses, Rocklin residents protest Medicaid cuts at Rep. Kevin Kiley’s office
– The Sacramento Bee
Friend, Rep. Kevin Kiley is vulnerable, and Heidi can flip this seat.
Her experience putting people first and delivering results for her community is what sets her apart, and if we can spread our message to people throughout our district, we can win this race.
Will you help be the difference that our campaign needs to flip this seat by donating what you can today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250716_em_fr_b1_THH_standard]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250716_em_fr_b1_THH_standard]
In solidarity,
Team Heidi Hall
Heidi Hall has spent her three-decade public service career working with others to solve problems, protect our land and water, improve health, and build opportunities for others, all while raising two boys primarily as a single mom.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250716_em_fr_b1_THH_standard [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250716_em_fr_b1_THH_standard]
Raised by parents who had persisted to make a middle-class life for their kids in Contra Costa County while lifting up others, Heidi was taught to push through and overcome challenges rather than complain about them. She learned to stick up for the vulnerable, to respect working people, and to value equal opportunity and justice.
After graduating from Pomona College and earning graduate degrees from Columbia and Rutgers, Heidi went to work for the Rockefeller Foundation promoting reproductive care and then began her career at the Environmental Protection Agency, stopping the dumping of toxic waste and holding corporate polluters accountable.
Today, Heidi chairs the Nevada County Board of Supervisors, where she’s taken on homelessness, expanded broadband access, and worked to reduce crime and illegal cannabis growth. Heidi flipped her seat from red to blue – and now she’s ready to do it again in Congress to take on toxic politics in Washington and put people first.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:
Heidi Hall for Congress
PO Box 729
Grass Valley, CA 95945
SUPPORT HEIDI [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20250716_em_fr_b1_THH_standard]
PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS

Heidi Hall for Congress
PO Box 729
Grass Valley, CA 95945
United States

name: Adam Schiff
subject: I want to hear from you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8774%2E5257348%2EBBuzOx)
Derek,
This is gut-check time in the republic. One party rule has jammed through a bill that will be devastating to our healthcare, food assistance, renewable energy, and so much more.
We will get through this, but we will need to do everything we can to mitigate the harms until we can throw these bums out of office. So I want to hear your thoughts. This grassroots movement has been so important to my work that I want to know:
Amidst all of the challenges at this moment, what is your strongest concern? What’s keeping you up at night? Where do you want your elected officials focusing their efforts?
Too many in Washington are focused on polls and pundits, but I’d rather listen to real people.
**[That’s why my team and I have launched a new Summer Priorities Survey, and I’d be grateful if you took a moment to fill it out:](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=engagement-202507-summer-priorities.u5avkW&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20250716_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=8774%2E5257348%2EBBuzOx)**
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=engagement-202507-summer-priorities.u5avkW&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_SUR_AC90_20250716_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=8774%2E5257348%2EBBuzOx)
---
Whether it’s the cost of housing, the fight for reproductive rights, defending our democracy from Trump and MAGA extremism, or something closer to home, your answers will help shape my work.
This is your moment to speak up. I hope to hear from you today.
Thanks,
Adam

Every dollar you chip in now will go a long way in helping us fight back against Republican dark money →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111602656/557772006/160205011?amount=10&source=SBD_AD_EM_FR_071625_VANCE_30DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjdmNzhlOC03YzYyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XgMQ4AaIwP7zn_rYUFg-ElsddCBpfuqDt2dnXw1UBHo=) | | **[FIGHT BACK](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111602657/557772007/397029747?amount=10&source=SBD_AD_EM_FR_071625_VANCE_30DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjdmNzhlOC03YzYyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XgMQ4AaIwP7zn_rYUFg-ElsddCBpfuqDt2dnXw1UBHo=)**
---
Vice President JD Vance grew up in a blue-collar community, like mine, so he knows that working people often rely on Medicaid and SNAP. **That's why it's all the more disturbing to see him claim that his administration's cuts don't matter.**
My experience growing up around families who relied on Medicaid and SNAP to make ends meet turned me into a fighter for the working class. I went into public service because I wanted to make my community better.
I know firsthand just how critical those programs are, and so does Vance. But Vance has made his motives clear, and he'd rather rub shoulders with billionaires in Washington than fight for the American people.
**There's just no excuse for the real pain that these cuts will cause across our Commonwealth. **
Rural hospitals will be forced to close their doors. Everyone, from farmers to grocers, utilizes SNAP to keep their businesses afloat. People across Pennsylvania and the nation will be forced to go without the care they need. Even if you don't use Medicaid or SNAP directly, these cuts will impact you.

**I believe that those who are closest to the pain should be closest to the power. We're seeing right now what happens when those who are furthest from the pain have all the power in Washington. It's stealing from the poor to give to the rich. **
[**We cannot let their power continue unchecked, which is why I’m asking for your help today. Will you chip in to my re-election campaign now so I can keep standing up for Pennsylvanians?** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111602658/557772008/160205011?amount=10&source=SBD_AD_EM_FR_071625_VANCE_30DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjdmNzhlOC03YzYyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XgMQ4AaIwP7zn_rYUFg-ElsddCBpfuqDt2dnXw1UBHo=)

clean_body: Austin Davis is helping continue the progress we've made for Pennsylvanians by ensuring we keep Pennsylvania blue up and down the ballot. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | JD Vance decided to show up in Pennsylvania in an attempt to distract us from the fact that he just passed a historically awful spending bill that will rob millions of their healthcare coverage and food assistance, all to pay for tax breaks for the ultra-rich. = | | = Vice President JD Vance grew up in a blue-collar community, like mine, so he knows that working people often rely on Medicaid and SNAP. That's why it's all the more disturbing to see him claim that his administration's cuts don't matter. My experience growing up around families who relied on Medicaid and SNAP to make ends meet turned me into a fighter for the working class. I went into public service because I wanted to make my community better. I know firsthand just how critical those programs are, and so does Vance. But Vance has made his motives clear, and he'd rather rub shoulders with billionaires in Washington than fight for the American people. There's just no excuse for the real pain that these cuts will cause across our Commonwealth. Rural hospitals will be forced to close their doors. Everyone, from farmers to grocers, utilizes SNAP to keep their businesses afloat. People across Pennsylvania and the nation will be forced to go without the care they need. Even if you don't use Medicaid or SNAP directly, these cuts will impact you. I believe that those who are closest to the pain should be closest to the power. We're seeing right now what happens when those who are furthest from the pain have all the power in Washington. It's stealing from the poor to give to the rich. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Peter. = Lt. Gov. name: Hillsdale College via Liberty Pulse
subject: Does Harvard have a right to your money?
body:
Did you know that the Trump administration froze over $2.2 billion in taxpayer funds for Harvard University?

| | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/u/9Xhm65AILhwaUKnIe5J52MLvEJwfd3UiMoPb1oL6VZg9y0jbNYs0voifvuzKssaFJfsdojj2sriK2xCteS0tRZhT1ePG5K2l1FE_vofLdVecWmZ8Y7gUD3BiEWmbxa6a6w6HRzkbyIt7iJ_Ou8bgwDS5lga25eW0_I-WKvM8uHCBMckHzCUsg-KA/oy_IoheAh7bsYQex6Lat3MDbxtfcAiL7/10)_

| | [](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/J5IrSb4CHEiNpFNlGNElWklWSiv5Je_Zt8fhyS97I5qKmja0R3lgW972RLxSbMwddoNx1O3WQf2nefzSfZd_2Wh_S-ZY24_FdK25PK8QCBMRG5nVKKQjgTpssj0WMiCw2bnMeDquxl_JhWrFMFIE82e5oXn_m2jor-CdpCFOwpysKE7ROlqdTTXCeb9VPWq5Vsuyga7xjbClDUwKGLouxAZwNkZm1GCIitqKWyb0JbxNS6fNopTczimpFuR0qLcPcR17k9bnOehbpCjj2kaZgWaMa6SZ_uIYq_Nabydyg8Z95n1d4c4dJklwnGVj_Gc_KSj-lK097qmNFn7Sr7Cpk0PNA81P44KaRuEzXKwudmbbRD8F_X1a2m5BQ45AeOVQx6oeVKoroeQLxLq2Ph8Djm7n93vAUmNuuivRkV4fjnS79UQ3niIeKMpwVL7GGCd5MXcnYy5BslGuwXgJ5Mj-Xl55OE_Tn45co8E79fkSIXkbRyqjNqmOPQh7prSVOY-FYiBHyqP_9tyCghCMT1gOzBQYoMvnQvzrGzuxdvmz2uxg7uqayigkmFZjo2D-ESdk-NHRfoG6x8k2Uxb97JxKgZEYXMuep_A0SuXMVbQHfE2JM-tnT2jyAHNNgtR2cSVwbY-Qx4F0jTrYVXgy_WG43QmMjeKA39bRFQVuo5zKPkzZBSlc8XcE01j5zw028nuDC5EyJEdPH4EQ9TbKR9yIXzoIx9aaDwuKoVh-PbH-TSt4X3RP1ND7/jiwsaGWIVWK_q3NMoXMJUbYiup4VOO6g/10)
