| | Dear Friend of Liberty,

Did you know that the Trump administration froze over $2.2 billion in taxpayer funds for Harvard University?

Now Harvard thinks it has a CONSTITUTIONAL RIGHT to your money. Clearly, the people who run it didn't receive a Hillsdale College education.

If they had, they would know they have no right to your money. Your money shouldn't go to antisemitic, anti-American, and anti-Western Civilization bureaucrats and activists.

And if they had taken our free online course, "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution," they'd understand that a truly free society requires education to be independent of unaccountable administrative agencies.

**As you may know, Hillsdale College doesn 't take a single cent of federal funds.** Unlike Harvard, we know there are rules that come with federal money. And we prefer to make an honest living.

And this makes us unique in American higher education. So many elite institutions--like Harvard--receive millions, if not billions, of your tax dollars.

**By contrast, our supporters give to us because they want to. **

We would rather stand by our principles than receive a taxpayer handout--no matter who is in the White House.

But this is only possible because we have friends like you. Thanks to you--and so many other informed patriots--we don't receive federal or state student grants or loans. Nothing.

[**That’s why I hope you will consider making a tax-deductible gift to our Annual Fund today to help Hillsdale College expand its outreach efforts on behalf of liberty**](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/DqifECvcWzVkp6Tg1mywnGcuLH5b-u5WDoosqJZbqQzG_lg22l3yhs1b5-80GFzdWb5D7IBoDbcIqVwfLWndxTV1LpIBVh_Cdm0JKTgqDMutlp6EeRCT-eiTatzyOYq_pqwMIehfhkh_a_Plwa1OBddEnDZk4x3I5_TRWVWwzeeSkiY5_iqaWiM1uCRpNyzmIOQFP1sRSgMJ3v0hEOy4fiQTp08gZowyKbjKOV2WCneWMkv-x79SG1Bd3gltR2_fVUjfKwiykVSAFqDSrwJe1nueI0ZS-iQT6foTh3K824jed-p0TicISffUXkfWobvrldldHouAwUjYhJii0H1bizEEqLTHyPKcXkymOkYaWyNnH9RD72mE7TUj5p_mr3eG0c5Jf-1zKpcqUk5RP99rjcNLqSUw5X4UUer3JFZYrKpr6Mf4Z0IjGtzOxZ9fdtq6OIyzduq7FCMqEmcv--HeAudLokNvzepqPrkNKCvDxPGwySEl_vbOr3dqWhE51GMAXVPMP0WZ2K5zQOp3Tw2-wel_G0ubAqTQ1-KY4_-goU5iuMlHDNWbupCOw1_G_F4WDXY_VapydOQNtFn9E6hvB6Q0_ZzTzZktl5Sa8hSiI_SIc8oRZxcXoxEDgkmKr6EHSlisfhG-E8TpEHmiuRCk5E-IL2tgN2SoBtv58ddm_tW5TO3QQyoCOEY0iqTttGW8NIE-oFx5LMhCfE-EqnhDwDj6hvSEmg-b5TtUfcgdHua1flhUgXMC/-IFldWEfvHAIcvoLDfhRzsOvKsHu9yvB/10)**.**

You will help us expand the production of our free online courses, increase the readership of _Imprimis_ , and launch increasing numbers of Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 schools nationwide.

Your generous support of our educational outreach programs will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens.

There's an important reason why Hillsdale refuses to accept one penny of government funding.

This allows the College to remain **genuinely independent** and focused on its mission, free from burdensome and corrupting federal regulations.

**It 's a lesson Harvard University would do well to learn. **

All of our work--including our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--is entirely dependent on the support of citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

The upcoming academic year will be critical, and the Left will pull out all the stops to keep its stranglehold on our schools.

It will take significant resources to promote our online courses--such as our recent course, "The Federalist"--while also expanding Hillsdale's other educational outreach efforts.

I'm asking you to make a tax-deductible gift to our Annual Fund today. Many of our most faithful supporters give gifts of **$25** or **$50** , while others give gifts of **$100** , **$500** , or even more.

What's most important is that you give what you can. I've included a secure, convenient link for you here:

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/annual-fund-2025**](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/BzgPJVQH-GxR2eT3R8p-sIheLvCwy5xtfTkfPTrxiK_ue1BnjtmAB0mfv3ZjzPX7YssmhGntdH9CEkiOLZutbF0JFJrH_MDjtxHtfh69m5vslRIZQWpByrANw5ehO5kkShy6spDKODbDZN5ib-I0FvvVdWSLuhTYwHCmhWQHZH1W8h9VRR2d3CeejDUT47FI_exPRpRHShCoOY6s9eeOhQ0sMWrTuouGeNjbY4u0KtzVU63SS1ETjvTrYVUvgbEXq9ZrqjKs6uIPIwe5XAMzlBOSpnG03a-hqL8kEcujHGx_3wReo7ry0eLFuCKPPls7eOuGCtFILpqXcUxdduLJrDpsnxK07JROo7CDuPvsM7i0R2zM4ucr1kCkBwY3l7YCW5hYNIIz981jTuhMLFaC2pQbr7pieFkuifGEweCVqa-hcQWxAOPk3rXyk1xgwcFV_MAu5dhJlq3n7Z7aCo0Lv-4x2w2FXT4UExRk2S_yMH2h2ad4vqdNUkBnf3ljphLnffg0LJddgvIOqXtdnd0zSOvoaIe5ZV73NduCd1Wv8tlakDFx1PaNo7WcbyLjaQY_fGF8wuY52rRD9LytzlFoqSW5eqzQ0jz_7wQo8_T_YBcYcpg2V2ykDe0xhKDk5kEvNPEbYNdpSwjowsCMW6AYTfzJ9EqBMUk6l-i86Z-_0YWDkzpoDU4oAUI4rdy-lIVdAk66w99Hq1HsGz0ll17pwK3lLXukYclpNqJFsVBz28NzF8nk9LLB/7SOEmbuCRTPPjvZzbr4uji_ccA0qjgty/10)

Thank you again for your partnership in our shared mission to revive and preserve liberty and the American way of life.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111602852/557772695/-550958566?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDBhNzc3ZC03ZDYyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KKduR_8hyKbsbI6kgNnRQMxTd1gVjdxr6YMdCPD6iCo=)
This is a longer email than I usually send.

At the end of it, I’m going to ask you to **[chip in $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111602853/557772696/-550958566?refcode=em-7.16.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDBhNzc3ZC03ZDYyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KKduR_8hyKbsbI6kgNnRQMxTd1gVjdxr6YMdCPD6iCo=)** to keep me in Congress working for you. But first, I need to pull back the curtain on the stakes we’re facing in next year’s midterm elections.

Since the passage of the so-called “Big Beautiful Bill”, I’ve been out in our Central and Southern Illinois communities. Folks are scared about the impact of this ugly bill in their lives and the lives of their loved ones.

I met with health care professionals concerned about their ability to care for their patients. Social service and nonprofit groups who provide critical support to our neighbors.

The resounding message was this: **The stakes are high, and we need to act.**

I’m going to keep working from my position in Congress against the consequences of the MAGA agenda, but it’s going to take winning the House majority to truly hold this administration accountable.

**That’s why I need you in this fight alongside me.** Three seats separate control, and I’m already facing multiple GOP opponents in this race.

**[National Republicans want nothing more than to flip this seat back to red. Will you chip in $3 to make sure we keep IL-13 blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111602854/557772697/-550958566?refcode=em-7.16.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDBhNzc3ZC03ZDYyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KKduR_8hyKbsbI6kgNnRQMxTd1gVjdxr6YMdCPD6iCo=)**

clean_body: | = This is a longer email than I usually send. At the end of it, I’m going to ask you to = to keep me in Congress working for you. But first, I need to pull back the curtain on the stakes we’re facing in next year’s midterm elections. Since the passage of the so-called “Big Beautiful Bill”, I’ve been out in our Central and Southern Illinois communities. Folks are scared about the impact of this ugly bill in their lives and the lives of their loved ones. I met with health care professionals concerned about their ability to care for their patients. Social service and nonprofit groups who provide critical support to our neighbors. The resounding message was this: The stakes are high, and we need to act. I’m going to keep working from my position in Congress against the consequences of the MAGA agenda, but it’s going to take winning the House majority to truly hold this administration accountable. That’s why I need you in this fight alongside me. Three seats separate control, and I’m already facing multiple GOP opponents in this race. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Nikki | = = = Nikki is a champion for working families – from leading the fight to pass a $15 minimum wage in Illinois, to bringing manufacturing back to America. Now, she’s delivering in Congress for the people of Illinois' 13th Congressional District. = To learn more about Nikki and her commitment to working families, please visit: = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_dotl_q32025_ltr_justicejackson?amount=10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_dotl_q32025_ltr_justicejackson?amount=10]So tomorrow at 9 a.m. sharp, we’re sending a letter to Justice Jackson to let her know: Democrats across the country have her back.

We only have [48] open signature spots left for grassroots Democrats, Peter. Sign the letter before our midnight deadline » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_dotl_q32025_ltr_justicejackson?amount=7]

Dear Justice Jackson,
Thank you SO much for your courage and your unwavering defense of our democracy.
As Trump’s attacks on the rule of law grow louder and more dangerous, your words remind the nation what’s truly at stake.
I’m signing this letter today to let you know that I stand with you, Justice Jackson. And I’m chipping in $7 Democracy on the Line to help elect more pro-democracy leaders and stop Trump’s MAGA movement in its tracks! » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_dotl_q32025_ltr_justicejackson?amount=7]

Thank you for standing strong in the face of authoritarian threats.
We are grateful, and we are with you.
Sincerely,

name: Colin Allred
subject: I am running for Senate!
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-allred?refcode=250716em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-allred?refcode=250716em]
Hi there, it’s Colin Allred. I just launched my campaign for U.S. Senate here in Texas. I’d love to take just a moment to explain to you why I’m running again:
I’m running for Senate to fight for working families, not tax cuts for billionaires. I’ve heard and seen so much frustration about what’s going on in Washington right now. I know Texans are struggling, but Congress is more focused on cutting taxes for the wealthy than lowering prices for everyday families. That needs to change.
I’m running for Senate to give every kid in Texas and across America the opportunities that were given to me. I was raised by a single mom who often worked two jobs to make ends meet, and I’ve gone on to play in the NFL, graduate law school, work for President Obama, and make it to Congress.
And I’m running for Senate because we have a real shot to win in Texas – in fact, the first two polls in this race show me already in the lead!
But if we're going to win, we need to build on the historic grassroots movement we created last year. And that means I need you on this team from the very start – early momentum can make or break our campaign.
That’s why my team and I set a critical goal of reaching 50,000 Founding Donors in the first days of my campaign and why I’m personally asking for your help. Can you rush $20 or more right now to be split between me and Tobias Read ? Together, we can fight to bring real leadership back to Texas. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-allred?refcode=250716em]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-allred?refcode=250716em]
Grateful to have you in this fight with me.
– Colin Allred
Tobias Read is Oregon's Secretary of State. To support him directly, please donate here. [https://www.tobiasread.com]
Colin Allred is running for U.S. Senate in Texas. You can support him directly here. [https://colinallred.com/]
https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR [https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR] https://twitter.com/TobiasRead [https://twitter.com/TobiasRead] https://instagram.com/tobiasreador [https://instagram.com/tobiasreador]

Friends of Tobias Read (5208)
PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/IMahE5FQZEyEjGesjn_XSA2?unsubscribedata=x1sd6e380cUTvps1%2BB09tnuBakvSkILBDNKIjEhb7Pj6e2NU8gsZchNtnTOU2u9%2BAErKkiRN2JwHumT4eFrFkDT5a%2B9xPljhMNbylrrfRi7uDBbX5%2FzfZ4NNbr6V23UXDHig6toYbaUC1P4cEdYn3zC%2F%2BCQMNvwE%2FiaiiIAJW7AU7kuZV2156jKTB2tJV4YNOTjPEf2rCDDBUIu6G4Jse6ma%2FfdI7A02wNdLjFzfGpsAHHWNdn1URXZj5348pBNCmMZPcevuowBYjnCsLt5PGp7AGuLbAjQFbwtYyGJAeIZ0bVvMRTUseYuMfxPvjgITf%2FUJvT4szI2UBfyvwUPB%2Bs6sGfxm2ti2PeFrq25ok0qJX9wfHy8KbmMI%2FfgZtHj%2BW757PP9dTZ%2FaSunZAdEokL4rViz5SnlhVq8%2BUlI5TUdpEr8cRdHm9jLht28PtohD .

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111604191/557777267/-896966196?refcode=AU_SMP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20250716_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MmUzMDBhMS04MTYyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OG9uOrLz-wkUdVQ4VDHSdYtMltxfU4cKQt2NwRt8nnA=)
Team, Let me be plain: Senate Republicans are gutless, spineless cowards. They rolled over for Donald Trump’s budget — didn’t even put up a damn fight. They voted to gut health care. They voted to cut food assistance. They put dozens of rural hospitals at risk of shutting down. And while they’re screwing over working families, they’re handing tax breaks to billionaires and corporate donors. They’ve got no backbone, no courage, and no interest in doing what’s right for the American people. I’ve seen a lot of shameless garbage in my years of politics — but this right here? _This might take the cake._ If you’re as furious as I am, then it’s time to flip the damn Senate. It’s time to send every one of these right-wing sellouts packing. **But we’re up against a mountain of dark money. And if we don’t get serious right now, we’ll lose our chance.** **[Are you ready to fight back? The best way to do that is by donating right now to help Flip the Senate and put an end to this Republican cowardice.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111604192/557777268/-746039140?amount=&refcode=AU_SMP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20250716_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MmUzMDBhMS04MTYyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OG9uOrLz-wkUdVQ4VDHSdYtMltxfU4cKQt2NwRt8nnA=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $10 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111604193/557777269/-788614911?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_SMP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20250716_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MmUzMDBhMS04MTYyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OG9uOrLz-wkUdVQ4VDHSdYtMltxfU4cKQt2NwRt8nnA=)

clean_body: | = Team, Let me be plain: Senate Republicans are gutless, spineless cowards. They rolled over for Donald Trump’s budget — didn’t even put up a damn fight. They voted to gut health care. They voted to cut food assistance. They put dozens of rural hospitals at risk of shutting down. And while they’re screwing over working families, they’re handing tax breaks to billionaires and corporate donors. They’ve got no backbone, no courage, and no interest in doing what’s right for the American people. I’ve seen a lot of shameless garbage in my years of politics — but this right here? This might take the cake. If you’re as furious as I am, then it’s time to flip the damn Senate. It’s time to send every one of these right-wing sellouts packing. But we’re up against a mountain of dark money. And if we don’t get serious right now, we’ll lose our chance. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Let’s geaux, — James Carville = = Paid for by SMP, www.SenateMajority.com, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: PA Dems
subject: Our biggest judicial test since Trump took office
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party
body:
| |
---
Peter,

Last year, the Pennsylvania Supreme Court upheld the very foundation of our democracy: the right to vote in free and fair elections.

**Now, Donald Trump’s MAGA allies are targeting the Court that stood in their way.**

This November, three justices face retention elections—and the outcome will shape Pennsylvanians’ rights for generations to come.

This is HUGE, friend...

**Sen. Elizabeth Warren is calling for a federal investigation into what might be one of the most suspicious settlements in recent memory.**

Here’s what we know:

➡️ Trump sued Paramount over a “60 Minutes” segment with Kamala Harris.

➡️ Instead of fighting back, Paramount settled and handed Trump **$16 MILLION.**

➡️ _This happened just as Paramount was seeking approval for a merger from Trump._

This reeks of corruption... Sen. Warren said it herself!! ↘↘↘
[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/64421?t=7&akid=23216%2E4449941%2EgO_KR9)
If corporations are funneling hush money to Donald Trump in exchange for favorable treatment from his government — the American people have every right to know.

[**If you agree, citizen co-sign Sen. Warren’s investigation before 11:59PM:**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/64421?t=8&akid=23216%2E4449941%2EgO_KR9)
[PLEASE: CITIZEN COSIGN THE INVESTIGATION >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/64421?t=9&akid=23216%2E4449941%2EgO_KR9)

Hey folks,
Just dropped another great episode with Don Lemon. We're digging into some heavy stuff this week, including:
* **Trump 's Epstein Problem Just Got Messier: **The MAGA base is turning on Trump over his chaotic responses to the Epstein files. Even longtime allies like Libs of TikTok are calling him out--real fractures are showing.
* **Silence Speaks Volumes:** Dan Bongino, Kash Patel, J.D. Vance... all suspiciously quiet. Their silence--and the GOP's refusal to release the Epstein list--raises serious questions about who's being protected.
* **The Spell Might Be Breaking:** MAGA influencers built empires on conspiracy theories. Now, Trump's starting to look like he's part of the very cabal they've been raging against. What happens next?

**👉 Become a paid subscriber to help Don and me keep pushing, keep asking, and keep talking about what others won't:**

With urgency,

--Mike

## [](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szif2g&__onlt=h&__lnam=You’ll be speechless over what Karine Jean-Pierre said about illegal aliens attacking the U.S. Army)**[Joe Biden’s doctor said three words that left Americans madder than hell](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=qwvgtp2v4czwdto3xa3i7sus2i7ayic9h63hg4kfx374dnsvwepm46d9kz00cs4mnaeba6dcfcc1p9zngpq8shilmxbgucnupjgqy87qngl3wiq3bze1betr1jfoe5w1qbqzixxpfpryvks8cz563kfuq2qkx6p5d3j7u17zyh6dqsw1hn7726pjc5ah10sa3dtr0mxrwhigl96p1ifvxb5jalx9tkpj1q642y3mmztt&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=szif2g&__onlt=h&__lnam=\[Read More...\])

| | | The Daily Signal writes:******[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqeoZfkhx0rJYxvzeQyPAOXxPzaHpN7uxnA66Ao0W-7EqZyFw6iLW1nc6uNsMh9U_6NGpYwkrJt-z5pEUcrGXdeUaBacaXkdT3lSYu6O8hG8cesObVGz1ywzXd8dwg2ECD1XzLrm6Zp7fIJEz4jeARNavacWjElwepxS8z45ZN8JyiObURs2XeU7LfZ-K_I-QnhYNmGp6YpAD3Rk21gBYA24ikeGYTqo984a4hDt-NVf-4GQklDzHajrR2zGZNCWNWbvaTw7UFcvogD7TP8mz5bwJrBoLIiEMebTQAgN_KDLG/4i8/EdVBDo3ZTpCVAn-lBYSwcg/h0/h001.TQNmT3U4gWYlO3HryfHs7nqIptqgMwK5VJ77W3NK0dQ)
** All eyes are turning to Virginia as the state heads into its off-year elections for governor and control of the Virginia House of Delegates this November. **As Virginians cast their ballots this fall, Americans will get a glimpse of how people in this bellwether state feel about President Donald Trump, Republicans, and their policies.** In one such key race, Republican incumbent state Del. Ian Lovejoy and Democrat Elizabeth Guzman, a former delegate for Virginia’s then-31st District, will go head-to-head on Nov. 5 to represent the state’s 22nd District. Republicans are spending tens of millions to erase the one-seat Democratic majority in the Virginia House of Delegates this November. We can _stop_ them by defeating Republican incumbents. **Social worker, mom and Democrat Elizabeth Guzman needs your help to deliver MAGA Republicans a big defeat and keep the House of Delegates blue.** **[Our next chance to REJECT Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans will be in Virginia this November, and our campaign is powered by over 5,000 online donations. Democrat [Elizabeth Guzman](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.xqm-apKpWqGuZCDDu9wrxXA8maWDG4HvFsLVwyj62A-vPvKDKO8dsR6az_CDR-WYmpHeknrHMuwq6B3rdqhPQNJt4inAH1355l6K5sqEpOI6GiGrHoDeMoKtjalA4pc37tsnj43A7_xt8S32u-59nagXhxRqK3plMx1C99G_akstWhHWv1VMXc3oxcFaiqzXt4Pq0Lci4eFeGaWr_hJqarqlWRs0zL62-gE016Ri5pJe3vyu3oCvHC2AJWUaUnm5hXBgQGthvScxo0moHPh1MyFrv9hhMKvoXcNuJO97vcs/4i8/EdVBDo3ZTpCVAn-lBYSwcg/h9/h001.E0On5R_gMu0qki8ti3gJ1ELHuCovM2xlByD8D2o4ROI) is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. Peter, we just heard this news and had to come to you right away:
THE NRCC OUTRAISED DEMOCRATS LAST QUARTER, AND THEY'RE ON TRACK TO DO THE SAME THIS QUARTER
The GOP raised $36.7 million last quarter, folks.
They are NOT playing around.
Republicans aren’t just hoping to hold the House. They’re planning to straight-up purchase it.
The NRCC is quietly flooding battleground districts with dark money, billionaire cash, and far-right talking points — all in an effort to lock in GOP control of Congress before most voters have even tuned in.

name: Dr. Jasmeet Bains
subject: David Valadao voted to cut Medicaid in our district. I’m the doctor running to replace him.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92205?t=6&akid=20651%2E878179%2ED76fAI) Friend, I’m Dr. Jasmeet Bains — a family and addiction doctor, daughter of immigrants, and the first Sikh American elected to the California Legislature. Today, I’m officially launching my campaign for Congress in California’s 22nd district.

**Why? Because our representative, Republican David Valadao, just cast a vote to rip away healthcare that covers 68% of the people in my district — the largest Medicaid cut in U.S. history. All to give tax breaks to billionaires.

This vote should end his political career, but only if we do something about it.**

[So I’m stepping up to run — because I’ve seen how much my community relies on lifesaving, accessible healthcare. Valadao sold us out, and now it’s time to vote him out.

This district is WINNABLE — but only if we come out strong from Day One. And that starts right now. Will you make a split donation between our campaign and the Voter Protection Project?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92205?t=7&akid=20651%2E878179%2ED76fAI) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jasmeet Bains and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92206?t=8&akid=20651%2E878179%2ED76fAI)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92207?t=9&akid=20651%2E878179%2ED76fAI)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92208?t=10&akid=20651%2E878179%2ED76fAI)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92209?t=11&akid=20651%2E878179%2ED76fAI)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92205?t=12&akid=20651%2E878179%2ED76fAI)
In the clinic I see patients every weekend, Medicaid isn’t a talking point — it’s a lifeline; it’s the difference between families getting the care they need or going without.

Valadao’s vote to slash Medicaid and strip coverage for families puts all of our communities at risk — and I won’t stand by while our families pay the price.

I treat patients in the same neighborhoods that raised me — parents battling diabetes, children with asthma, and veterans facing PTSD, depression and fentanyl overdoses in our community. During the wildfires that devastated LA, I volunteered to provide medical services to injured first responders. When COVID struck, I helped organize our response across the Central Valley.

As a physician and legislator, I’ve seen the consequences of political decisions in real time, and I’ve fought to deliver real results here at home: expanding rural healthcare access, cutting costs for working families, and tackling the fentanyl epidemic.

**We need leaders who understand what’s at stake** — not just in hearings, but in hospital halls and community clinics.

This isn’t about politics — it’s personal. It’s about protecting care, expanding opportunity, and standing up for families who too often get overlooked.

[So I’m asking: will you chip in $10 or whatever you can to help flip this seat and send a doctor to Congress who’ll never sell out our communities? »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92205?t=13&akid=20651%2E878179%2ED76fAI)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jasmeet Bains and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92206?t=14&akid=20651%2E878179%2ED76fAI)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92207?t=15&akid=20651%2E878179%2ED76fAI)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92208?t=16&akid=20651%2E878179%2ED76fAI)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92209?t=17&akid=20651%2E878179%2ED76fAI)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/92205?t=18&akid=20651%2E878179%2ED76fAI)
Let’s win this — for our health, for our community, and for every family still waiting to be heard.

Dr. Jasmeet Bains
_Candidate for Congress, California’s 22nd District_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20651%2E878179%2ED76fAI). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20651%2E878179%2ED76fAI).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20651%2E878179%2ED76fAI) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=19&akid=20651%2E878179%2ED76fAI). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=20651%2E878179%2ED76fAI)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=20651%2E878179%2ED76fAI)

body:
Every small-dollar donation makes a huge difference in my work to fight for working families and stand up to Donald Trump. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111605302/557780858/-785282667?refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250716_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODRlZDQ4My04NjYyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u2wky9mXBggm_GKME2Hz_XIogxbOITfoflCnQNU82MU=)

Things are tough right now, Peter. Trust me, I get it. Prices are still too high. Republicans are coming for our health care and Social Security to deliver a massive tax break to billionaires. People are being kidnapped off our streets. That’s why I wish I didn’t have to ask for money in emails like these. It’s one of my least favorite parts of the job. But if I’m being honest, it’s also a necessary part of the job. Elections typically come down to who has the most money to spend on running ads, training volunteers, and reaching voters — and since billionaires send more and more money to GOP candidates who will give them tax cuts and provide backing for Trump’s authoritarian agenda, it’s important to build a strong grassroots base that can stand up against them. Even just $1 will help me fight against Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans in Congress, defend working families from their billionaire-first agenda, stand up to the Trump administration’s lawlessness, and continue to listen and show up for Vermonters. **[So if you can, Peter — and only if you can — please pitch in $1 today. name: Tim Burchett
subject: THE EPSTEIN COVER-UP
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burchett for Congress**
body:
I’m calling on Ghislaine Maxwell 📩

body:

| | | [ ](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aORN/?__vbtrk=MzAzNDE0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzAzNDE0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

Patriot, My name is Dan Innis, and I'm running for U.S. Senate in New Hampshire. I’m a **father** , a **farmer** , and a **small businessman** who will **FIGHT for President Trump!** I’ve stood with President Trump’s America First Agenda from the beginning and **have never wavered on that support.** The President needs backup in the Senate. Not soft talkers. Not failed career politicians. Fighters. **I’ll call bull when I see it in the Senate.** And trust me, there’s PLENTY of that going around. I just launched my campaign and am asking you for your support. This seat has been held by radical Democrats for far too long, and I will FLIP IT RED for President Trump! [**Click here to help me win this race by chipping in $26, $52, $104, or even more today!**](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aORN/?__vbtrk=MzAzNDE0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzAzNDE0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct "Donate Today!")

[ ](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aORN/?__vbtrk=MzAzNDE0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzAzNDE0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

| [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aORN/?__vbtrk=MzAzNDE0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzAzNDE0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct "Watch Now") [Watch Now](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aORN/?__vbtrk=MzAzNDE0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzAzNDE0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
I’m not a career politician or a Washington insider. I run a Wagyu farm here in Bradford, and I know what it’s like to earn every dollar with hard work and honesty. In the State Senate, I’ve fought to:
* **Cut taxes** for families and small businesses

* **Protect parental rights** and **keep woke OUT of the classroom****

**
* **Co-sponsored the legislation to keep boys out of girls’ sports here in New Hampshire**

My opponent, on the other hand, has voted with Pelosi and AOC 100% of the time in Congress. Chris Pappas is a far-left liberal who has:
* **Voted against** deporting illegal immigrants arrested for drunk driving (seriously!)

* **Voted against** keeping boys out of girls' sports**

**
* **Voted against **President Trump's emergency declaration on our Southern Border

If I ran my farm like Chris Pappas and the Democrats want to run our country, **I’d be out of business. ** Your donation right now will help me hit the ground running and take the fight to Chris Pappas. Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.

Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. [**Your support is crucial to our efforts. The attacks of the last few years in our state legislatures across the country targeting the right to vote, especially minority communities, are an assault on our democracy.Now Musk and the MAGA movement want to privatize our postal service and harm mail-in voting , which has helped millions of Americans vote -- not just in the pandemic, but going back to the states that adopted the widespread practice in the early 90's. “ Our entire democracy is now at risk ,” they wrote. “ History will judge what we do at this moment. ” With so much at stake now -- not just with voting rights -- we've got to push our efforts to fight back into overdrive ASAP. If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.Integrity First Voter Action Project P.O. name: Team Bennet
subject: Winning the Colorado Way
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q3?refcode=X_250716_coloradoway_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q3?refcode=X_250716_coloradoway_act]
Hi team,
Right now, the Democratic Party is looking for a path forward—a path to broad wins in 2026, defeating Trumpism, and truly representing our working families at the state and national levels.
Michael firmly believes Colorado is paving that path forward. If you believe in Michael as much as Michael believes in Colorado, please rush a $10 donation right now >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q3?refcode=X_250716_coloradoway_act&amount=10]
Don’t take our word for it—the numbers speak for themselves: In 2024, Colorado was a rare bright blue spot in a sea of red. Compared to states like California and New York, which saw ten-point shifts to the Republican Party, Colorado only shifted by 2.5 points one of the lowest rates in the nation. Colorado Democrats also held onto their majorities in the state legislature, which was far from a guarantee.
Republicans haven’t won a presidential election in Colorado since 2004, while Democrats have steadily made gains across our state—gains that Michael Bennet helped forge and are now receiving nationwide attention.
The Progressive Policy Institute, an organization dedicated to generating progressive, pragmatic economic policies, chose Denver as the site of its first post-election gathering because of our consistent success in winning tough elections, " the Colorado Way."
"The Colorado Way" focuses on saving Coloradans their hard earned money—from reducing rep tape to lowering taxes and delivering affordable housing. In Colorado, we build a big tent by focusing on making people's lives materially better.

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q3?refcode=X_250716_coloradoway_act]
Michael has been doing this work for decades. Since becoming the Superintendent of the Denver Public Schools in 2005 and then our U.S. Senator, Michael has been a model of fighting for a working-class agenda, winning tough races, and building broad coalitions.
Now, Michael is running for governor, "the Colorado Way" to deliver tangible results for working people and to provide our country and our party with an optimistic, hopeful way forward.
Team, we’ll only be able to make it happen with you on our side, so what do you say? Can you join us today by chipping in a few bucks? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q3?refcode=X_250716_coloradoway_act]
Thanks,
Team Bennet
P.S. If you are interested in learning more about “the Colorado Way,” read this article. [https://www.politico.com/news/magazine/2025/07/06/the-colorado-way-democratic-party-00370340]

name: Josh Weil for U.S. Senate
subject: While you’re stretching every dollar, they’re cashing in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Weil, Democrat for US Senate
body:
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/387153444E713877456653376A556574376F314841345859327A4D665362374C42586753794B64635252546F6551413647436E7356536243345157355952664A/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-06-18%20at%2011.41.25%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Friend, Let’s stop pretending it’s an accident.
The cost of everything is through the roof: food, gas, rent, healthcare, and the folks at the top?
They’ve never been richer.
Billion-dollar companies are posting record profits.
Landlords are jacking up rent for no reason.
Insurers are denying care while CEOs cash million-dollar bonuses.
Only two things can put an end to this and put the people back on top: You and I.
[https://d15k2d11r6t6rl.cloudfront.net/public/users/Integrators/04eaa6b2-88f4-43b4-b978-7bb0708f5838/636279525A75307A3949353873654E62524A6C4735484470555748617A4E736A7471796630592B57424E5531315A38333736624D464A71546B574F7844313739/editor_images/Screenshot%202025-07-16%20at%204.49.27%E2%80%AFPM.png]
This isn’t a “crisis,” It’s a choice. A political one made by the people who profit from your pain and hold the power to stop it, but won’t.
I’m running for U.S. Senate to end this racket . To tax the ultra-wealthy. To break up the price-gouging monopolies.
To make sure your hard work finally pays off.
But I can’t do this alone. This campaign runs on real people, no corporate PACs, no billionaires.
If you’re fed up, if you want a Senator who doesn’t answer to the rich , then now’s the time :
👊CHIP IN TO HELP US WIN 2026. !!️ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/coreemail_jw_kl]

Peter,

Have you seen this note from my team about the so-called “Big Beautiful Bill”? **It’s true — I wouldn’t have voted for it.**

And I wouldn’t have smiled for the cameras after gutting funding for working families either. I’m running because folks like Tommy Tuberville have had their shot. And they’ve failed Alabama. **_[If you’re ready for real leadership, chip in $10 before tomorrow’s mid-month deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111606119/557783848/-915612698?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_KS_20250716_FR_MMFR_0_3MO_Kyle_NA_NA_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGM1MTI0ZGMtODk2Mi1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5x-1mE5irpTE0mihCrsAMjxw5hc70Tj9HxJZb5UHMdw=)_**

**_Begin forwarded message:_** Peter,

If Kyle were in the Senate, he wouldn’t be bragging about voting for the “Big Beautiful Bill.” **_He’d be calling out how bad it is for Alabama._**

It guts rural services. It hands tax breaks to billionaires. And it leaves working families with crumbs. Kyle’s campaign is about flipping this seat and fighting for real folks. And that starts with building real support right now.

He believes that honest people who welcome accountability and transparency are how we save the American Dream. If you would like to unsubscribe from this list, | Peter, Have you seen this note from my team about the so-called “Big Beautiful Bill”? It’s true — I wouldn’t have voted for it. And I wouldn’t have smiled for the cameras after gutting funding for working families either. I’m running because folks like Tommy Tuberville have had their shot. And they’ve failed Alabama. = Begin forwarded message: Peter, If Kyle were in the Senate, he wouldn’t be bragging about voting for the “Big Beautiful Bill.” He’d be calling out how bad it is for Alabama. It guts rural services. It hands tax breaks to billionaires. And it leaves working families with crumbs. Kyle’s campaign is about flipping this seat and fighting for real folks. name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: Do you remember my son?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
We’re 4 days from a major deadline.
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=513%2E181023%2Ew1Ck0J)
Hey Team — You might remember my son, who sometimes comes with me to events. He is 9 now, but in less than a decade, he’ll be 18 and making decisions about his future, where he wants to live, and where he wants to work.
[](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q32025.A5XsW4&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250716_PM2_V1_S1&t=2&akid=513%2E181023%2Ew1Ck0J)
Everything we do in this next decade will define his childhood, his future, and the future of our loved ones all across Michigan. I want him to be confident that Michigan is the best place to grow up, raise a family, find a good job, and build a life worth being proud of.
I believe we all want our loved ones to be happy, healthy, safe, and nearby. And the decisions we make over the next 10 years will directly determine not just my son's future, but the future of kids all throughout our country.
And so I come into this campaign with a sense of urgency.
This campaign is about creating a Michigan where our children and grandchildren will grow up in safe neighborhoods, find jobs they love, and have the chance to build lives they’re proud of in the communities that raised them.
**That’s what we’re fighting for. But we have a big challenge ahead. Our most important fundraising deadline yet is just 4 days away, and we need major resources to keep this grassroots movement strong.[ Will you chip in today to help us meet that deadline and keep fighting for a better Michigan? ](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q32025.OcO0Lx&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250716_PM2_V1_S1&t=3&akid=513%2E181023%2Ew1Ck0J)**

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: Gavin Newsom is coming after me
body:
I can't think of a better gift than being criticized by Hollywood Newsom because I voted for President Trump's One Big Beautiful Bill.

|
---
Well, we now know how many liberals there are in Seneca, South Carolina, Fellow American, they all fit in one room with CA Governor Gavin Newsom.

Gavin Newsom spent the morning attacking me in my hometown, on my birthday, just because I voted for President Trump's One Big Beautiful Bill.

I can't think of a better gift in South Carolina.

I know why Gavin Newsom doesn't like this bill; it's everything the liberals hate. And everything that we wouldn't have been able to pass if Democrats had control of the Senate or the White House.

| [** PROTECT OUR
SENATE MAJORITY >> **](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/XpBDc5efnpDUljopjyY6oA~~/AARclBA~/SHb9HV-HvwIbnLxLeXrRDOfFLDhJ5ichmvAB8wtY5SLxrbsqoj_gmYXATlM3bYImealay5hFFTVvf-ql9-_1VsqjCyTDyzHg-q3obXeMS7fUV4PiKsGfNEnEGNk7UbRUSvrdAeDVZWMAISAvLqOwEwiya4u6ygTIMyYCUlxMEHxfit3LSYDXuFm8rbRkUiyO37GMSmrSE5--Aq-3BRFFp-Wm2Ik_uelf95Jc2G50BkuH9oAWotYPvDLR5uqZ7McfyMLi0-67OLR0J08kAD1kMxWFRlDqdZ16reewBkITJl8KlCNENGCV4PwROCHuUi_e)
---

The One Big Beautiful Bill cuts taxes. It reduces spending, with a debt reduction of over $400 billion. It's also the largest investment in the history of the country for border security, and it makes our military stronger.

Instead of taking care of the mess that is California, Newsom is more concerned with campaigning in our early presidential primary state, South Carolina.

While I'll take the digs, Newsom's Hollywood friends are ready to dump millions into my race, again.

Democrats like Gavin Newsom helped my 2020 opponent raise more money than any other Democrat in South Carolina Senate history. We must be prepared for this flood of liberal cash **[and be ready to fight back against their attacks!](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/XpBDc5efnpDUljopjyY6oA~~/AARclBA~/SHb9HV-HvwIbnLxLeXrRDOfFLDhJ5ichmvAB8wtY5SLxrbsqoj_gmYXATlM3bYImealay5hFFTVvf-ql9-_1VsqjCyTDyzHg-q3obXeMS7fUV4PiKsGfNEnEGNk7UbRUSvrdAeDVZWMAISAvLqOwEwiya4u6ygTIMyYCUlxMEHxfit3LSYDXuFm8rbRkUiyO37GMSmrSE5--Aq-3BRFFp-Wm2Ik_uelf95Jc2G50BkuH9oAWotYPvDLR5uqZ7McfyMLi0-67OLR0J08kAD1kMxWFRlDqdZ16reewBkITJl8KlCNENGCV4PwROCHuUi_e)**

**[Will you help me by chipping in even just $5 before the end of the day?](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/XpBDc5efnpDUljopjyY6oA~~/AARclBA~/SHb9HV-HvwIbnLxLeXrRDOfFLDhJ5ichmvAB8wtY5SLxrbsqoj_gmYXATlM3bYImealay5hFFTVvf-ql9-_1VsqjCyTDyzHg-q3obXeMS7fUV4PiKsGfNEnEGNk7UbRUSvrdAeDVZWMAISAvLqOwEwiya4u6ygTIMyYCUlxMEHxfit3LSYDXuFm8rbRkUiyO37GMSmrSE5--Aq-3BRFFp-Wm2Ik_uelf95Jc2G50BkuH9oAWotYPvDLR5uqZ7McfyMLi0-67OLR0J08kAD1kMxWFRlDqdZ16reewBkITJl8KlCNENGCV4PwROCHuUi_e)**

[** SAY NO TO CA NEWSOM >> **](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/XpBDc5efnpDUljopjyY6oA~~/AARclBA~/SHb9HV-HvwIbnLxLeXrRDOfFLDhJ5ichmvAB8wtY5SLxrbsqoj_gmYXATlM3bYImealay5hFFTVvf-ql9-_1VsqjCyTDyzHg-q3obXeMS7fUV4PiKsGfNEnEGNk7UbRUSvrdAeDVZWMAISAvLqOwEwiya4u6ygTIMyYCUlxMEHxfit3LSYDXuFm8rbRkUiyO37GMSmrSE5--Aq-3BRFFp-Wm2Ik_uelf95Jc2G50BkuH9oAWotYPvDLR5uqZ7McfyMLi0-67OLR0J08kAD1kMxWFRlDqdZ16reewBkITJl8KlCNENGCV4PwROCHuUi_e)

Thanks,
Lindsey Graham

clean_body: I can't think of a better gift than being criticized by Hollywood Newsom because I voted for President Trump's One Big Beautiful Bill. | Well, we now know how many liberals there are in Seneca, South Carolina, Fellow American, they all fit in one room with CA Governor Gavin Newsom. Gavin Newsom spent the morning attacking me in my hometown, on my birthday, just because I voted for President Trump's One Big Beautiful Bill. I can't think of a better gift in South Carolina. I know why Gavin Newsom doesn't like this bill; it's everything the liberals hate. And everything that we wouldn't have been able to pass if Democrats had control of the Senate or the White House. | The One Big Beautiful Bill cuts taxes. It reduces spending, with a debt reduction of over $400 billion. It's also the largest investment in the history of the country for border security, and it makes our military stronger. Instead of taking care of the mess that is California, Newsom is more concerned with campaigning in our early presidential primary state, South Carolina. While I'll take the digs, Newsom's Hollywood friends are ready to dump millions into my race, again. Democrats like Gavin Newsom helped my 2020 opponent raise more money than any other Democrat in South Carolina Senate history. We must be prepared for this flood of liberal cash I hope you have safe travels back to California, Governor Newsom. I appreciate your shout-outs, and I hope they continue! Thanks, Lindsey Graham In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges. ~~ | Paid for by Graham Majority Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Team Graham Inc, Fund for America's Future, Security Is Strength PAC, and NRSC. Pop Acta Media | Conservative Broadcast PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | ~~_

clean_body: Your money belongs in your pocket, not the government’s Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this TRUMP TO THE DEEP STATE: Hands Off Our Social Security! Peter, President Trump is proposing a bold plan to ELIMINATE THE TAX ON SOCIAL SECURITY and put more money in YOUR pocket. But he can't do it alone. He needs your help to make this plan a reality. So we're asking: Our President is working around the clock to put more money in your pockets and stop giving it to big government - but he needs your help to put his HUGE plan into action. That's why we're asking YOU for your opinion. Thank you, GOP HQ Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

subject: Kellyanne Conway makes a play for New Jersey…

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email06302025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email06302025&amount=25]
Peter ,
When even Kellyanne Conway’s internal poll shows Democrat Mikie Sherrill beating Jack Ciattarelli in the New Jersey race for Governor, you know Republicans are getting nervous.
Conway’s super PAC has Sherrill up by 5 points, but here’s what that really means:
→ GOP megadonors are going to flood New Jersey with cash.
→ Trump allies are plotting to paint Mikie as “out of touch” to woo undecided voters.
→ And the Republican strategy of chaos, lies, and voter suppression will be in full swing.
Mikie Sherrill is a former Navy helicopter pilot and federal prosecutor with a track record of fighting for working families in Congress. She’s running a people-powered campaign to stop the Trump machine from taking New Jersey backward.
But if we don’t ramp up support NOW, Conway’s narrative could become reality.
📢 GOTV PAC is working to boost Democratic turnout and defend this seat, but we need your help to do it. Can you pitch in $15 or more to power our voter turnout work and help Mikie win this race? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email07162025&amount=25]

[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, sigh.
Another day, another establishment Democrat bashing young, progressive,
Democratic rising star Zohran Mamdani.

When asked if there’s room for candidates like Zohran in the Democratic
Party, failed presidential candidate and former Democratic Congressman
Dean Phillips said, “No.”

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250716?refcode=em20250716-36848&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36848_1203867_Xwb1qL&akid=36848%2E1203867%2EXwb1qL ]Post from Summer Lee (@SummerForPA) on X. The post reads: 'Behind
Zohran was the most voters in NYC primary history. These guys aren't just
rejecting him, but the millions moved to electoral action by candidates
like him. Maybe our big tent should have less millionaire nepo heirs &
more fighters for the millions of working class people.' The post quotes a
post from from @Acyn reading: 'Question: Is there room for you and Mamdani
in the Democratic Party? Phillips: The answer, ultimately, I think, is no.
When you have socialists in the Democratic Party, I don't know how
anybody...'. Below the quote is a video screenshot from CNN. It shows a
split-screen interview with a host and former U.S. Representative Dean
Phillips. The chyron reads: 'ENDORSE OR OPPOSE? DEMOCRATS GRAPPLE WITH
MAMDANI'S CANDIDACY. Dean Phillips (D) Former U.S. Representative for
Minnesota.'

Justice Democrats’ own Rep. Summer Lee put it best: Why does the
Democratic Party keep listening to millionaires instead of the voters and
working-class people demanding change?

As Zohran continues to be attacked by millionaires and billionaires like
Dean Phillips and Mark Cuban, the facts are clear: he won more total votes
in the New York primary than ever before in history, because of — not in
spite of — his commitment to tackling the rising costs of living for
working-class and poor New Yorkers through bold solutions. And he did it
while going up against $25 million spent by Super PACs.

Zohran’s win and surging popularity among voters prove that this is the
way forward. If Democratic incumbents and party leaders don’t want to
listen and adapt, then it’s on us to vote in a new generation that will.

Justice Democrats already launched our first 2026 primary challenger, and
we’re gearing up to endorse even more — but since we don’t take a dime
from corporate PACs, we’re counting on grassroots support from folks like
you.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250716?refcode=em20250716-36848&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36848_1203867_Xwb1qL&akid=36848%2E1203867%2EXwb1qL ]Will you help us take on the corporate establishment and send more
fighters for working-class people to Congress by pitching in
your first
$5?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250716?refcode=em20250716-36848&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36848_1203867_Xwb1qL&akid=36848%2E1203867%2EXwb1qL ]Contribute $5

The more we raise from emails like this one, the more candidates we can
endorse and elect in 2026!

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250716-36848-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36848_1203867_Xwb1qL&akid=36848%2E1203867%2EXwb1qL

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36848%2E1203867%2EXwb1qL

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603

name: Deb Haaland
subject: I could hardly believe my eyes when I saw these photos:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
I’m so grateful each time I see one of our yard signs or a beautiful mural out on the campaign trail.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=3279%2E400544%2EEQMfSL)
When I first saw these photos, I could hardly believe my eyes:
[
](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250716_2_yardsigns_na?amount=25&refcode=em20250716-3279&refcode2=3279_400544_EQMfSL&akid=3279%2E400544%2EEQMfSL)_On the side of our old field office in Albuquerque, NM_
Somáh showed me this picture a while back. Some of our dedicated volunteers painted our campaign logo on the side of our original field office in Albuquerque. I was so touched by the effort and dedication they poured into my very first Congressional campaign back in 2018.
So imagine my surprise when I saw this photo of a mural painted on the side of a building in Truth or Consequences, NM! I feel so humbled and grateful to know that people believe not only in me, but in the bright future we’re building together here in New Mexico.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250716_2_yardsigns_na?amount=25&refcode=em20250716-3279&refcode2=3279_400544_EQMfSL&akid=3279%2E400544%2EEQMfSL)
_A beautiful hand-painted mural in Truth or Consequences, NM_
It’s incredibly moving to see people publicly display their support for our campaign – and it motivates me to keep fighting each and every day. **That’s why I’m so excited to share the arrival of our official Team Deb yard signs!**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250716_2_yardsigns_na?amount=25&refcode=em20250716-3279&refcode2=3279_400544_EQMfSL&akid=3279%2E400544%2EEQMfSL)
Even if you don’t live in New Mexico, you can still make a big difference in our efforts to distribute as many yard signs across the state as possible. [**Would you donate $25 to send a yard sign to an in-state supporter and help demonstrate the undeniable momentum behind our campaign? I’d be so thankful.** ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250716_2_yardsigns_na?amount=25&refcode=em20250716-3279&refcode2=3279_400544_EQMfSL&akid=3279%2E400544%2EEQMfSL)
**[Donate $25 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250716_2_yardsigns_na?amount=25&refcode=em20250716-3279&refcode2=3279_400544_EQMfSL&akid=3279%2E400544%2EEQMfSL)**
My team likes to say these yard signs are like mini-billboards for our campaign. They’re a public declaration of support for our people-powered movement, and a great way for New Mexicans to show their friends, family, and neighbors that they’re members of this team.
I’m so grateful each time I see one of our yard signs (or a beautiful mural!) out on the campaign trail. It fills me with hope that we can fight, win, and finally change the game for New Mexico together.
[**I’d be so grateful if folks like you from your area could pitch in to send more of our official Team Deb yard signs across the state. Will you donate $25 or anything you can to our Early Bird Yard Sign Fund today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250716_2_yardsigns_na?amount=25&refcode=em20250716-3279&refcode2=3279_400544_EQMfSL&akid=3279%2E400544%2EEQMfSL)
Be fierce,
Deb
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250716-2&t=2&refcode2=3279_400544_EQMfSL&akid=3279%2E400544%2EEQMfSL)**
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=3279%2E400544%2EEQMfSL)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=4&akid=3279%2E400544%2EEQMfSL)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO

name: David Hogg
subject: We see you. We appreciate you.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
We see you. And we’re grateful you’re part of this movement.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250716-1&t=1&akid=2391%2E587540%2E6oeBRB)
Hi Peter,
We want to start by saying something we don’t say enough:
**You’re not just a name in a database. And you’re definitely not an ATM.**
Every time we reach out asking for support, we know you’re making a **real decision.** You’re weighing what you can give, when, and why. And even if you can’t give today — or every time — we see you.
And we’re deeply grateful that you’re part of this movement.
Because here’s the truth: **this work isn’t cheap**. Challenging entrenched power, lifting up bold new leaders, and running grassroots-powered campaigns across the country takes serious resources.
But here’s what we can promise you: **We stretch every single dollar**. We don’t waste, we don’t splurge, and we make sure your donation goes exactly where it’s needed most.
**[If you’re in a position to give today, can you pitch in $5 right now?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250716_1_notanatm?refcode=em20250716-2391&amount=5&refcode2=2391_587540_6oeBRB&akid=2391%2E587540%2E6oeBRB)**
Grassroots support like yours is the reason we can keep doing this work — and why we don’t rely on corporate PACs or mega-donors to fund our mission. If you believe in building a better future with bold, values-driven leaders, your donation means everything.
**[Donate $5 now and power this game-changing movement >>>](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250716_1_notanatm?refcode=em20250716-2391&amount=5&refcode2=2391_587540_6oeBRB&akid=2391%2E587540%2E6oeBRB)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250716_1_notanatm?amount=5&refcode=em20250716-2391&refcode2=2391_587540_6oeBRB&akid=2391%2E587540%2E6oeBRB)**
Thank you for being with us — not just when you give, but every day when you fight for the leaders we deserve.
With appreciation,
David Hogg
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250716-1&t=2&refcode2=2391_587540_6oeBRB&akid=2391%2E587540%2E6oeBRB)**

name: Team Jayapal
subject: What the resistance looks like
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
The Resistance Lab has trained 10,000+ people so far. Will you help us reach even more?
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250716-5247-footer&t=1&akid=5247%2E420207%2EudppsL)
Peter, last weekend was a big one for our movement!
**On Saturday, Pramila joined _Indivisible_ movement leaders** to build on the grassroots organizing momentum across the country.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250716-1?refcode=em20250716-5247&refcode2=5247_420207_udppsL&akid=5247%2E420207%2EudppsL)
_Pramila speaking with Indivisible organizers about grassroots power and defending our democracy._
With a room full of people committed to pushing back against Trump’s extremism and fighting for a democracy that works for all of us, the energy was electric.
**And on Sunday, the Resistance Lab was back in action:**
_[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250716-1?refcode=em20250716-5247&refcode2=5247_420207_udppsL&akid=5247%2E420207%2EudppsL)
Our campaign interns hosted a Resistance Lab watch party to bring more people into the movement._
It’s hard to believe, but since launching just a few months ago, **more than 10,000 people from all 50 states** have taken part in the Resistance Lab trainings.
This movement is growing fast because people understand what’s at stake. They know we need to be **ready for this authoritarian moment** , not just for the next election.
👉 [**Will you pitch in $3 or anything you can to help power our organizing efforts all over the country?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250716-1?refcode=em20250716-5247&amount=3&refcode2=5247_420207_udppsL&akid=5247%2E420207%2EudppsL)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250716-1?amount=3&refcode=em20250716-5247&refcode2=5247_420207_udppsL&akid=5247%2E420207%2EudppsL)**
Pramila doesn’t just talk about organizing, she actually invests in it. She uses her campaign to power movement-building year-round, unlike many who just run ads right before an election.
But with Trump and the far right escalating their attacks on our democracy, we can’t afford to slow down. Not now. Not when this movement is catching fire. **And to keep growing the movement, we need your help.**
👉 [**So if you can, please pitch in $3 right now to help us scale up our organizing across all 50 states.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250716-1?refcode=em20250716-5247&amount=3&refcode2=5247_420207_udppsL&akid=5247%2E420207%2EudppsL)
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250716-5247-footer&t=2&refcode2=5247_420207_udppsL&akid=5247%2E420207%2EudppsL)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=3&akid=5247%2E420207%2EudppsL)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=5247%2E420207%2EudppsL)

body:
We flipped this seat once — now it’s time to protect it.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111606767/557786055/1331311171?source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_071625_OSSOFF_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmNhYTkzZi04YzYyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LA0PnbPEHZykVRRLBhZQi6H-bIsxD7hOtNXJF9CKf_g=&emci=d1857339-8c62-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=8bcaa93f-8c62-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=43566853) Peter, we're sounding the ALARM. 🚨 This weekend, Jon Ossoff RELENTLESSLY took down Donald Trump — and now, Georgia Republicans are pulling out all the stops to flip his seat. name: Jena for CO
subject: It’s not easy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2507-q3-jg?refcode=250716-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2507-q3-jg?refcode=250716-email]
Peter –
Jena Griswold isn’t running for Attorney General because it’s easy—she’s running because it matters.
Jena grew up in a working-class family in Estes Park, raised by parents who struggled to make ends meet. She worked her way through school, became the first in her family to graduate college, earned a law degree, and dedicated her life to public service.
That’s what drives her: making sure every Coloradan—no matter their zip code or income—has a fair shot.
As Secretary of State, Jena strengthened our democracy and stood up to Trump. As Attorney General, she’ll protect our rights, fight for reproductive freedom, defend our environment, and hold powerful interests accountable.
This campaign is about protecting the future for everyone.If you believe in Jena’s vision, will you make a mid-month donation today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2507-q3-jg?refcode=250716-email]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Republican Rep. calls me a ‘Muslim terrorist’
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
I am asking you to join me today in supporting a formal censure against Rep. Fine in the House of Representatives for his dangerous remarks
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1716%2E791427%2EGHG0Rw)

[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-july25.Ih7rVK&refcode=em250716-1-nor&t=2&akid=1716%2E791427%2EGHG0Rw)
Friend — Another day, another outrageous and hateful statement from Republican members of Congress.
And this certainly isn’t the first time for Rep. Fine.
Before he came to Congress he tweeted a threat at myself and Rashida Tlaib. He said we should consider leaving before he arrived, adding #BombsAway. He suggested on live TV that Gaza should be nuked. He has even celebrated the death of Palestinian children responding to an image of a deceased child with “Thanks for the pic!” Even Marjorie Taylor Greene and Tucker Carlson condemned him for this. And now he is calling me a “Muslim terrorist.”
[**Friend, this level of hatred and Islamophobia is completely unacceptable for a member of Congress. I am asking you to support me today with a donation, in a show of solidarity as I stand up to Randy Fine and the entire far-right every day in Congress:**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-july25.Ih7rVK&refcode=em250716-1-nor&t=3&akid=1716%2E791427%2EGHG0Rw)
**[DONATE $5](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-july25.Ih7rVK&source=5&refcode=em250716-1-nor&t=4&akid=1716%2E791427%2EGHG0Rw)**
Let me be absolutely clear: What Rep. Fine tweeted is a thinly-veiled death threat.
Benjamin Netanyahu has directed the mass murder of tens of thousands of Palestinians — hundreds of thousands in some recent estimates. These are innocent civilians who have been sentenced to either death or an existence of starvation and trauma by the Israeli military’s brutal assault of the Gaza strip.
By calling them my “fellow Muslim terrorists,” Rep. Fine is telling us that he doesn’t see any Palestinians as civilians, but rather targets. And he’s telling us that he thinks me and other Muslims deserve the same fate.
This is the state of much of the Republican party under Trump. Hateful, racist, violent, and completely devoid of compassion for their fellow human beings.
If they have any moral fiber left in their bodies, Republicans would call on Randy Fine to resign. But we all know they won’t, which is why I’m asking you to help me show that you have my back and that our movement will not be intimidated or silenced.
[**Please, make a contribution to my campaign today as we work together to combat Rep. Randy Fine’s violent, racist rhetoric against myself and millions of Muslim Americans. Your donation helps us prove that our movement is stronger than ever and ready to go to bat against the MAGA extremists.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-july25.Ih7rVK&refcode=em250716-1-nor&t=5&akid=1716%2E791427%2EGHG0Rw)
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately:_
| | **[Donate $5](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/13?c0=io-em-july25.gEqi_4&amount=5&refcode=em250716-1-nor&t=6&akid=1716%2E791427%2EGHG0Rw)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/13?c0=io-em-july25.gEqi_4&refcode=em250716-1-nor&t=7&akid=1716%2E791427%2EGHG0Rw)**
---
****
No matter the amount of vitriol and hate they throw my way, I will never back down.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

Their actions have given us the clear, powerful talking points we need to show voters exactly what they stand for: _cruelty over care, billionaires over working families._

name: Defeat MTG
subject: Marjorie Taylor Greene has turned Congress into a sideshow—and our democracy into her personal stunt reel.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111607466/557788347/284948333?refcode=250716_MFC_SH_Sideshow&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzI2OWQ1MS04ZjYyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E_lwW1i-0RIeYEiCjFzFTuK53Zlwpg50i1lCkcp8tWM=) She chased a school shooting survivor down the street. She heckled President Biden during the State of the Union like it was a WWE match. She called for a “national divorce” and spread nonsense about Jewish space lasers. Marjorie Taylor Greene has turned Congress into a sideshow—and our democracy into her personal stunt reel. I’m Retired Brigadier General Shawn Harris. I served 30 years in the Military. I’ve commanded troops in combat zones around the world. And now I’m called to serve again—this time to stop her. She’s backed by dark money and MAGA millions. But I’ve got something more substantial: a mission—and a grassroots team like you. **We’re up against our biggest fundraising deadline yet. If we hit our goal, we show the world that Greene’s clown show can be cancelled. If we fall short, she keeps embarrassing us on live TV.** [**I need your help. name: Rebecca Hardy
subject: TFVC is Taking Tyrants to Court
body:
| |
---
Help us fight for the rights of unvaccinated students | | [View in browser](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/td/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTYwMTIwOTE2NDk2MzUzMTc4LFwiclwiOjE2MDEyMDk1NDQ1MDYwOTkzMX0iLCJzIjoiN2EyZmU5Y2M0MWU3YTIyNyJ9)
| |
---
| [ ](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/td/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTYwMTIwOTE2NTA2ODM4OTM5LFwiclwiOjE2MDEyMDk1NDQ1MDYwOTkzMX0iLCJzIjoiNjI2NDc1Y2YzZDk0ZmVhMiJ9)
---
|
---
Peter, TFVC doesn’t just believe in medical liberty when it’s easy or popular. We believe in vaccine choice for everyone. All the time. Period. So, earlier this year, when we heard from families in Seminole ISD, a small school district in West Texas with administrators who were enforcing unreasonable school exclusions amid a measles outbreak, we volunteered to help. According to Texas Education Code, students _can_ be excluded from public school during _epidemics or emergencies_ , as declared by the Department of State Health Services. In this case, no emergency or epidemic was declared in Seminole ISD, or anywhere else in Texas. Yet, some students with vaccine exemptions in Seminole ISD were forced to miss crucial class time during the spring semester. At the time, we contacted the DSHS commissioner and the Seminole ISD Superintendent for answers, but, unsurprisingly, we were met with silence and defiance. So TFVC decided to do what we do best—**Fight for you!** **_Earlier this year, TFVC secured legal counsel and filed suit against Seminole ISD. This case is now getting a hearing, and Team TFVC will be on the ground in Gaines County next week to represent these families._** Make no mistake, this overreach and abuse of authority will not end with school exclusions, and we already learned that it does not end with Seminole ISD. We know how this works, but more importantly, we know our rights! Fortunately, TFVC has the expertise to protect Texans’ right to make medical decisions for their families, [but we need your help!](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/td/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTYwMTIwOTE2NTE0MTc4OTczLFwiclwiOjE2MDEyMDk1NDQ1MDYwOTkzMX0iLCJzIjoiMjkzNzQ2YjRkZTdhZTNlNyJ9)

| | | [ Give Today! ](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/td/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTYwMTIwOTE2NTIyNTY3NTgyLFwiclwiOjE2MDEyMDk1NDQ1MDYwOTkzMX0iLCJzIjoiMDEwZjgyOWI4ZDNkNTVjOCJ9)
---
|
---
Legally advocating for these families isn’t cheap, and medical tyrants have an endless purse of taxpayer dollars to throw at their attorneys! Your generous donation to the TFVC Education Foundation gives us the resources we need to fight for these families - and all Texas families - in court! Can we count on your tax-deductible contribution of [$250, $100, or just $50](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/td/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTYwMTIwOTE2NTI3ODEwNDYzLFwiclwiOjE2MDEyMDk1NDQ1MDYwOTkzMX0iLCJzIjoiNjEzMDgzNjkyOTc4OGQ4NSJ9) today? Every dollar strengthens our cause and prepares us for the next attack, wherever that might be. _Are you with us in the fight for medical liberty?_

|
---
| | | **Gratefully,
Rebecca Hardy
President, TFVC**

---|---|---
|
---
P.S. You can make a tax-deductible contribution to the Texans for Vaccine Choice Education Foundation and support our fight against medical tyranny in West Texas!

name: Team ODP
subject: $1 trillion cut. 11 hospitals at risk.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Ohio NEEDS to fight back. Join the fight before midnight.
|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111607885/557789970/-1426157924?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_MM3_250716_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNThjNTc4Yi05MDYyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=swawPWmrNLT9eBtpgwAEXjBW74PCZPIhQIA27eZSB3A=) Team, our July mid-month deadline is just hours away — [**_and we need your help to raise $15,000 by midnight to stay on track._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111607886/557789971/-1426157924?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_MM3_250716_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNThjNTc4Yi05MDYyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=swawPWmrNLT9eBtpgwAEXjBW74PCZPIhQIA27eZSB3A=) Here’s why:

This month, Donald Trump signed a law ripping healthcare away from hundreds of thousands of Ohio families. Now, 11 rural Ohio hospitals are at risk of shutting down, cutting off life-saving care from communities that need it most.

Ohio Republicans in the Senate backed those cuts, knowing full well the damage it would do. In Columbus, state Republicans are gutting healthcare: slashing Medicaid eligibility, skyrocketing bills, and siding with special interests over the people they’re supposed to serve.

**They’ve enabled Trump’s extremist, billionaire-backed agenda — and the consequences are landing squarely on Ohio families.**

So now, it’s our job to hold them accountable at the ballot box and ensure that Ohioans know exactly who sold our healthcare in exchange for tax cuts for billionaires. Now, 11 rural Ohio hospitals are at risk of shutting down, cutting off life-saving care from communities that need it most. Ohio Republicans in the Senate backed those cuts, knowing full well the damage it would do. In Columbus, state Republicans are gutting healthcare: slashing Medicaid eligibility, skyrocketing bills, and siding with special interests over the people they’re supposed to serve. They’ve enabled Trump’s extremist, billionaire-backed agenda — and the consequences are landing squarely on Ohio families.
