name: Art Mitchell, All On The Line
subject: We need to talk about the Voting Rights Act
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Your donation helps advance fair representation and fair maps
|
---

Peter,
There’s no ensuring fair maps without protecting equal access to the ballot box. But one of the tools created to advance and defend the voting rights of Black and Brown communities is under attack.
**The Voting Rights Act of 1965 (VRA) was a landmark legislation** that finally created a robust safeguard against discrimination and disenfranchisement in our elections and established strong tools to deliver on the promise of fair representation with fair district lines.
**For decades, the Voting Rights Act made a measurable impact in protecting the voting power of marginalized voters.**
But all that changed with the Supreme Court’s disastrous decision in _Shelby County_. The Court’s ruling gutted Section 5 of the Voting Rights Act, taking away key protections and making it easier for states to discriminate against voters of color.
Since then, anti-democracy forces have used and abused the courts, bringing case after case to advance a dangerous agenda that threatens the ability of certain voters to make their voices heard — and undermines the very foundations of our democracy.
As you read this, ongoing cases in Alabama, Georgia, and Louisiana are taking aim at other sections of the VRA, threatening to deprive voters of the chance to elect leaders who truly represent them.
**Throughout these attacks on the Voting Rights Act, All On the Line has been there every step of the way, working tirelessly to defend voting rights and fair representation across the country.** Supporters like you make it possible for us to keep up the fight. As their attacks continue — and we know they will — we are committed to mobilizing our grassroots movement in support of fair maps and fair representation across the country.
**[Today, we’re asking you to make a grassroots donation to power our critical work to protect the Voting Rights Act, stop partisan gerrymandering, and defend our democracy.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/111607856/557789937/-1219977196?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_HistVRA_email_20250716-AOTL-Tier1-HistVRA-AM_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250716-AOTL-Tier1-HistVRA-AM_&utm_campaign=HistVRA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE5YTEzMjRjLTkwNjItZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=16o_n4JV74h9f5qIiAkZTUURBWKDcHIlCc0tItHfiuQ=)**

clean_body: Your donation helps advance fair representation and fair maps | Peter, There’s no ensuring fair maps without protecting equal access to the ballot box. But one of the tools created to advance and defend the voting rights of Black and Brown communities is under attack. The Voting Rights Act of 1965 (VRA) was a landmark legislation that finally created a robust safeguard against discrimination and disenfranchisement in our elections and established strong tools to deliver on the promise of fair representation with fair district lines. For decades, the Voting Rights Act made a measurable impact in protecting the voting power of marginalized voters. But all that changed with the Supreme Court’s disastrous decision in Shelby County. The Court’s ruling gutted Section 5 of the Voting Rights Act, taking away key protections and making it easier for states to discriminate against voters of color. Since then, anti-democracy forces have used and abused the courts, bringing case after case to advance a dangerous agenda that threatens the ability of certain voters to make their voices heard — and undermines the very foundations of our democracy. As you read this, ongoing cases in Alabama, Georgia, and Louisiana are taking aim at other sections of the VRA, threatening to deprive voters of the chance to elect leaders who truly represent them. Throughout these attacks on the Voting Rights Act, All On the Line has been there every step of the way, working tirelessly to defend voting rights and fair representation across the country. Supporters like you make it possible for us to keep up the fight. As their attacks continue — and we know they will — we are committed to mobilizing our grassroots movement in support of fair maps and fair representation across the country. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = All the best, Art Arthur Mitchell Deputy Director of Litigation, All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. Text FAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. and | = | PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND. Contributions or gifts to The National Redistricting Action Fund are not tax deductible. 712 H St NE, Suite #25, Washington, DC, 20002 This email was sent to:dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: Heritage Action National ICE Survey
subject: Do you still stand with ICE?
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj205g24x2p4uy4d777ngp2yd5j3a5tp797vr10urg8z454kpxls1r2rz8o5odv9cv9mej4dlrix83angg7tj&__stmp=sziilz&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sziilz&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol01k662the2ys4awgjbczudkek06apidtqz7w8qec3ji333jmk65nuhmeyb5130gej53pb6cf9il710abvpxuox5woj17jv0ygpym2bsdtezftdollu11n9602pjrv1a0vi0alnmlje&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sziilz&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sziilz&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sziilz&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sziilz&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol01k662the2ys4awgjbczudkek06apidtqz7w8qec3ji333jmk65nuhmeyb5130gej53pb6cf9il710abvpxuox5woj17jv0ygpym2bsdtezftdollu11n9602pjrv1a0vi0alnmlje&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sziilz&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sziilz&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Tony Johnson
subject: “The old flag never touched the ground.”
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.
* * *

| | | | [](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/1d19ddd349c243bcbfd493cdd3c52545-78bcd50ab08a4f9db1e58a16351f621f/63)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

Fort Wagner, 1863. Bullets flying. Men falling.

And in the middle of it all, William Carney—an African American Union soldier and son of slaves—carries the flag.

When the color sergeant is shot down, Carney picks up the banner. He’s hit once. Then again. Then again. Then again.
---
|
[](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/1d19ddd349c243bcbfd493cdd3c52545-78bcd50ab08a4f9db1e58a16351f621f/63)
---
| | Bleeding and barely able to stand, he reaches his company and says one thing:

**“Boys, the old flag never touched the ground.”**

That’s what the American flag means.

Sacrifice. Duty. Resolve. And the belief that this country is worth fighting for.

**[Our free eBook,_Flags of Our Fathers_ , tells stories like Carney’s.](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/1d19ddd349c243bcbfd493cdd3c52545-78bcd50ab08a4f9db1e58a16351f621f/63)**

It also uncovers the forgotten history of the flag’s creation, design, and enduring power. It’s a tribute to the ideals we must not let die.

Our team at Heritage fights every day to preserve the principles our flag represents—liberty, justice, and truth.

We hope you’ll read this—and stand with us.

[**Download your free copy now.**](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/1d19ddd349c243bcbfd493cdd3c52545-78bcd50ab08a4f9db1e58a16351f621f/63)

United we stand,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation

The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---
---

DCDailyJournal.com

[Click Here to Unsubscribe Or Report as Spam](https://paramountcomm.app.optipub.com/messages/opt-outs/1d19ddd349c243bcbfd493cdd3c52545?op-notrack)

---
AZ-01 is one of the most competitive battlegrounds in the country. It's currently held by a Republican — but by just a _very slim_ margin. Democrats only need a few pickups to retake the House majority, and this is a race that could make or break that goal.

That's why EMILYs List is all in for **Marlene Galán-Woods.**

Marlene is a former broadcast journalist, a lifelong Arizonan, and a fierce advocate for reproductive freedom. She stepped up to run after the fall of _Roe v. Wade_ because she saw firsthand how out of step extremists in Congress had become — and how urgently Arizona needed real leadership.

She's building a grassroots campaign to take on entrenched GOP power, and she's doing it with the support of voters from across the political spectrum who are fed up with attacks on their freedom.

We're backing Marlene because she's exactly the kind of Democratic pro-choice woman we need to flip seats and take back the House.

clean_body: This is one of the most flippable House districts in the country: | = Peter, We just launched the Mission Majority Fund to raise $100,000 in three days — and one of the most critical races we're investing in is Arizona's 1st Congressional District. **= | = AZ-01 is one of the most competitive battlegrounds in the country. It's currently held by a Republican — but by just a very slim margin. Democrats only need a few pickups to retake the House majority, and this is a race that could make or break that goal. That's why EMILYs List is all in for Marlene Galán-Woods. Marlene is a former broadcast journalist, a lifelong Arizonan, and a fierce advocate for reproductive freedom. She stepped up to run after the fall of Roe v. Wade because she saw firsthand how out of step extremists in Congress had become — and how urgently Arizona needed real leadership. She's building a grassroots campaign to take on entrenched GOP power, and she's doing it with the support of voters from across the political spectrum who are fed up with attacks on their freedom. We're backing Marlene because she's exactly the kind of Democratic pro-choice woman we need to flip seats and take back the House. =** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks, Ben Ray (he/him/his) Interim Vice President of Federal and Gubernatorial Campaigns, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. body:
Joining our exclusive membership group has never been more important. State Democrats need funding and support to compete against Republicans, but they can’t do it without you. | | |
---
| |
---|---
Our team just updated our Official 2025 DLCC Membership report, and we didn’t see your name, so we wanted to give you an opportunity to claim your exclusive membership card before our membership drive closes on July 31st. Every day, issues like gun safety, abortion access, voting rights, and more are decided at the state level. By becoming a DLCC member, you can directly fund our work to elect leaders to your state's legislature who will fight to pass policies that strengthen our communities, lower costs, and support working families. **Help power our work to elect state Democrats nationwide by joining our growing movement with a donation of $10 or more. name: Brad Finstad
subject: They’re coming after me — again.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finstad for Congress
body:
| | | | |
---
| Dear Friend, It’s happening — again. Two liberal candidates have already jumped into the race against me, and more are likely on the way. The far-left is _laser-focused_ on flipping this seat, and with help from their wealthy backers in DC and New York, they think they can buy it. But I’ve got something they don’t — you. I’m a farmer, a dad, and a conservative who isn’t afraid to speak the truth and fight for our way of life. Whether it’s securing our border, defending girls’ sports, or fighting the effects of Bidenflation — I’ll never back down. But I can’t do it alone. [Will you chip in $15, $35, or even $50 to help me fight back and protect this seat from the radical left?](http://link.finstadforcongress.com/api/LinkHandler/getaction2?%3d)
---
| | [👉 Donate Now](http://link.finstadforcongress.com/api/LinkHandler/getaction2?%3d)
---
| Let’s remind them that southern Minnesota doesn’t cave to the liberal mob. Gratefully, Brad Finstad

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: I’m investigating Elon Musk’s claims about Trump’s ties to Epstein
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio House Democratic Campaign Committee, 545 E Town St
body:
And I need you to make sure they don’t come after me.

|
---
Trump’s own senior advisor just accused him of being involved with America’s worst child predator and using his power to cover up his ties to Jeffrey Epstein, friend. And as a member of the House Judiciary Committee, _**I’m not letting this go.**_ Trump thinks he’s untouchable. He thinks if he stacks the courts, bullies the DOJ, and surrounds himself with cronies willing to look the other way, he’ll get away with everything. Again. **But not if I have anything to say about it.** Friend, my relentless investigations into Donald Trump and his insurrection are why Kevin McCarthy and MAGA Republicans kicked me off the House Intelligence Committee two years ago. **And now that I’m digging into Elon Musk’s allegations against Trump on the House Judiciary Committee, I know the bullseye is on my back again.** [**They’ve already tried to silence me — and failed. But now, I need your help to make sure I can continue speaking truth to power in the House. Can you split a donation of $25 — or whatever you can — between me and Ohio House Dems to make sure I can hold Trump accountable for his crimes as our investigations ramp up?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111608691/557792723/-1278949388?refcode=250716_Swalwell_Claims&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjA0MTQ4OS05MjYyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bD_bihiXX2m-9Lj3Zwb9akAboGNQtYy29ld2zeizLPs=) | | [**$15 »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111608692/557792724/-1739619301?amount=15&refcode=250716_Swalwell_Claims&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjA0MTQ4OS05MjYyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bD_bihiXX2m-9Lj3Zwb9akAboGNQtYy29ld2zeizLPs= "https://secure.actblue.com/")

## PolitiBrawl Streetcast:
PolitiBrawl editor Matt Miller asked real New Yorkers if they think **[socialism will actually work in NYC](https://substack.com/redirect/8bb98bce-b2c5-40c0-8bb9-da2270d584fc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** if mayoral candidate Zohran Mamdani wins.
"Don't you think the rich people will just leave if you raise taxes on them?"
"Uh... no, they can't do that."
[Click to Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/8bb98bce-b2c5-40c0-8bb9-da2270d584fc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/8bb98bce-b2c5-40c0-8bb9-da2270d584fc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Self-described socialist Mamdani's radical proposals include government-run grocery stores with fixed prices, rent freezes and hiking taxes on corporations and the richest New Yorkers.
He made jaw-dropping headlines recently claiming that billionaires "shouldn't exist" as well as proposing **[a plan to target"whiter neighborhoods"](https://substack.com/redirect/3a2671e8-3d3f-4f89-9ca9-8c35384e187c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** with higher taxes.
Mamdani doubled down on the proposal, saying, "That is just a description of what we see right now. It's not driven by race. It's more of an assessment of what neighborhoods are being under-taxed versus over-taxed."
Though the young radical is leading in the polls over former New York Governor Andrew Cuomo, current NYC Mayor Eric Adams and Republican candidate Curtis Sliwa, **we wanted to find out if New Yorkers really supported his extreme positions and why.**
[ Click to Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/8bb98bce-b2c5-40c0-8bb9-da2270d584fc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# Hunter Biden BLASTS Democrat Party for disloyalty to his father
Hunter Biden said **[Democrat disloyalty](https://substack.com/redirect/18ea5ce2-af14-4dd4-a3f1-e52ea3239b7b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to his father cost the party the 2024 election and paved the way for Donald Trump's presidential win, during a recent interview.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/18ea5ce2-af14-4dd4-a3f1-e52ea3239b7b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Speaking on former DNC Chair Jaime Harrison 's** new podcast, young Biden criticized Democrats for abandoning then-President Joe Biden amid health concerns and internal division.
* **" We lost the last election because we did not remain loyal to the leader of the party,"** Hunter argued, calling the Biden administration "incredibly successful" despite poor approval ratings. "The Democratic Party literally melted down." He then went on to predict that the party will butt heads until the next primary, emphasizing the need for unity once there is a nominee: "we better as hell get behind that nominee."
* **Hunter defended his father 's presidency** and denied playing any role in the administration, saying he "stayed as far away as I possibly could -- which, by the way, broke my heart." He also rejected claims of a conspiracy to hide Joe Biden's mental decline, especially in the gossip town of DC: "The ability to keep a secret in Washington is zero."
* **The interview marks a rare public appearance** for Hunter Biden, who was granted an 11-year pardon by his father last year for tax fraud and illegal firearm possession.

* * *
# **Federal Judge orders release of transgender asylum seeker held in ICE men's facility**
A federal judge has ordered the release of a **[24-year-old transgender asylum seeker from Mexico](https://substack.com/redirect/1660368c-47c1-4bc3-9f03-937a8015122a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** who was held for over 40 days in an all-male ICE detention center in Tacoma, Washington.
* **The judge ruled that her due process rights** were violated when authorities failed to notify her attorneys of her whereabouts or provide legal justification for her detention.
* **The woman, identified as "O-J-M" **in court documents, was arrested outside a Portland immigration courtroom in June after her asylum case was dismissed. She had fled Mexico in 2023, alleging she was abducted and raped by cartel members because of her gender identity and sexual orientation.
* **" She was taken into custody **without warning, placed in a facility that did not reflect her gender identity, and denied access to her lawyers for weeks," said attorney Stephen Manning of Immigrant Law Group. "This should never have happened in a country that claims to protect due process."
* **Advocates say the case highlights systemic failures** in immigration detention for transgender individuals. Innovation Law Lab, which also represents O-J-M, called her solitary confinement in the men's facility "cruel" and celebrated her release as a "huge victory" for trans and immigrant rights in Oregon.

* * *
# Watchdog group blows whistle on federal program allegedly funding foreign prostitution groups
A U.S. watchdog group has alleged the federal government has funneled over $385 million in taxpayer dollars to organizations **[promoting foreign prostitution groups.](https://substack.com/redirect/300fcfa1-0d8e-4881-bdd8-c52c0ea3d143?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
* **The money has allegedly been funneled** through the PEPFAR, a global AIDS relief program founded by the Bush administration in 2003, to foreign organizations that may be promoting prostitution, despite a 2020 Supreme Court ruling requiring recipients to oppose sex work and sex trafficking.
* **The Center to Advance Security in America (CASA)** filed a formal complaint urging the State Department's Office of Inspector General to audit the program, citing $385 million already spent and another $480 million in pending obligations to questionable groups. "Our team at CASA has uncovered organizations receiving PEPFAR funds who not only do not have policies opposing [prostitution], but are actively promoting the sex work industry," CASA Director James Fitzpatrick said.
* **Among the groups flagged are Kenya 's LVCT Health, **which allegedly partners with a sex worker-led organization 'Bar Hostess'; Malawi's Youth Net and Counseling, linked to the female sex worker group "Female Sex workers Association of Malawi"; and a Jamaican coalition that openly supports sex workers and other vulnerable populations. CASA says such affiliations violate U.S. policy governing international aid.
* **" While PEPFAR was well intended **and had some success, it has become a vessel for waste and the Left's progressive social agenda," CASA wrote, further saying "Now is the perfect time for a full audit" of the decades-old program, which has received around $110 billion in U.S. funding since its creation.

Dear Fellow Investor, Elon Musk isn't preparing for peace. And with the US joining the Israel-Iran war, no one should be. Musk recently bought 10,000 advanced AI chips - and is reportedly looking to spend $1 billion more. He stays silent through Trump’s cruel immigration crackdowns, and he hands tax breaks to billionaires instead of helping the people he’s supposed to represent. On the other side? You’ve got **Randy Villegas.**
[****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111609033/557793955/1981932150?refcode=em-7.16.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTg5YjlmN2EtOTQ2Mi1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=o407Y6hL-LC7N9SERS_0YHsDkpCULEpJcfpFzZAV9oQ=)
He's a son of the Central Valley, a college professor, and a school board member who knows firsthand what working families are up against.
Randy’s running to protect Medicaid, invest in public schools, and ensure that no family in the Central Valley is left behind. _And he’s not taking a dime from corporate PACs._

clean_body: | = Hi folks, Before we ask you to =, here's a quick side-by-side of who’s failing to represent the Central Valley –and who’s looking to fight for it: = On one side, you’ve got Republican David Valadao : a career politician who claims to be a moderate but voted with MAGA extremists to slash healthcare, defund education, and rip away critical programs like SNAP and WIC from families in the Valley. He stays silent through Trump’s cruel immigration crackdowns, and he hands tax breaks to billionaires instead of helping the people he’s supposed to represent. = | | = On the other side? You’ve got Randy Villegas. = He's a son of the Central Valley, a college professor, and a school board member who knows firsthand what working families are up against. Randy’s running to protect Medicaid, invest in public schools, and ensure that no family in the Central Valley is left behind. And he’s not taking a dime from corporate PACs. 📍This is one of the most competitive races in the country and it's our chance to show we’ve got what it takes to flip this seat. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Villegas HQ | With deep ties to our community and a lifelong commitment to justice and equity, Randy is running for Congress in California’s 22nd District to bring bold, compassionate leadership to Washington. clean_body: You can’t miss this important campaign update | | If you’d like to unsubscribe, . | | Peter, This is Jonathan Jackson’s Finance Team. We’re reaching out today because we just missed our critical mid-month fundraising goal of $25,000. This campaign is powered by people like you. Because when we organize, raise grassroots dollars, and speak truth to power, we can beat Trump’s agenda, confront MAGA extremism, and build a government that puts people, not special interests, first. It’s up to us to make sure Jonathan has what he needs to challenge Trump, confront MAGA extremism, and build a government that puts people, not special interests, first. | | ---|--- | | Our $25,000 goal isn’t just a deadline — it’s a turning point. It’s a critical part of our fight to: → Stop MAGA Republicans from attacking the rights of Americans across the country. → Push back against Trump’s efforts to slash essential programs for working families, seniors, and veterans. → Build a democracy that truly serves the people. Falling short doesn’t just slow us down, it gives Trump and MAGA Republicans another chance to advance their dangerous agenda. That’s why your grassroots support right now is so important. Jonathan Jackson is committed to standing up for what’s right, and with your help, we won’t back down. | ---|--- | | Thank you, Finance Team Jonathan Jackson * | Paid for by Jackson for Congress Jonathan Jackson for Congress 1030 15th St NW, #404 Washington, DC 20005 United States If you need to unsubscribe, you can | | Sent via . name: VoteVets
subject: Our story
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Back in 2006 we didn’t know if we’d last a year, and now VoteVets is one of the top spending organizations in politics
#
Peter, back in 2006, we never would’ve guessed VoteVets would be in this position.
We were just a few scrappy Vets pissed off about getting lied into a war by our so-called leaders, about getting betrayed by those leaders, and coming home to see those leaders carrying on and cashing in on the war while our friends were still overseas getting blown up.
So, we organized. We brought more Vets together. We started raising money, we started running ads. We started winning races. We grew. Year over year, we grew and we grew until now.
2024 was a tough year for Democrats, but not for VoteVets. Our candidates won the toughest races in the country, like Elissa Slotkin in Michigan or Ruben Gallego in Arizona. Even the nominee for Vice President was a longtime VoteVets member. We won races up and down the ballot from coast to coast.
Back in 2006 we didn’t know if we’d last a year, and now this. VoteVets is one of the top spending organizations in politics, one of the heaviest hitters, one of the deepest benches, with probably the best record of any group out there. The largest group of Veterans on this side of the aisle. Period.
We got here because we picked our ground and fought like hell for it. We went straight for Republicans wrapping themselves in the flag, taking patriotism for their own, and voting to defund the GI Bill or the VA and we kicked their asses out of office. No mercy.
And, really, we got here because we have the best team. That means you, Peter. We’ve always had supporters willing to put skin in the game, take ownership, do the work, and send us the ammo to put withering fire down range. It’s humbling, and we’re extremely grateful.
Today, we’re in the toughest fight of our organization’s history. Trump’s trying to kill the VA, Medicaid, the Department of Education, food assistance, mortgage assistance. All the things Veterans and their families depend on to get by. We’ve taken some big hits these last seven months, but we’re not out of the fight.
At times like these we really need our strongest supporters to stand with us and give us the tools we need to hit back.
[**So, we’re asking if you can help. Please, chip in $5, $10, whatever you can to support our mission and keep us on track to take back the House and the Senate and put a lid on the chaos coming out of the White House. It adds up.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-july25.sScHXv&refcode=em250716-1-120&t=1&akid=34481%2E3013755%2Eiqla1f)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

name: AOC
subject: This is personal to me.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Did you know that over half of all Members of Congress are millionaires? Meanwhile, the median household income is only $70,784. 👈🏽 **This is wild.**
Many of our lawmakers have no lived experience of working paycheck to paycheck or trying to pay rent working a low-wage job.
To me, policy is personal. When I worked as a bartender, I relied on tips to pay the bills. I know the urgent and daily stresses of working class people because I have lived them. And I intimately understand how important measures like raising the minimum wage, universal health care, universal child care, and free college can be for families living in financial uncertainty.
That’s why I’m in Congress: **to represent working families like mine.**
I am honored to be here, and I can’t do this work without you — the grassroots supporters who have had my back every step of the way. I can’t self-fund my campaign by writing a big check, and I don’t do any donor call-time or exclusive fundraising events.
[We rely completely on small-dollar donors, so if you are able, can you chip in $5 today to our campaign for progress?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250716.dg18Bl&refcode=em20250716-9329-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9329%2E2526796%2EDPgeB7)
****
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250716.dg18Bl&refcode=em20250716-9329-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=9329%2E2526796%2EDPgeB7)**
Yours in service,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250716?refcode=em20250716-9329-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=21&refcode2=9329_2526796_DPgeB7&akid=9329%2E2526796%2EDPgeB7)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250716-9329-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=22&akid=9329%2E2526796%2EDPgeB7)**

name: President Trump
subject: I’ve been winning all week!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump National Committee JFC, Inc

New Democratic leaders like Gabe are determined to shake up the status quo.

Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. Politicians often claim that they put the people they serve over party loyalty. But to put it lightly, they're not walking the talk. Gabe is the real deal, and he's proving that he's willing to stand up to his party to serve the people of his district, not his political career. He’s a founding member of Majority Democrats, a group of elected officials working to rebuild the party from the inside. [But listen, none of that matters if we don't keep our momentum strong. With your support, Gabe flipped NM-02 from red to blue in one of the closest House races in the country.
And thanks to you, he made history by becoming the first Democrat to hold NM-02 blue for two consecutive terms in over 40 years.
But the cycle ahead is going to be the toughest yet. The election may seem far away now, but let me be clear: There are **_no off-years_** in a race this important.
[In a time when people are fed up with the status quo, we need disrupters like Gabe who will stand up to the establishment and put the needs of this district first. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = I don't blame you if you're feeling discouraged by all the chaos happening — I get it. But I want to offer you something that gives me hope. Young Democratic leaders like Gabe Vasquez are rising up against the establishment and taking matters into their own hands. I've been around the block, and I can tell you firsthand from working with Gabe — he's not your average Democrat. Politicians often claim that they put the people they serve over party loyalty. But to put it lightly, they're not walking the talk. Gabe is the real deal, and he's proving that he's willing to stand up to his party to serve the people of his district, not his political career. He’s a founding member of Majority Democrats, a group of elected officials working to rebuild the party from the inside. = | | = With your support, Gabe flipped NM-02 from red to blue in one of the closest House races in the country. And thanks to you, he made history by becoming the first Democrat to hold NM-02 blue for two consecutive terms in over 40 years. But the cycle ahead is going to be the toughest yet. name: Brent Hennrich
subject: No one who protected Epstein should hold power
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brent Hennrich for Washington
body:
| | [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMU_BeZcmRBr16dPjlrMKhhjiC51ataw3Peft1wIO87ITn1Nc_pIXVc173G0e5jAPOHKUhmcRA4Wvh5u3Td4d5iydRM7e-BSsEVPXn9gf3TvCQzHD-2QNVKAbodxUbqYUYfnj_w3iKQuy-HgN5iXTRe4LorZ7hJAAZ-WS4kSUto3heHTt2oD8fJXML5JXqkUHuZN_jCOrUw99M6Fj381BmdHToIF_MDuZPJNd56w_E1RZpb6iB_HiVy-NkNeeFc4i2g/4i8/H_Fd7yYxQvaIhgqthFw3PQ/h0/h001.Lj52fX5zA9IOwb7YVKCpzTj-qOe5FaIDLQDxZ3aeDX8)
---
Peter,

Jeffrey Epstein was the most prolific abuser of women and girls in modern history. And yet, for years, he operated in full view - and with the full support - of the powerful. He was protected by wealth, enabled by silence, and surrounded by people who knew what he was doing and looked away. **Those people should not be allowed to hide behind sealed documents. ** They should not be sitting in boardrooms, running companies, or holding office. Not one of them. The files must be released. Every name. Every enabler. It really is that simple. If I were in Congress right now, I would be using every ounce of my platform to demand full transparency and real accountability. I would be championing Rep. Ro Khanna's bill to ensure that every sealed record is released and every name is made public **As an elected leader, it would be my moral obligation to do so, and as the father of daughters, I could not live with myself if I stayed quiet.** This whole sick saga is bigger than one man. The entire MAGA movement has built its power on the control, subjugation, and exploitation of women. It elevated a man found legally liable for sexual abuse to the highest office in the land - twice. It cheers for politicians who strip away reproductive rights, silence survivors, and call it freedom. And it props up leaders who joke about assault and pass laws that punish women for speaking out. **We need leaders who will not stay silent or capitulate to the toxic MAGA political brand. ** We must fight for truth, dignity, and justice, no matter who it implicates. We owe it to the survivors to release the files. We owe it to every person who has ever been silenced or shamed or told to stay quiet. [**If you are with me, if you believe the truth matters and the powerful should not be shielded from consequences, then chip in and help us build this campaign.**](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUBGBo-sz6xii4px7dPk48c5BSE0bUCW-IQj1MPKVRP8kxuw17tSNm06l36oEJVUmSG1m7yF44Hh8CTmM-bIu0VxhIjmh8qH2pvquzRLbQLNPedDmVegLrzTFFJZMSNCRy_r9_DeUPm68jNMCpdU-f75ubpjh4_J3QBgaFebVcPLkRoYgWX32bxemlaR_SuLc_GAtG40IhN2nlszCJDB4y78RINU7pdnLyLQ-2jDrPV4o7RlElvwW-B9AmE6VrBc8sCtKKuLEy3HHz8Du12Tw1EWNnk-zPTxZcEUp7ZYIuBaGA/4i8/H_Fd7yYxQvaIhgqthFw3PQ/h1/h001.DyIhysvuYoVH8yOlb17eAwtKuyeUoSZT0LYxAhzCjWk) Because justice should not depend on how rich you are or who you know. Let's Heal Washington!

clean_body: | | Peter, Jeffrey Epstein was the most prolific abuser of women and girls in modern history. And yet, for years, he operated in full view - and with the full support - of the powerful. He was protected by wealth, enabled by silence, and surrounded by people who knew what he was doing and looked away. Those people should not be allowed to hide behind sealed documents. They should not be sitting in boardrooms, running companies, or holding office. Not one of them. The files must be released. Every name. Every enabler. It really is that simple. If I were in Congress right now, I would be using every ounce of my platform to demand full transparency and real accountability. I would be championing Rep. Ro Khanna's bill to ensure that every sealed record is released and every name is made public As an elected leader, it would be my moral obligation to do so, and as the father of daughters, I could not live with myself if I stayed quiet. This whole sick saga is bigger than one man. The entire MAGA movement has built its power on the control, subjugation, and exploitation of women. It elevated a man found legally liable for sexual abuse to the highest office in the land - twice. It cheers for politicians who strip away reproductive rights, silence survivors, and call it freedom. And it props up leaders who joke about assault and pass laws that punish women for speaking out. We need leaders who will not stay silent or capitulate to the toxic MAGA political brand. We must fight for truth, dignity, and justice, no matter who it implicates. We owe it to the survivors to release the files. We owe it to every person who has ever been silenced or shamed or told to stay quiet. Because justice should not depend on how rich you are or who you know. Let's Heal Washington! Brent | | Marie Gluesenkamp-Perez has betrayed Democrats and the voters of WA-3 by repeatedly voting with MAGA against women's rights, immigrants, and more. With gerrymandering and voter suppression decimating our democracy, let's talk meaningful solutions: Mobile phones. No really, we use our smart phones to check our financial data, our health data, and even file our taxes -- so why note vote by phone? Today I invited philanthropist and tech leader executive Bradley Tusk to unpack why mobile voting is one of our bests shot at saving American democracy.
**Let 's Address This.**
**Let's Address This with Qasim Rashid is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..dqUZlqkRNTYagaEfVyeLf1gvW92-EjBJZcw6JQcWuqA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=168485157)
Imagine the power of voting by phone for people with mobility issues, service members serving around the world, or the college student away from home during election season? Well, not only is it possible, but we can make it happen within the next decade if we start working towards that goal today. Bradley and I explore how his background in politics and tech led him to champion this bold reform, how mobile voting could transform civic participation, and why increasing turnout can reduce extremism.
[Sign Up at Mobile Voting](https://substack.com/redirect/14ec29b7-2322-4e4e-af5f-2265ab6c61a0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Bradley also addresses concerns about security, shares lessons from 20 pilot programs, and lays out what's next for bringing this technology to cities across the country. Finally, we discuss how younger generations can get involved--and what else needs fixing once we secure the vote. You can join the campaign to fix our broken politics by signing up with Mobile Voting. To do so, simply click on the button below.
[Sign Up at Mobile Voting](https://substack.com/redirect/14ec29b7-2322-4e4e-af5f-2265ab6c61a0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: KMR HQ
subject: This is urgent, folks.
body:
|
#
This is urgent, folks. **The first Republican candidate just announced their campaign to challenge Kristen here in MI-08.** The GOP has already spent $800,000 attacking Kristen for voting against Trump’s Big Ugly Bill – a bill that slashes over a trillion dollars from Medicaid and SNAP and raises costs by thousands of dollars for average families. So it’s no surprise that their newly announced candidate supports it – wholeheartedly. **[Tonight’s mid-month deadline has just taken on a new urgency. name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: They tried to silence her — she showed up anyway
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250716-1431-foote&t=1001&akid=1431%2E342411%2E1tOKwT ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

This past weekend, Rep. Ilhan Omar held a powerful town hall in Nashville
— a city where many said she shouldn’t come. Where hateful tweets and ugly
rhetoric flooded social media in the lead-up to her visit.

They tried to intimidate her. They tried to silence her. They failed.

In a moment when it would’ve been easier to stay quiet or stay home, Ilhan
Omar showed up. She met with Republican Rep. Andy Ogles' constituents,
listened to their concerns, and spoke truth to power — exactly what the
Squad was elected to do — because Andy has been hiding from his
constituents.

This is what resistance looks like: not just in Congress, but in town
halls, on the streets, and in communities across the country. Especially
communities that are being ignored by members of Congress who prioritize
their loyalty to Trump and billionaires over their own constituents. The
Squad is building a movement rooted in grassroots power — no matter how
loud the hate gets.

But here’s the truth: showing up takes resources. And the right-wing
machine is already ramping up to challenge these progressive champions at
every turn. That’s why we’re asking:

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250716-movement.WYaEGP&refcode=em20250716-1431&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1431%2E342411%2E1tOKwT ]Will you rush a donation to Squad Victory Fund to help the Squad
continue showing up, fighting back, and building people power?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250716-movement.WYaEGP&refcode=em20250716-1431&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1431%2E342411%2E1tOKwT ]Contribute ››

This movement isn’t just about resisting hate — it’s about creating
something better in its place: justice, opportunity, and democracy for all
of us.

Thank you for standing with us,

Squad Victory Fund

P.S. Rep. Omar’s courage in Nashville reminded us what real leadership
looks like. If you’re proud to be part of this movement, show it by
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250716-movement.WYaEGP&refcode=em20250716-1431&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1431%2E342411%2E1tOKwT ]chipping in to the Squad Victory Fund today.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1431%2E342411%2E1tOKwT

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

Democrats need just FOUR seats to win the Senate back and stop Trump's extreme agenda -- and if we can turn GOP-held open seats blue, it would boost our chances by LEAPS AND BOUNDS! We've battled tough odds before and come out on top, so we can do it again -- but only with your help. We NEED to show Republicans this grassroots team can go toe-to-toe with their billionaire megadonors, so the DSCC has set an urgent $50,000 fundraising goal to take back the Senate. We only have a few hours before our critical deadline, so please: We need your help to fight for the Senate. body:
The Supreme Court just struck another blow to women’s reproductive freedom in their latest ruling

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111610568/557798778/1435897075?refcode=email_071625_scotus&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWIzN2Q1ZS05OTYyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nf9aRkKfCOq_GgFiiY8FeKyaG6R3CEeEfduplCoNtvs=&emci=09105597-e95c-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&emdi=d9b37d5e-9962-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=7280715) Folks, the Supreme Court just struck another blow to women’s reproductive freedom. _Take a look:_ **_AP: U.S. Supreme Court allows states to block Medicaid funding from Planned Parenthood clinics_** Years after overturning _Roe v. Wade_ and ripping up nearly 50 years of precedent to attack women's reproductive freedom, **the U.S. Supreme Court just ruled that states can BAN Medicaid recipients from receiving care at Planned Parenthood clinics,****potentially leaving _millions_ of women in Republican-controlled states without access to critical health care services.** With this 6-3 ruling, SCOTUS just gave the green light to anti-choice lawmakers to further squeeze Planned Parenthood clinics, _pressuring them to shut down due to lack of funding._ **And this latest attack on reproductive freedom comes just as Republicans in Congress passed the steepest cuts to Medicaid in the nation's history.** National Republicans are sending a clear message with this move: They will stop at absolutely nothing in their quest to destroy reproductive freedom nationwide, _no matter how much pain it causes._ Colorado voters rejected this nonsense in the last election when we enshrined this freedom into our state’s Constitution – but John knows we need to defend and restore reproductive freedom nationwide. **Every woman in this country deserves the freedom to make her own health care decisions — without meddling politicians butting into the equation.[If you agree, please, sign our petition to condemn this ruling and DEFEND Planned Parenthood. →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111610569/557798779/-1416209711?refcode=email_071625_scotus&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWIzN2Q1ZS05OTYyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nf9aRkKfCOq_GgFiiY8FeKyaG6R3CEeEfduplCoNtvs=&emci=09105597-e95c-f011-8f7c-6045bda9d96b&emdi=d9b37d5e-9962-f011-8dc9-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=7280715)** name: Mitch Kates
subject: The future of voting in PA is on the line
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party
body:
| |
---
Peter,

Listen: three Pennsylvania Supreme Court justices are up for retention elections this November, and the outcome will shape our future.

_Why’s this important?_ **Because the PA State Supreme Court decides the cases that determine how — and whether — Pennsylvanians can vote.**

Trump’s MAGA cult hasn’t stopped attacking citizens’ right to vote across the country. If we lose these retention elections, they’ll have a path to do it here.

**We cannot afford to give extremists control of the bench.**

**We cannot let our firewall crumble.**

**_[Your support today can help us win these three critical retention elections. Will you chip in now to protect the Court that protects our democracy?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111610661/557799157/-1020196347?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_PADM_20250716_FR_MMFR_0_1MO_MitchKates_NA_NA_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjNmM2FlNi05YTYyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y458seMTivSoWTOqQ5TPyEqk1R-1vZGoaepA2B4b9RI=)_** | | [PROTECT OUR SUPREME COURT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111610666/557799161/-1020196347?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_PADM_20250716_FR_MMFR_0_1MO_MitchKates_NA_NA_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjNmM2FlNi05YTYyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y458seMTivSoWTOqQ5TPyEqk1R-1vZGoaepA2B4b9RI=)
---
This Court ruled that provisional ballots must be counted — a step to defend our very right to vote — and we know MAGA won’t stop challenging them.

They’ve stood up to MAGA’s legal assaults before, **and they’ll have to do it again.**

**_[We have just months to make the case to voters—and we need your help to power this fight. Donate now to protect the integrity of our elections and defend the rights we all depend on. Join us with a donation here: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/padems-fr-2507](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111610670/557799166/-1020196347?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_PADM_20250716_FR_MMFR_0_1MO_MitchKates_NA_NA_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjNmM2FlNi05YTYyLWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y458seMTivSoWTOqQ5TPyEqk1R-1vZGoaepA2B4b9RI=)_**

LFG!

clean_body: | | Peter, Listen: three Pennsylvania Supreme Court justices are up for retention elections this November, and the outcome will shape our future. Why’s this important? Because the PA State Supreme Court decides the cases that determine how — and whether — Pennsylvanians can vote. Trump’s MAGA cult hasn’t stopped attacking citizens’ right to vote across the country. If we lose these retention elections, they’ll have a path to do it here. We cannot afford to give extremists control of the bench. We cannot let our firewall crumble. = | | = This Court ruled that provisional ballots must be counted — a step to defend our very right to vote — and we know MAGA won’t stop challenging them. name: Ruben Gallego
subject: I am not going to let this go
body:
I introduced a resolution in the Senate demanding the Justice Department release all the Epstein files. Similar efforts are moving through the House.
#

Republicans and Democrats around the country agree on one thing right now: Trump needs to release the Epstein files.
But Pam Bondi and Kash Patel along with everybody else at the White House are absolutely desperate to prevent that from happening. It’s clear to anyone watching that they’re doing it to protect Trump.
Time to show them we mean business. I introduced a resolution in the Senate demanding the Justice Department release all the Epstein files. Similar efforts are moving through the House. We can’t force their hand, but we can put the full weight of Congress behind this. That continues to put more pressure on Trump and the Department of Justice, which is exactly what we need if we want to get this done.
I know I already emailed about this earlier in the week, but it’s important to me. We owe it to the victims, and there needs to be accountability for what they went through.
So, please: [**Help me dial up the pressure on Trump by signing our petition demanding the DoJ to release the Epstein files. We have to make noise. It's the only way to get results.** [RELEASE THE LIST](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/rg_em_sign_epstein_july25/?source=em250716-1-160&akid=3919%2E734936%2EEz0aaK) Thank you for this. Ruben

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Burlison for Congress
body:
The Deep State’s house of cards is coming down.

[](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/SSj-UMPX5LzSWZur_MFTyIIEMqDw3TjaqN5fsxF21Vr39IGoW9xD7BJgPOmTB-yM_CsNdlZ6Ljczx5V7diL-UkGEM8a74GeH7uTNcufw_5-JeYnmG8JDZYlb0dj06wxSWfzXTxfuJgE3aE7oklRZ-eVYV90Vw5pAoq7q5CkaPvDn9M9frb58EUOtjyEYhpS_y5-tW1lpFavbSbPGQTnTzo3VU__50_vSII86buFB_KOWafJcf0N-XSX3UC2fXF4GHH1NVa5queM-FPZrQHT7FIWPe2qYccxu3RP6nriV5AtXCecUTbDitvKtT4gDi3ZdKhsGZxUquH69Hed-DPxDuybiq-EXBVYpe5fxn92UaYBrkLwAu37S1R45Fm8QtKKVXweAB1usMOL36ZBkAzg_oZfY5CVOGQpu-IxBNL2Jwd5D7IMR2Lg8_J_q9A0D8jTiRlS88iVXD5FEZTUQmzSQqS7oo4SKnrZNKw4FTawYU6GFIgauRiS2cHYaIodRhzQApkvyB9-VmhkgtkpE2WJJntmiJR6hVtcvFRsRen46tF_8-F-KxHkAMLK73trMQ4OQfRepdBSzwFe84euKu0jPRHD65zBiTTd7fWHEnqT6ZiTE3SlOAs9v4w8pYxc-k2Gwc7YUTodpbPmilH6sA4RGwn20rG1-G4ATX8EzEnqxh7_0gAo5fxfmhyYSagDDRZopuv8f2JR9c0BNcEbp3UOklZIXp76LtMW_iQ5LTuDeyszM6MD51VHvRjcVWF6R3uQBwA/9DlAbUpIIddvNsLS3IlJRKjJjCoVrneN/10)

**Peter** ,

Eric Burlison here, member of the House Oversight Committee, DOGE Subcommittee, and proud member of the House Freedom Caucus.

**I need you to hear me loud and clear:**
** The Deep State's lies are finally catching up to them.

**
For **YEARS** , they laughed at us. Mocked us.

They called President Trump and YOU _**" conspiracy theorists"**_ for daring to tell the truth about Russiagate.

But now?

🚨 **FBI Director Kash Patel just unlocked the Russiagate vault.**

He's leaving **NO STONE UNTURNED.**
And the truth is even more explosive than we imagined.
➡️ Federal crimes.
➡️ Foreign collusion.
➡️ And a coordinated plot to destroy President Trump from the inside out.

They tried to jail Trump. Impeach him. Silence him.

But now? **It 's THEIR turn.

**
I'm on the House Oversight Committee to [**make sure this NEVER gets buried again.**](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/NmDqmKE7uKFU07rIJfwsWkirsiQ2QWMJqc5rULa9C-5DZ__NxptobpAWrPG6r-o_q_Q7LbymM9VEUBClyxiR_gIqH_yrkWBUtx_lGQfI0X12ladfxzeLGc3fsNKslpTsltWJZPgdS8J-4TEiH9nzFJJ-W8cy3h6ZQLCbEmDbSc1PqYZ5E0dJTKj95E15GDANgUcytQP3a2pUd4j4DQQIIDK9uW_M1eRVapiq5dnnxqx2eO9ZWETnWQagGZTW9dQaF7q3NifeBCYjroKfxcPz4hwCKmIEjsZSr8gjkjbxczW4cMR4gK5HGGuA-_30y_gqGPTyGnIOAmbupslCHZXpTaPpXBOjIwU7ZJoAdK4AgKd7ylwFMRq5QdHIrqeSwslAuU_QkEULgAgcgA8DMxYe4_UEZB9jzluxPKj8mBiwnEfZx4kRVQ7_sJ1WwojZ4Wfvf_9tRI1jt9dCKRBqnGq2NqqSpRZ6V6XH915TuwgeoXAV1rGNaBEyQgd218EPMfjG5AeU6gRjipoYerREt3l8r3OW-tjGYK9RQJqNzf8HcqohJJTDpZ6RLd6MKuXwE0rQ_6PkdcjTBriww7eDsk8Tl1Zvh8SHP0VSnMKprv6CBWacEEE_o8FneVEbuvHK_Q4ZIS1Dt0trRWkFWMvRTX9M0CyyXSNMOsQ1Jp7hAS8BuaReEJEomWyjBxfUtk89Kul4Emm2r6eZW_1E8LnpCfb4z5cEWGu4tCs7i46KG8qDgtJb8l3uatMyosjZHSd__CSa3w/9ILPq8TobewpObgvCzUUS7XwvvOOMFCy/10)

We're talking subpoenas. Depositions.

**The Clintons. Comey. Obama 's intel goons.

**
If they conspired to take down Trump and deceive the American people, **they MUST be held accountable.

**
But our GOP majority is razor-thin.

And if we lose even a single seat, the Swamp wins.

**The Clintons walk. And Trump gets buried all over again.

**

name: Heartland Patriots HQ
subject: Ending Big Pharma’s deadly grip on Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
We need leaders who understand the impact of rising costs on working families like yours.
#
Peter,
Prescription drug prices keep going up.
Insurance companies keep finding ways to deny important coverage.
Big Pharma keeps posting record profits.
All while working people are forced to ration their medicine or go without.
It’s not a coincidence. **It’s a system built by massive corporations to protect profits at the expense of everyday people — _and too many politicians in Washington keep letting them get away with it._**
These pharmaceutical companies spend hundreds of millions of dollars lobbying Congress every year. They know that power-hungry politicians will predictably choose donors like them over the people they were elected to represent.
**We’re building a movement to end that cycle.** We’re working to elect leaders across the Heartland who will boldly stand up to Big Pharma’s outsized influence on our politics — everyday Americans who understand the impact of rising healthcare costs on working families like yours. And today, we’re asking for your help to do it:
**[Please add a donation of $10 or whatever you can today to help us elect candidates who are committed to ending Big Pharma’s deadly grip on Congress.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/92121?refcode=em20250716-9128&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9128%2E614464%2ETC8XIQ)**

clean_body: | | | | | | | | Dear Friend,Seniors are under attack... Polling and disturbing trends show that seniors—once the backbone of the conservative movement —are now the target of an all-out propaganda war!And I’m worried that it’s working... So today, I’m performing an EMERGENCY ROLL CALL OF MATURE AMERICANS. ... Time is of the essence because recently we’ve seen disturbing reports. According to RealClearPolitics, President Trump is underwater with seniors aged 70+ —the only age group where his approval is negative.And the anecdotal evidence is even stranger—maybe you’ve noticed that the radical protestors showing up to anti-Trump rallies are often 50+, or that older Americans on social media are suddenly turning on Trump! Maybe you even know friends, family, or neighbors who have suddenly fallen into the left’s trap. But with such a radical shift happening before our eyes, we have to ask... what on earth is going on?Is it the Liberal Media? We know that 66% of seniors still rely on TV for their news , and the media has become an echo chamber for anti-American lies. CNN, MSNBC, CBS, ABC, NPR, PBS...The list goes on and on; and their radicalism and propaganda has only increased since Trump took back the White House.Could it be the AARP? They have a direct line to millions of older Americans—and they aren’t shy about their support for ObamaCare, Medicare for All, the “Inflation Reduction Act” under Joe Biden, LGBTQ ideology, and more, even as they play the role of a moderate, “middle of the road group.” Or maybe it’s even George Soros and his web of influence? You and I know that George Soros has a massive web of NGOs, PACs, and investments designed to influence lawmakers and spread Marxist propaganda and chaos.And according to public tax filings, the left-leaning AARP Foundation accepted over 10 MILLION DOLLARS —in just three years—from the George Soros-funded Tides Foundation. The AARP once even honored George Soros on the cover of their magazine , calling him one of “America’s Greatest Innovators ” who’s “changing the world, $100 million at a time. ” My friend, maybe it’s the combination of the three...the Liberal media, the AARP, and George Soros who are targeting seniors; your friends your family, and YOU. And it’s why I’m asking you to stand with AMAC Action. Friend, my name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative patriots 50 years of age and over. We have 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices. Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.And we have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues. Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. In fact, our efforts have been so effective that President Trump himself has put out the call for mature Americans to join conservative AMAC to stop the radical leftists who want ruin our country!And today, we are focusing our efforts on fighting back on the left’s increasing grip on America’s seniors. My friend it’s simple—AMAC Action is THE antidote to forces targeting YOUR generation. Because if we don’t act now, we’ll wake up in a country where American seniors are the backbone of the Marxist movemen t...Where the liberal media has a stranglehold on your friends and family ... And where liberal elites and groups ensure this generation will be remembered for radicalism instead of patriotism ...I know I don’t want to ever see that America...and I think you don’t either.AMAC Action is the most effective voice in the nation, advocating for conservative values and changing the hearts and minds of mature Americans. But all that we do, we do with the support of patriots like you. We don’t receive of dime from the federal government. We’re funded by grass roots patriots just like you. So when you answer YES to your EMERGENCY ROLL CALL OF MATURE AMERICANS ... When you support AMAC Action, you’re not just declaring your opposition to the left’s propaganda—you’re fighting back! Your donation of $35, $50, $75, $100, $250 or even $500 or $1,000 ensures that we have the resources to: Advocate for conservative values and policies Spread the truth to seniors everywhere and counter propaganda Ensure that our generation, yours and mine, is remembered for patriotism, NOT for radicalism. And so much more. My friend, together, we can save this generation and secure America’s future. But it starts with your YES today. Please give your critical answer to your EMERGENCY ROLL CALL OF MATURE AMERICANS below. Thank you for standing strong.Let’s show them that patriotic seniors aren’t fooled—and we aren’t going anywhere. | | For Freedom, Rebecca Weber,Chairwoman**AMAC Action | | | P.S. The most radical left-wing forces in the nation are counting on you to sit this one out. | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values. | |

name: Mantra Dave
subject: The GOP’s “dream candidate” might be back
body:
We’re on the edge of our seats.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111611006/557800024/-1860252395?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2ZlM2E1MWItOWQ2Mi1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zJQZs5q_6s3GeVgKlwQij8tPZ0tdi3wmhVVRuSubNNA=) | Hey Peter, We’ve been hearing rumblings that Republicans are about to announce who’s running against Josh. We expect the news could break any day now. **We don’t know exactly who it will be, but there’s a real possibility our previous opponent, Kevin Lincoln — the GOP’s “dream candidate” — will launch another campaign to flip this seat red.** [_**We need to be prepared for any scenario. Will you rush in a donation right now to make sure we have the resources to defend this seat and keep it blue?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111611007/557800025/-1149165536?&refcode=E14193-20250716-Opponent-SL-CampaignNews&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2ZlM2E1MWItOWQ2Mi1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zJQZs5q_6s3GeVgKlwQij8tPZ0tdi3wmhVVRuSubNNA=) [DONATE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/111611008/557800026/-1149165536?&refcode=E14193-20250716-Opponent-SB-CampaignNews&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2ZlM2E1MWItOWQ2Mi1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zJQZs5q_6s3GeVgKlwQij8tPZ0tdi3wmhVVRuSubNNA=) Peter, this is a serious moment. Kevin Lincoln came within just a few thousand votes of flipping this district. Our race was so close, it was one of the last in the country to be called. **If he jumps in again we will be in for another nail-biter.** No matter who Republicans choose to put up against Josh, we need to be ready for an expensive and competitive race from day one. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Add your name to signal your support for my Presidential Library Anti-Corruption Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
I’m introducing legislation that would ban companies and governments from donating to the presidential libraries of sitting presidents.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2596%2E4032634%2EXkTOMI)
---
Donald Trump’s latest scheme reeks of corruption. He has accepted over $60 million in donations from companies like Paramount, Disney, Meta, and X — and a $400,000,000 luxury jet from Qatar — for his presidential library. And all of this is perfectly legal. **Concerned citizens, ethics experts, and lawmakers in Congress are rightfully asking: is this bribery in plain sight? That’s why today I’m introducing legislation that would ban companies and governments from donating to the presidential libraries of sitting presidents.** [**If you agree that companies and foreign governments should not be able to make contributions to a president’s future library during their term — potentially seeking favorable treatment — add your name to be a grassroots co-sponsor of my legislation.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-librarycorruption/?source=EMZ26S_GOP_E_20250716_V1S1&t=8&akid=2596%2E4032634%2EXkTOMI) | [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-librarycorruption/?source=EMZ26S_GOP_E_20250716_V1S1&t=9&akid=2596%2E4032634%2EXkTOMI)
---
U.S. presidents have been setting up libraries for themselves since the 1930s to honor their legacies once they’re out of office and to let the public learn about what they did. But unlike donations to presidential campaigns or inaugural committees, **there are virtually no restrictions on donations to presidential libraries.**
That means while he’s in office, Trump — or any president — can solicit unlimited, undisclosed donations from anyone. Foreign nationals, lobbyists, people seeking presidential pardons, and corporations with business before the federal government.
Past presidents have appeared to have abused this power. But Trump has pushed the boundaries of these gifts by accepting tens of millions of dollars in donations.
A new investigation from my office found donations from these companies and entities — who might be seeking special favors with Trump:
* **Disney/ABC News donated $15 million.** In December 2024, ABC News settled a defamation lawsuit with Donald Trump by agreeing to pay $15 million toward his presidential library.
* **Meta/Facebook donated $22 million.** Following the January 6, 2021 Capitol riot, Meta shut down President Trump’s Facebook and Instagram accounts for nearly two years. Since Trump’s reelection, Meta has cozied up to his administration — and earlier this year settled a lawsuit brought by President Trump for $25 million, with $22 million going toward a fund for his presidential library.
* **Paramount donated $16 million.** Last year, President Trump sued Paramount over the editing of an interview on CBS’s 60 Minutes, a suit that experts called “baseless.” Just weeks ago, Paramount settled for $16 million, with the money funneling straight into Trump’s future library. It just so happens that Paramount is currently vying for the administration to approve its proposed multi-million dollar merger with Skydance.
* **The government of Qatar donated a $400 million jet.** After using it as Air Force One and retrofitting it at taxpayers’ expense, Trump reportedly plans to transfer the jet to his presidential library foundation.

[**The list can go on. If you believe that the government should work for the people, not whichever giant company or foreign government can dump the most money into the president's future library, please add your name today to signal you support this legislation.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-librarycorruption/?source=EMZ26S_GOP_E_20250716_V1S1&t=10&akid=2596%2E4032634%2EXkTOMI)
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

---

---

---

name: Dan Freeman (via Democrats.org)
subject: How I will fight for you:
body:
---
Hi Derek, It’s Dan Freeman, the new Litigation Director at the DNC, following up. I’m a former Department of Justice attorney, and I’m joining the DNC to help protect your right to vote. Here’s how I will fight for you: I spent almost 15 years at DOJ as a voting rights lawyer. I served as lead attorney for the United States in last-minute voter purge litigation, constitutional challenges to the Voting Rights Act and National Voter Registration Act, statewide redistricting cases, challenges to voter ID laws, and other matters of national importance. I was a civil servant, and I took pride in enforcing the Voting Rights Act on behalf of the American people because I believe the right to vote — and to have that vote counted — is the threshold of American democracy and preserves all other rights. But everything changed when President Trump returned to the White House. They forced out brilliant lawyers. Directed us to drop crucial cases. I soon knew that my opportunity to protect democracy within DOJ was over. So I made the difficult decision to leave DOJ and come to the DNC. Because at the DNC, we believe that voters pick their elected officials, not the other way around. We’re going to court to enforce voting rights laws when states violate them, and we’ll intervene and defend your right to vote when the Republican Party tries to make it harder for you to cast a ballot that will be counted. **That’s why I’m asking you to make a donation to help fund the DNC’s legal work today.** By donating $3 today, you’ll help us make strategic investments in legal work that will have a lasting impact for years to come. You’ll also help us send a message to President Trump and the Republican Party that any attempt to take away your right to vote won’t go unanswered. [Chip in today to help fund the DNC’s legal work and fight for every vote to be counted. Too much is at stake to lose this battle →](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?refcode=em_20250716_3976_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3976_22930333_jsLnHg&akid=3976%2E22930333%2EjsLnHg) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-july-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250716_3976_fr&refcode2=3976_22930333_jsLnHg&akid=3976%2E22930333%2EjsLnHg)**

Dan

name: President Trump
subject: I wrote you a letter!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Never Surrender, Inc
body:
It’s even got my signature at the bottom. Please take a look!
| | | | [](https://link.email.donaldjtrump.)

[FULL TRUMP MEMO](https://link.email.donaldjtrump.)
**Friend** **Top Patriot in the Country** **July 2025**
[](https://link.email.donaldjtrump.)
**July 16th, 2025**
Dear Friend,
A letter is just so much more personal, don’t you think so?
It’s very rare that I get to deliver good news myself – I am pretty busy these days – but this was something I had to take the time and do personally.
Let me be the very first to congratulate you on earning an invitation to the Trump Platinum Club – you’ve made it into the top 1% of supporters!
You are a cherished member of the America First movement, and I couldn’t imagine facing the challenges of the next three years without you by my side.
**[Please accept this invitation at your earliest convenience and let’s GET TO WORK!>](https://link.email.donaldjtrump.)**
Sincerely,
Donald J. Trump
45th and 47th President of the United States of America

[](https://link.email.donaldjtrump.)
